body:
With the end-of-year deadline just around the corner, your renewed commitment is more important now than ever to help us keep up our momentum as we prepare to head into the new year.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99046609/518658028/-247203143?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2024-12-20_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ZTJiM2FhLTJlYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=DlPKPdwtHAH6TbEKOt5-2iUTl0Jbj6qAedTP0PMv5Ps=)

| Peter,

Like you, I have gone through a rollercoaster of emotions since Election Day – but the one that is keeping me focused is determination.

The strength of our strategy is recruiting and training women who are part of the fabric of their communities and represent the New American Majority—Black, Brown, Indigenous women and women of color, as well as young, LGBTQ+, and unmarried women. As our candidates win, we recruit new ones to run for their positions so we don’t lose ground. _Our team at Emerge works around the clock – not just during the election cycle._

This is our opportunity to mobilize support for bold Democratic women to fight back against Donald Trump and his MAGA allies — we can’t waste even a minute to grow our movement!

With the end-of-year deadline just around the corner, your renewed commitment is more important now than ever to help us keep up our momentum as we prepare to head into the new year. _**A generous donor will MATCH every contribution — dollar for dollar — up to $50,000 until the end of the year!**_

Peter, as we close out 2024 and prepare for the battles ahead in 2025, the fight for reproductive freedom has _never_ been more urgent.
After the fall of _Roe v. Wade_ , far-right extremists have been relentless in their efforts to strip away our reproductive rights – with 13 states passing all-out abortion bans and 10 others imposing severe restrictions.
And now that Republicans are taking over Washington in the year ahead, radical politicians will be even more emboldened to cause more harm – with many already rallying behind a nationwide abortion ban.

Far-right extremists want to eliminate reproductive freedom _nationwide_ – even in progressive states like New York.
**This is NOT what the American people want, and we are NOT going to allow these attacks on our reproductive freedoms to take root.**
**Letitia James is ready to keep on fighting to ensure New York remains a safe haven for those seeking reproductive care – but with so many threats looming in 2025, she needs to know where you stand. clean_body: Letitia James needs to know where you stand | | | = | Are you a pro-choice voter? | | | | Peter, as we close out 2024 and prepare for the battles ahead in 2025, the fight for reproductive freedom has never been more urgent. After the fall of Roe v. Wade , far-right extremists have been relentless in their efforts to strip away our reproductive rights – with 13 states passing all-out abortion bans and 10 others imposing severe restrictions. And now that Republicans are taking over Washington in the year ahead, radical politicians will be even more emboldened to cause more harm – with many already rallying behind a nationwide abortion ban. Far-right extremists want to eliminate reproductive freedom nationwide – even in progressive states like New York. This is NOT what the American people want, and we are NOT going to allow these attacks on our reproductive freedoms to take root. Letitia James is ready to keep on fighting to ensure New York remains a safe haven for those seeking reproductive care – but with so many threats looming in 2025, she needs to know where you stand. Are you a pro-choice voter? | | | | | | Thank you for responding, Team James | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: The Democratic Party
subject: We need your input →
body:
We wanted to be sure you didn’t miss our earlier messages.
---
Derek — we wanted to be sure you didn’t miss our earlier messages. This is one of your last chances to vote on the design of our 2025 Democratic Member Cards before we send the winning design to the printer, **and we need your input.** [**Which design would you like to see on our Official 2025 Democratic Member Card?**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241220_2444_so&t=1&akid=2469%2E22930333%2E1GAvbz) [](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241220_2444_so&t=2&akid=2469%2E22930333%2E1GAvbz)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241220_2444_so&t=3&akid=2469%2E22930333%2E1GAvbz)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241220_2444_so&t=4&akid=2469%2E22930333%2E1GAvbz)
[](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/member-card-design-voter/?refcode=em_20241220_2444_so&t=5&akid=2469%2E22930333%2E1GAvbz)
You’re a key part of this team, Derek, so we cannot make this decision without you.
Once you’ve chosen your favorite, make sure to [**chip in $3 today to reserve your card ahead of time. When you do, we’ll send you your personalized card with the winning design in the mail!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?refcode=em_20241220_2444_so&amount=3&refcode2=2469_22930333_1GAvbz&akid=2469%2E22930333%2E1GAvbz)
**[RESERVE YOUR CARD](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2024-reserve-member-card?refcode=em_20241220_2444_so&amount=3&refcode2=2469_22930333_1GAvbz&akid=2469%2E22930333%2E1GAvbz)**
Thank you,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Dr. Fauci was a HERO who helped lead the country out of the disastrous COVID-19 pandemic — _but he’s at the TOP of Trump’s enemy revenge list._

President Biden is considering preemptively PARDONING Fauci to save him from Trump’s wrath, but with just weeks left in office, _he needs to act NOW._

[**That’s why we’re counting on a SURGE of 25,000 Democrats strong to sign our petition calling on Biden to pardon Dr. Fauci immediately! Please, don’t wait until it’s too late: SIGN NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/pardon-fauci?source=VPP_20241220_EMPET_E4_T0_NS&t=10&akid=18260%2E878179%2EOm-tGk)

clean_body: He knows you helped us win in 2024. He’s counting on you to do it again in 2025. | | | | | Friend, President Trump asked me to check in on you. With three special elections in the House and two toss-up gubernatorial races on the horizon, Republicans need the most accurate data and insights from our top Patriots. So when President Trump authorized us to conduct the Official Patriot Census — the largest one ever conducted by the leader of the free world — I knew I needed to get in contact with you. Here’s a breakdown of why these races are so mission-critical to President Trump: In Virginia, Pelosi-Puppet Abigail Spanberger is poised to win the Democrat gubernatorial nomination. If we lose this race, radical Democrats will add NON-CITIZENS to the Virginia voter rolls and engage in election interference. In New Jersey – a state where President Trump made HUGE gains in November – Democrats are fighting among themselves to select the most rabid ANTI-TRUMP candidate they can find. If we win here, we can flip New Jersey RED for good. And in the special elections being held in Florida and New York, we’ll need to win ALL THREE to ensure President Trump holds onto his MAGA majority in the House. ** Thank you, Mike, Team Trump Polling | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi4ikd7m9urt0dk97i60on2p5irv8gsvt42qtpe0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cdh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf5j0p7it5c2unu87ed6u27bmjhn85i3904c846g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cdh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zldvatk4rl85j0iqkesvehjqjdd74iks6dj490sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cdh2bs)
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5eaokdaq60af20pahteiv25ce536gcmpsagup18_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cdh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk4n7978t7pc1e89gukgnji2vi7tkq7vop5bd2vg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cdh2bs)

Updates for Great Americans
---

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College’s educational mission on behalf of liberty.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zper6ev2llojq4quui90o761ichpbiqemo177vr8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cph2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a story of transformation, faith, and generosity--a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas. You may not know that Dickens himself describes his Christmas stories as inspired by the words of Christ, offering lessons that are as timeless as they are powerful.

This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4fohloqb8ki6ebufaqrkepfg4uvdsot4lnjr4f8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cph2bs) **
For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more, we 'll send you an exclusive hardcover Hilldale College edition of _A Christmas Carol._**

This heirloom quality book features an inspiring introduction from English professor Dwight Lindley and 26 beautiful, original illustrations, making it a meaningful keepsake for you or a loved one.

Your generosity will help us reach millions across the country through our free educational resources, publications, and problems--all without accepting any--NOT. ONE. PENNY.--of government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

You can request your copy of _A Christmas Carol_ here: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zutsumgl3fsa5giq808d9eomdvutsqjaneec0pk8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cph2bs)

Together, we will help others to embrace the true meaning of Christmas.

God Bless Us, Everyone,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Trump Train News
---

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zuitvll0r9vtm3gtiil890t5bocu8p0k3f1j6lm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cth2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl4j337t7s1dmciopb006f9ao6gecd135icn93sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cth2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zofk9iqsf17jfsc4t5rkieoi1ro2orkabcfq98gg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cth2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6ms2hf33u6m41a6pgcokdfn1k52kjp5h3tu5qt0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cth2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| 1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zij06gvp0omjoho2tvrubce8rijf8j9gf8o3qs6o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj0s1jmaob246h22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs170j1f57gi8ou7of0f05nm2k4l308gciqp0ud0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2cth2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2tocgq14pboqblvqv48tlg34lui9t3k58iduc8o_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr6c5jmep33c9jm49fg)

name: 4Patriots
subject: Oh no! We're embarrassed...
body:
When you stock up today with this exclusive deal, you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs.

**Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN!** With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you [**stock up today with this exclusive deal**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znuh2inil02lai46u2hiaf4htp02t5g4slafpla0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2c5h2bs), you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6ghocu4t8js2gqejprpa0ammq4l7mvloqvbr7rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2c5h2bs) [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z378t8n5isjrdh3n21iu3l3219tu7tt1mdhc7dpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2c5h2bs) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2obttcbfeq08j3srt6tm6ldflbk2bs14u9s41g8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2c5h2bs) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**
"We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztmma2lbun2gtlq6n8rc1ndkdabpnd1877eiqd7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm8or2c5h2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via ICYMI News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgs444d9435bvqq5v0uq5nkunio802clhvki4bug_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm2pj6cdh2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zep47vuopn5eirslm08rl6d6s83ojie6lte6vne8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm2pj6cdh2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1all0er7aqjn667v11e4rrpikh1ui5uc1qu4e8g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm2pj6cdh2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z73bn3n4p4j21a119q7pilmi0mo1do2eidk2e9d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm2pj6cdh2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| ICYMI News
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z230rs1714tlltrmbfnuo3ekqjstj5e0a4ol655g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm2pj6cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpge0pr5cth2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7v13hamqnvvc0ftagn5cfmcjetfprii57v4mi1g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm2pj6cdh2bs)_

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2znu47ft3k65egd1gej4pahqipi345l41me4sonp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjmaoj1c1h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z12co93udm1g6g7v8co5msueihtlqih5618c3c88_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjmaoj1c1h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z8h05n53c85dibmcup2b4p0pv1cs3p89rbpork4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjmaoj1c1h2bs)
[](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z44rb1q8qlnjbprtk7logaud0b5cijpn6n4e15k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjmaoj1c1h2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zo71h6m3o0clc9qr7buq696daia28bqbetr24mj0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjmaoj1c1h2bs)

subject: Teach children to love America
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5qjvn94nggkcvi1ctviudd32i5kvbm8n1pt2pe8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjmaoj1c1h2bs)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvhrrep0okk6iqartcrsod5meqluomhcgoh4187o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjmaoj1c1h2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9d9m5o424k9nrnv9dbqobkua4oaujbovv4j2ds0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjmaoj1c1h2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zj2gmnn7f0na3len6u7tkak9i7ddh0uodddk1p50_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjmaoj1c1h2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze4npog0gvorvauk9bg9h7vork4qafsp4n35vho0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm1o74cth2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu0uegniqqhflpabat9vh0gubeep5ddf1tke75l0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm1o74cth2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2ugbul6q6ekrh9fartim3asfffca7ad44domeb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm1o74cth2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze9vqg1401meh851dka0s5s8nhok2gioa85jd3fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm1o74cth2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdo9r0lm5r4ndt7upepkg0v1pum0qhnofl2ob4a8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm1o74cth2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2qat9cjoht4boog7s3shd6ejvdf7ckrp3qlc25g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm1o74cth2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z575fobvd7g8o9nvbohmvoq5cv42r6t69i5pu9kg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm1o74cth2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z97bomblaj14mp6lqa5ntupbk3519io3i25dp7e0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm1o74cth2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9r5aa33pe732mrj1rvqomlqp8jl8kjfd9lg2f0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm1o74cth2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztndnt5j6lclp0e9igj2l7g99go5o5hfd9d2qhb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctjm1o74cth2bs)

Your America

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College’s educational mission on behalf of liberty.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z16dsc3d6dep0kjotlumnuf3hoel77n3rj8hu0v8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge0or2cph2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a story of transformation, faith, and generosity--a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas. You may not know that Dickens himself describes his Christmas stories as inspired by the words of Christ, offering lessons that are as timeless as they are powerful.

This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjsd1ec2qecft8e1osk9jrk8qec3d7hrtro9iiog_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge0or2cph2bs) **
For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more, we 'll send you an exclusive hardcover Hilldale College edition of _A Christmas Carol._**

This heirloom quality book features an inspiring introduction from English professor Dwight Lindley and 26 beautiful, original illustrations, making it a meaningful keepsake for you or a loved one.

Your generosity will help us reach millions across the country through our free educational resources, publications, and problems--all without accepting any--NOT. ONE. PENNY.--of government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

You can request your copy of _A Christmas Carol_ here: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3f9lsg4v86uoo6qqrpgd8eep5nat5kemb19otl0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge0or2cph2bs)

Together, we will help others to embrace the true meaning of Christmas.

God Bless Us, Everyone,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaq9jq2u0nhkhvg5dk0cqv2b1vm1mdad1kq2p830_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0cjh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2za14ihe70p3ms2i51nf88v2d7kreai9mu55qcq4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0cjh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq1m2ti18gjka1t65vah0grdftfn2hs6lnbookk0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0cjh2bs)
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zq8d2otrh9srkmn3irjkleepfomsb2su401i0jf8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0cjh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

name: Hillsdale College via Updates For Great Americans
subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College’s educational mission on behalf of liberty.

This sponsored message from Great American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zl7il73fn5valmtpuaog0v3jtg31haeoprli4gb8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0c3h2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a story of transformation, faith, and generosity--a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas. You may not know that Dickens himself describes his Christmas stories as inspired by the words of Christ, offering lessons that are as timeless as they are powerful.

This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty. [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zi0ji49i32ou7fahs9a0bmm0qbakfi2e5vaa746o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0c3h2bs) **
For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more, we 'll send you an exclusive hardcover Hilldale College edition of _A Christmas Carol._**

This heirloom quality book features an inspiring introduction from English professor Dwight Lindley and 26 beautiful, original illustrations, making it a meaningful keepsake for you or a loved one.

Your generosity will help us reach millions across the country through our free educational resources, publications, and problems--all without accepting any--NOT. ONE. PENNY.--of government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

You can request your copy of _A Christmas Carol_ here: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zgfg1mrn00bmgs8pekiangv4ttj732kbdbui7ks0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0c3h2bs)

Together, we will help others to embrace the true meaning of Christmas.

God Bless Us, Everyone,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| |

name: Steve Daines - NRSC Chairman
subject: This is our chance to improve the country we love
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Friend,

As 2024 comes to a close, we have a lot to be grateful for this year. President Trump will be President of the United States again, and we regained the Senate majority!

_**[But now we must look to 2025.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UbaiNFbU6ZS4KW3hRLNXMA~~/AAVLBgA~)** We will still be focused on supporting Senate Republicans as they fight with President Trump to Make America Great Again. _

We can't lose this majority we worked so hard to build after just two years. **[Otherwise, President Trump would be a"lame duck" president, and we would waste years of opportunities because our leaders would not have the political muscle they need.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UbaiNFbU6ZS4KW3hRLNXMA~~/AAVLBgA~)**

In 2024, many of our candidates entered their races facing 2, 3, 4, or even 5 to 1 financial deficits they were never able to close. **[Unfortunately, Friend, this cost Republicans multiple winnable seats in the U.S. Senate.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UbaiNFbU6ZS4KW3hRLNXMA~~/AAVLBgA~)**

**[Friend, would you please consider making a generous year-end contribution to support our Incumbent Republican candidates and GOP nominees fighting to secure critical seats we need to HOLD our Senate majority?](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UbaiNFbU6ZS4KW3hRLNXMA~~/AAVLBgA~)**

******************************************************[CONTRIBUTE BEFORE DECEMBER 31st>>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UbaiNFbU6ZS4KW3hRLNXMA~~/AAVLBgA~)******************************************************

We want our Republican incumbents and candidates to start on a solid financial footing in these can't-lose races. The Democrats have corrupt billionaires on their side and the lamestream media marketing their ideas free of charge.

We know money can be tight around the Christmas season, but we must help our candidates build war chests now so they are not stuck trying to fill a financial gap when they should be focused on winning.

**[Even if it's just $5, your support for Senate Republicans will help protect our new majority and strengthen Republicans' standing in Congress.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UbaiNFbU6ZS4KW3hRLNXMA~~/AAVLBgA~)**

Last month, we were outraised by Senate Democrats - we cannot let this happen again.

We want to finish December _and 2024_ on top. **[Please chip in whatever you can before the end of the year!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UbaiNFbU6ZS4KW3hRLNXMA~~/AAVLBgA~)**

Thank you,
[](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UbaiNFbU6ZS4KW3hRLNXMA~~/AAVLBgA~)
Steve Daines
Chairman, National Republican Senatorial Committee

P.S. Please don't let Senate Democrats beat us again. **[Before the clock strikes midnight on New Year's Eve, please send whatever you can to protect our Senate majority!](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UbaiNFbU6ZS4KW3hRLNXMA~~/AAVLBgA~)**

******************************************************[CONTRIBUTE BEFORE DECEMBER 31st>>](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/UbaiNFbU6ZS4KW3hRLNXMA~~/AAVLBgA~)******************************************************

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Teach children to love America
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0cocfdepv3832go0vjrc15mmfpm8vho6g4einp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0cjh2bs)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh2p605gm33pgrg126p9cspfq33glfpomjjs16t8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0cjh2bs)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zuh73np9vjqgknclfjtq8hna1a86vbc70g1mn9no_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0cjh2bs). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgmspvfhbo9p6j2veq4bcqni9o9bafnoq90e7568_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0cjh2bs)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zpgjl1ao91doedggm9prcah989bvkubofd6q0bto_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob0cjh2bs)
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---

name: Hillsdale College via Trump News HQ
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrbd1c3fvnu9mdm01nmv4rrgi16cji0kq1kfi1d8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob4c1h2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmo1l98msbh8s84uptfc9n5bskocus5hjggc2f8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob4c1h2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm6gtb214fcl3ahufea7t1lf5ovj54ku6d1bq8eg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob4c1h2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqmr1vfg31nhc5kg155oeagbtb872n4iutkeqtd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob4c1h2bs) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Trump Train News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8cni66em4vdc58itik4eubtffuml3g7pco990po_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8pj0s1jm1pj246h22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob4c1h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0c3gdtu0j0a14kf0asgecituukv7r8qlf5313rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob4c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmgvk650169r8ih3dek95obnv75t0oq7es03cho8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge4ob4c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Steve Daines
subject: A new year and new opportunities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We must capitalize on our opportunity to rebuild America and bring our country into a prosperous future.

Friend,

As 2024 comes to a close, we have a lot to be grateful for this year. President Trump will be President of the United States again, and we regained the Senate majority!

_**[But now we must look to 2025.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zklc0f9ocq4i09911glsn35hrqlkbvdsj8acnbag_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)** We will still be focused on supporting Senate Republicans as they fight with President Trump to Make America Great Again. _

We can't lose this majority we worked so hard to build after just two years. **[Otherwise, President Trump would be a"lame duck" president, and we would waste years of opportunities because our leaders would not have the political muscle they need.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zublbas3di0e2ne78codiu1pdpk6i2pspsadnef8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)**

In 2024, many of our candidates entered their races facing 2, 3, 4, or even 5 to 1 financial deficits they were never able to close. **[Unfortunately, Friend, this cost Republicans multiple winnable seats in the U.S. Senate.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpi5qfmnn65pnkako9mlfvmcmgea5nb2h10mjh3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)**

**[Friend, would you please consider making a generous year-end contribution to support our Incumbent Republican candidates and GOP nominees fighting to secure critical seats we need to HOLD our Senate majority?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp4digbssm2r60j1reiglr781m7qunhbnb6iupug_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)**

******************************************************[CHIP IN BEFORE DECEMBER 31st>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z32acbddon2o1voe2qqd4nso67ja6chct39glgto_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)******************************************************

We want our Republican incumbents and candidates to start on a solid financial footing in these can't-lose races. The Democrats have corrupt billionaires on their side and the lamestream media marketing their ideas free of charge.

We know money can be tight around the Christmas season, but we must help our candidates build war chests now so they are not stuck trying to fill a financial gap when they should be focused on winning.

**[Even if it's just $5, your support for Senate Republicans will help protect our new majority and strengthen Republicans' standing in Congress.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z3kkph8f0vl1bs9pgppuvhbkpatvfist7hdvi1pg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)**

Last month, we were outraised by Senate Democrats - we cannot let this happen again.

We want to finish December _and 2024_ on top. **[Please chip in whatever you can before the end of the year!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrisui0ibvc4rb1duj5hfeuiptoq6rqormn58acg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)**

Thank you,
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrv6frm5cg7n86h66pumevhi05rr6th9oljsk1rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)
Steve Daines
Chairman, National Republican Senatorial Committee

P.S. Please don't let Senate Democrats beat us again. **[Before the clock strikes midnight on New Year's Eve, please send whatever you can to protect our Senate majority!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zulp8lcs8f9luae8if7s90pq6mao5o4cdslt8vq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)**

******************************************************[CHIP IN BEFORE DECEMBER 31st>>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z01prsft8tjv0tkapkn3mrvtiu7r2bu88dird4p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)******************************************************

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zfsbb055gj0qrvbnlsvullhk0aq7u386dg75uim0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z8edpuv5bl9p03rjmrueevfr9sc1avrcp3h6luhg_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zqrf0819f31j8p2880mvliqoop14scrt5qq3l8to_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)
[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z70r2s1rg32qoi1agpp5nk5o8fffnjvknigigld0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zj00israfvc756lu3838d826ohdtioengeshjqe8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge2oj4clh2bs)

name: Hillsdale College via First Look News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zq42ilb8ka8qnr52cij9rr6c9ni3ntnnros29pa0_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge6o36cth2bs) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztpj7afg8p7d5ejadugi9tgocu87qldg20m31aag_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge6o36cth2bs) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z52gnt0s13a4svuo8ut1khfl2cvvg6musa2l4ir8_rp22sh2s8i6epj1ctge6o36cth2bs) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. This sponsored message from First Look is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty. The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country... Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open. Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation. The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.” Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted. By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Friend, you can complete the National Referendum on Religious Liberty by using the secure link below: Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty." Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. The first step is ...EDUCATION. Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is reaching and teaching millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our Project to Save Religious Liberty in America. These efforts include: Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty. So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2L3DAMhn-NcstgS15nfPChJZ1bWlgKPRr5I7Pu5gvbs2X_fUlp2WuPkl70PLw_JjdxXvJ2_8prsmV1pbqyOnVw66mP_N7XR3lzKFD1EnuUTnbRaoPDVXbJyoHUMJASonuxbPwQghGcokoY2TNL8j4az8lrSV225x-JKMVVafl0mY3AwLN5iglJXT0oUdLx8EsOvK38cy-5vV-21LrFvrR2VKBPgDfAWyscXvN2v4Qlh9faSj6SvIR9BbzxPLsAdNvnORWXI9CI4qoB9Xn5M0thFKCu-6OEBDR-WTkvfwP14YHG56l_nvp_voA6INB47IdEIVHxR5iARpq-SaO_fywV0AjD51Z4qxxa3rcTPIxdsfH4lZclVz2AEvcTfHp37T_bf7P4OwAA__8osYa6) [](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2L3DAMhn-NcstgS15nfPChJZ1bWlgKPRr5I7Pu5gvbs2X_fUlp2WuPkl70PLw_JjdxXvJ2_8prsmV1pbqyOnVw66mP_N7XR3lzKFD1EnuUTnbRaoPDVXbJyoHUMJASonuxbPwQghGcokoY2TNL8j4az8lrSV225x-JKMVVafl0mY3AwLN5iglJXT0oUdLx8EsOvK38cy-5vV-21LrFvrR2VKBPgDfAWyscXvN2v4Qlh9faSj6SvIR9BbzxPLsAdNvnORWXI9CI4qoB9Xn5M0thFKCu-6OEBDR-WTkvfwP14YHG56l_nvp_voA6INB47IdEIVHxR5iARpq-SaO_fywV0AjD51Z4qxxa3rcTPIxdsfH4lZclVz2AEvcTfHp37T_bf7P4OwAA__8osYa6) **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food.** This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. [**Click here to secure your own stockpile of these best-selling survival food kits while you still can.**](https://email.republicanmajority.net/c/eJyMkE2L3DAMhn-NcstgS15nfPChJZ1bWlgKPRr5I7Pu5gvbs2X_fUlp2WuPkl70PLw_JjdxXvJ2_8prsmV1pbqyOnVw66mP_N7XR3lzKFD1EnuUTnbRaoPDVXbJyoHUMJASonuxbPwQghGcokoY2TNL8j4az8lrSV225x-JKMVVafl0mY3AwLN5iglJXT0oUdLx8EsOvK38cy-5vV-21LrFvrR2VKBPgDfAWyscXvN2v4Qlh9faSj6SvIR9BbzxPLsAdNvnORWXI9CI4qoB9Xn5M0thFKCu-6OEBDR-WTkvfwP14YHG56l_nvp_voA6INB47IdEIVHxR5iARpq-SaO_fywV0AjD51Z4qxxa3rcTPIxdsfH4lZclVz2AEvcTfHp37T_bf7P4OwAA__8osYa6) **More Raving Customer Reviews!** **Rory H.**
"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**
"Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." **Kevin S.**
"The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." **Carol B.**
"I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." **Ken K.**
"I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." **Justin A.**
"My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**

This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." **Gary M.**
"I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." **John H.**

subject: Discover the True Meaning of Christmas with A Christmas Carol
body:
This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College’s educational mission on behalf of liberty.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cbb13282f51466da4fad136b469ae03&_e=cS2X8b08UsWQZOzvQutYMXqDaWpaSB6ZBmZeUYCoH8cPrU9FY7PU3qoWuc0dGztRSYP7f-VMTLuZqHQZ3xa_sMAoXfunE3Mfk6-jo-B1M8FlbzHkr8YM9O9f5eSJ_aQuu4l0ATEcAXvO17E6O8aiIGh9jKwgfA3iat-hWbMfaTkNB4mN3e4UPt4vflqIG5thUHBFS4H9eV4dJGevYRMXWLHVYXtC9hHE0gQwpp96CuwkT5GUPJP6WW755Br5fazXD-uZ2AGUHy93NI4Vi0ZF1FZusRBsyrxltYBAqA9kbFUMzLGk66FUHU9AtF1oWV-ctDRFRAVLPMO-DBgWnCX-g2KEr1iFPpFL5QV7V0zwV00pEgSHfvD3hK1cpAxZ9Ybqm8QRLX2bwUZHvH7L1gT0ctLS_QAZ4YDOtctDy0GBAok%3D)
