| | Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a story of transformation, faith, and generosity--a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas. You may not know that Dickens himself describes his Christmas stories as inspired by the words of Christ, offering lessons that are as timeless as they are powerful.

This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty. [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cbb13282f51466da4fad136b469ae03&_e=cS2X8b08UsWQZOzvQutYMXqDaWpaSB6ZBmZeUYCoH8cPrU9FY7PU3qoWuc0dGztRSYP7f-VMTLuZqHQZ3xa_sMAoXfunE3Mfk6-jo-B1M8FlbzHkr8YM9O9f5eSJ_aQuu4l0ATEcAXvO17E6O8aiIGh9jKwgfA3iat-hWbMfaTkNB4mN3e4UPt4vflqIG5thUHBFS4H9eV4dJGevYRMXWLHVYXtC9hHE0gQwpp96CuwkT5GUPJP6WW755Br5fazXfb583G1GRDI85fvvl1nCH50c0yh6iVlA_fvFDQMF2-7IhTBWF4CWzlf7iiPODijogL9B8KmKvdovOQ17QVIUwXis0fM3EPTXcle_9-s3WQcooLkT7ivHtBGbPPTRtu-ard0TNW_fEVuobDOLEASQeNl2UjDlgH9xzM_i3ubmq_A%3D) **
For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more, we 'll send you an exclusive hardcover Hilldale College edition of _A Christmas Carol._**

This heirloom quality book features an inspiring introduction from English professor Dwight Lindley and 26 beautiful, original illustrations, making it a meaningful keepsake for you or a loved one.

Your generosity will help us reach millions across the country through our free educational resources, publications, and problems--all without accepting any--NOT. ONE. PENNY.--of government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

You can request your copy of _A Christmas Carol_ here: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4cbb13282f51466da4fad136b469ae03&_e=cS2X8b08UsWQZOzvQutYMXqDaWpaSB6ZBmZeUYCoH8cPrU9FY7PU3qoWuc0dGztRSYP7f-VMTLuZqHQZ3xa_sMAoXfunE3Mfk6-jo-B1M8FlbzHkr8YM9O9f5eSJ_aQuu4l0ATEcAXvO17E6O8aiIGh9jKwgfA3iat-hWbMfaTkNB4mN3e4UPt4vflqIG5thUHBFS4H9eV4dJGevYRMXWLHVYXtC9hHE0gQwpp96CuwkT5GUPJP6WW755Br5fazXEU2mjklnpG1Z93hCEQ_pikzp3CcpOorx-xrUb2_a5VGd_usLsOS0LVkek-Y-1IEyniHpt1gpNh__WlTFGvm_ok8gIjmA8-Mx4MxTT3tYzEoyhQLzETxGuCci6cTNOd4yVzB26_iAIDDxEkR2cgfl6o-IQzW5Ja70l8JYAH6ple4%3D)

Together, we will help others to embrace the true meaning of Christmas.

God Bless Us, Everyone,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I’d like your thoughts on life, family, and freedom
body:
View Email in Browser:
American Cornerstone Institute

My team and I are committed to championing the values
that strengthen our nation
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWrdvHeW3N

Dear
Fellow Patriot,

My team
and I are committed to championing the values that strengthen our
nation-life, family, and freedom. We're boldly standing up for
pro-life principles and leading the charge for the significant
improvement of our education system, with special emphasis on the
teaching of true American history.

Although
our resolve is unwavering, and our mission is clear, I need your
help to refine our strategies and improve our efforts. Your
invaluable perspective plays a critical role in shaping the
future of our efforts.

I have
prepared a brief survey about life, family and freedom that seeks
to understand your views better. The survey focuses on the
following key areas:

The
value of life for unborn children and the importance of pro-life
advocacy.
The
role of family in shaping our future and the influence of
education in reinforcing family values.
Your
views on individual freedoms and the significance of teaching our
nation's founding principles.

You can
start the survey here:
https://offers.americancornerstone.org/life-family-freedom-survey/

Your
feedback is crucial as we strive to address the issues that
matter most to you. Together, we can work towards meaningful
change in our communities and uphold the conservative values that
make our nation great.

Thank you
for taking the time to share your thoughts. I sincerely
appreciate your time, input, and unwavering support!

Best
Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder
and Chairman
American
Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2024 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWrdvHeW3N

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWrdvHeW3N

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: 2025 is a critical year
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b209328705c2469a8b465894ea4a42b5&_e=FDGtaFLsm7MLS07gknRC_wlgtecS8n8oYzF_qTmn0Cgz5W9AHcnCEtVu0DbMRP69OEdEIhIeaRjRMamhAj8n4qwSpiGW5Png6WYjLR0b1rqNFMlFZNw8pe-x7_7ZkZy1tuyPcIX-khvvRZE_PzmKOTZqzjSYisdeAY2XR3xEXqWmXYCzduVJadO9-lxfOsfbTvfXEBhOgqXdgd3BHwe5vTGzdGUKYW6_1MjlxuCoxWWLq3OvYcPEaBU825d5ZiVnbkZnkh5X1m3qAy1AGnoZIgj2EY1Bycg2WSI2jXI1_UZmiKyD5egSPHz3XxazGK5vfv5r6-w9pzGogKt9OmEtV9P0hfv_qSYIr3H2dLOD03SwD0O5NVmRMCjx8-O-RKXY)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b209328705c2469a8b465894ea4a42b5&_e=FDGtaFLsm7MLS07gknRC_wlgtecS8n8oYzF_qTmn0Cgz5W9AHcnCEtVu0DbMRP69OEdEIhIeaRjRMamhAj8n4qwSpiGW5Png6WYjLR0b1rqNFMlFZNw8pe-x7_7ZkZy1tuyPcIX-khvvRZE_PzmKOTZqzjSYisdeAY2XR3xEXqWmXYCzduVJadO9-lxfOsfbTvfXEBhOgqXdgd3BHwe5vTGzdGUKYW6_1MjlxuCoxWW39Y4vl4YpL5Z4aMz0ud4RnFftmFvcPBuXDU98izO14MS-QsJsYaLyHGoZjqTXBF9z7t7TMH77PNPUa_ljEqN1DRomtteQ6mW1AZ1ck9d6ejgEn61rNIL-rm2tmCmYU4lCamMN3f7grVc64fBKBRAA)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b209328705c2469a8b465894ea4a42b5&_e=FDGtaFLsm7MLS07gknRC_wlgtecS8n8oYzF_qTmn0Cgz5W9AHcnCEtVu0DbMRP69OEdEIhIeaRjRMamhAj8n4qwSpiGW5Png6WYjLR0b1rqNFMlFZNw8pe-x7_7ZkZy1tuyPcIX-khvvRZE_PzmKOTZqzjSYisdeAY2XR3xEXqWmXYCzduVJadO9-lxfOsfbTvfXEBhOgqXdgd3BHwe5vTGzdGUKYW6_1MjlxuCoxWW3XS0DYf9_X_GgpUbvHR4VL9ygj3m57FLk6ynG4sHCGKeXMdCcSIaVTXyiLuFG3d_65iYk41VQfC5u71H6Au6EbUgTn9AfMmFvX7l_5DtySkD461mfpBlv8wsQBQ_Mm6W7gcmDz_-f2tld8q61bfZC)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b209328705c2469a8b465894ea4a42b5&_e=FDGtaFLsm7MLS07gknRC_wlgtecS8n8oYzF_qTmn0Cgz5W9AHcnCEtVu0DbMRP69OEdEIhIeaRjRMamhAj8n4qwSpiGW5Png6WYjLR0b1rqNFMlFZNw8pe-x7_7ZkZy1tuyPcIX-khvvRZE_PzmKOTZqzjSYisdeAY2XR3xEXqWmXYCzduVJadO9-lxfOsfbTvfXEBhOgqXdgd3BHwe5vTGzdGUKYW6_1MjlxuCoxWUMIljacQM7X-R6XQKrvbUbvpD-1GO0P09wnu0UZldHMD3vlMGtHM4cjtf2jn17POqgW5y46sI0iuGhjhBPNEqIuIeHJnTm9P0DndSu9H8ckQGbmqjd38qYrTec0FEKCupep2uFc1LAngAfGAVpYVR5)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Conservatives Give
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=b209328705c2469a8b465894ea4a42b5&_t=etK2KeLWqgbqovCvqmwD5leNZ4Czvr-XBBTuCi7xPHqFY4SEaZYJYyiGrHcNtMk3kXG9MTzqEBKERD6TBk4sdxYlp5Lc_tp-X-euE4-6knvQeo5qqc08hu8CpgLgKOHw6MVzT662OlaMZCs4MeXUp6IcWDz-tvBgi6bK4xkmhw4%3D)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b209328705c2469a8b465894ea4a42b5&_e=TIGvz9E7ocVJYdY4uzYS7g4bTPHwi4jeMuGNm20V1eGxD09RGcyeBAD7z3-oqEskLHKc1iN-Q82Fsh87L6vG8Wxir0O0cL14OlQ-KjMlIjKkNHptZ54_SEBnO-q9gF-dqH7OaKlSFnfkRnktl-1kMfweAF308W64KaPb8pIr4AnAte4NkO4QPwgmMFmzmuTAoU5tLsCqGTHc5rk4HnsPKkAV_Tt5BMkBFzuw_SyuyAzdIo6zdjltUQOA4_sW7VhWb-hp_Dl_BUYePX100nRhtos-Rio_67Ulvi1Py5R7d94%3D)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b209328705c2469a8b465894ea4a42b5&_e=FDGtaFLsm7MLS07gknRC_70I3sAxCrk-TNzP-b_aipAROUKkgt4pwc9N3SSkdPeIFGJEbfcr8tVdwd-gIYPJRtJWnjSJX1UMCD56r1B61BhhyvfNN8S4dOal5Qgev7KRMVUyONTURiHFXxsA62_9aHHTYACNk-dZG3KQqXEcAInInGlDbM-v46NHyhAQrcuwa0wA47-igZ584r9FN-SYmSBdqqndIHHT2PUYCbhaPEY%3D)_

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Get your copy of Why America Matters
body:
Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools?

|
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yOXlOf49L9YKgcz06JU60Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSSmSP0S0aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1BTUZSNTk2Nzgmc291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUNJMjMwOEVQMDAxVwNzcGNCCmdl55VmZ666e-NSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
|
Fellow American,

Are you worried about the rising influence of radical ideologies in today's schools? I know I am.

That's why I have created the Little Patriots Program. This program provides curriculum for grades K-5 that teaches the REAL history of America, promoting the values of faith, liberty, community, and life that made our nation great.

This innovative approach makes learning history fun for our children while instilling in them a profound love and respect for our country. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yOXlOf49L9YKgcz06JU60Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSSmSP0S0aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1BTUZSNTk2Nzgmc291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUNJMjMwOEVQMDAxVwNzcGNCCmdl55VmZ666e-NSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
__ But, in order to keep this curriculum **free of charge,** I need your support.

I have written a book, [_Why America Matters_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yOXlOf49L9YKgcz06JU60Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSSmSP0S0aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1BTUZSNTk2Nzgmc291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUNJMjMwOEVQMDAxVwNzcGNCCmdl55VmZ666e-NSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA). Intended for young readers, this book creates a deeper understanding of the importance of our country and the respect that it deserves.

I want to send you a copy for a gift of $25 or more. To give a gift use this secure link: [https://secure.americancornerstone.org/why-america-matters-donate](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/yOXlOf49L9YKgcz06JU60Q~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSSmSP0S0aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvd2h5LWFtZXJpY2EtbWF0dGVycy1kb25hdGU_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXdhbSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9cHJlbWl1bV9BRS1BTUZSNTk2Nzgmc291cmNlX2NvZGU9QUNJMjMwOEVQMDAxVwNzcGNCCmdl55VmZ666e-NSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

All proceeds from your donation will go directly to supporting our Little Patriots Program, ensuring that we can keep creating curricula and cartoons that show the history of America.

You can help shape the minds of our future leaders today and give them the best possible resources.

Your gift of $25 or more will get you access to my book, _Why America Matters_ , and help us reach more children with the truth.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Israel Lee Armstead
subject: Together, We Build Justice: Retire Our Debt and Empower Change
body:
Every dollar helps retire our campaign’s debt and build the Justice for All Party—a new movement for equity and love. Donate today!

| | |
---
---
## From the Desk of Israel Lee Armstead
##### Post-Campaign Transitional Manager
I greet you with profound gratitude and an unshakable commitment to justice, freedom, and love. My name is **Israel Lee Armstead** , a proud son of Miami, deeply rooted in the traditions of those who fought fearlessly to light our path toward progress. It is humbling and invigorating to take on the role of **Post-Campaign Transitional Manager** , a responsibility I embrace with great reverence.
---
|
---
| I extend my deepest thanks to **Drs. Cornel and Annahita West** , whose unwavering dedication and boundless love have been a beacon of hope for us all.
---
| To **Dr. Melina Abdullah** , a tireless warrior for justice and leader of the Black Lives Matter Grassroots movement, your work continues to galvanize us, and your example of bold leadership strengthens our resolve.
---
|
---
To my predecessor, **Ceyanna Dent** , I stand on the solid foundation of leadership you built with vision and tenacity. To our incredible staff, legal team, accountants, and volunteers, your ability to achieve miracles with limited resources is a testament to the power of commitment and collective action. Finally, thank **you** , **Peter** , and all of our supporters, volunteers, and donors, for believing in this campaign and giving generously of your time, talent, and treasure.
---
* * *
---
### **Our Mandate Moving Forward**
The campaign may be over, but our mission continues with two critical priorities:
#### 1\. **Retire the Campaign’s Debt**
We are committed to honoring our financial obligations and closing this chapter with integrity. Our outstanding debt of [**$89,963.46**](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?recruiter_id=22826&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=1) includes critical payments to vendors and team members who gave their all to this campaign. With your help, we can fulfill these commitments.
#### 2\. **Establish the Justice for All Party**
This movement is evolving into a powerful new force: the **Justice for All Party**. Together, we will amplify the voices of those left behind by the political establishment and fight relentlessly for policies rooted in **justice, equity, and love**.
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?recruiter_id=22826&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=2 "Please Donate Today") [Please Donate Today](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?recruiter_id=22826&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=2)
---
### **Why I Serve**
My journey with this movement began with a single breakout room during a campaign call—one of nearly a thousand attendees. That night, I met Brother West, and his words ignited a fire in me to commit my life to this cause. From that moment, my resolve has never wavered, and I am honored to stand with you as we continue this mission. Below, you will find a transparent breakdown of our campaign’s current financial obligations. Your contributions today will help us honor these commitments and set the stage for the Justice for All Party’s long-term success.
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?recruiter_id=22826&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=3)
---
### **Call to Action**
This movement thrives on the generosity of people like you—people who refuse to accept the status quo. Whether you contribute **$3** , **$30** , or **$300** , every dollar makes a difference. 💡 **Here’s What Your Contribution Can Achieve** :
* **$30** funds an hour of volunteer outreach.
* **$100** helps close outstanding vendor payments.
* **$500** lays the foundation for the Justice for All Party’s strategic planning efforts.

---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?recruiter_id=22826&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=4 "Please Donate Today") [Please Donate Today](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?recruiter_id=22826&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=4)
---
Together, we will retire this [debt](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?recruiter_id=22826&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=5), honor our commitments, and create a future built on justice and love. With love and unrelenting resolve, **Israel Lee Armstead**
Post-Campaign Transitional Manager
Justice for All Party p.s. coming soon... JusticeForAll.us | JusticeForAll.world
---
| [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=YAZft98I3DSVnDVuOPoWnICiQCxhvtxXNcd9r6WsPjU&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=6) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=g4CckuGqu2uejl0msGqx69he_SAdtJilhCOV8yi78tc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=7) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=Vrui5UDYBmv0i4v0MTa7Bj1LMiWeDY1BhjzR-5jiZZo&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=8) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=8OB7geiTjSkAePWyoEq098aTT2_9ysbw8gGN9N1oPt8&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=9) | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=10)
---|---|---|---|---
* * *
---
Cornel West for President · 8253A Backlick Rd., PO Box #1577, Newington, VA 22122, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=11) Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=cri42ALP2Ev8b37T9dLxBD1GGAUjEYMPmaGYNH4bmIw&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=debt_retirement_campaign_launc&n=12). Build the Future.
---

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: 2025 is a critical year
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1dcca5e3ce242f28da92fe327412030&_e=VEhS23LYwdp8rngGTmGTcFCtU5cDZM60_zhE_5bzkJ5UUHR7Z8bE6_zmTTXj2g9Gn11zsgNYmsdlHsR9FQ1sWIrSvn8UyQpUxkcvRnzf1j2XxFuDFTAA8VwC-LOVZdJh-aeJSi5gaCX4-Gp4FZ85iWloT0mYr9o1xKJMhxf1LZAEyRp3HDRwpkv0rqy22CREigrhUMhm7l_OXV4DKaQo1Su3O67RkFyjCKHgysnr-LEoH91vc-IJ2IcnwXTYoNnvR2LgEYgY9LWHYSAkDUvwv3_0xMd7xl6F85vRQuXY7W-767nL0n7IH7NrHwZaHMB5DOtMTtk_ZVo2SJWIeT7zB-woewQKczXA0TDkjtwIZWW112D_la3jr5ca-HSsLizZ)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1dcca5e3ce242f28da92fe327412030&_e=VEhS23LYwdp8rngGTmGTcFCtU5cDZM60_zhE_5bzkJ5UUHR7Z8bE6_zmTTXj2g9Gn11zsgNYmsdlHsR9FQ1sWIrSvn8UyQpUxkcvRnzf1j2XxFuDFTAA8VwC-LOVZdJh-aeJSi5gaCX4-Gp4FZ85iWloT0mYr9o1xKJMhxf1LZAEyRp3HDRwpkv0rqy22CREigrhUMhm7l_OXV4DKaQo1Su3O67RkFyjCKHgysnr-LGeb6PhR3Ui4VqFJ5PekbgDUVK4ejontnblYTdb8gCafuXTwNXoDcbFJY6ilMYSLCvSjeGu2YxIUbSWogIvshwVrJ3x1uyFfO0iWIS1EvvJV2VM4XXQWLL1Pp2hmwrr3QTVB9HNtDPUEeWsXYjln8Dp)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1dcca5e3ce242f28da92fe327412030&_e=VEhS23LYwdp8rngGTmGTcFCtU5cDZM60_zhE_5bzkJ5UUHR7Z8bE6_zmTTXj2g9Gn11zsgNYmsdlHsR9FQ1sWIrSvn8UyQpUxkcvRnzf1j2XxFuDFTAA8VwC-LOVZdJh-aeJSi5gaCX4-Gp4FZ85iWloT0mYr9o1xKJMhxf1LZAEyRp3HDRwpkv0rqy22CREigrhUMhm7l_OXV4DKaQo1Su3O67RkFyjCKHgysnr-LFdJhPk32neTYtWcHgNVqKTD7M98i4TXLKEbuo7gJucDY05p4Bdpbtn09wWYCLqpkTcWGgKtCoTY7lCC1Igpp8E-pyqvtzdbfxWnrVfAXvf5n3Lejkk-JgP7gy5lFigPMmxYjh8GP5_AzrxW_ao34P1)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d1dcca5e3ce242f28da92fe327412030&_e=VEhS23LYwdp8rngGTmGTcFCtU5cDZM60_zhE_5bzkJ5UUHR7Z8bE6_zmTTXj2g9Gn11zsgNYmsdlHsR9FQ1sWIrSvn8UyQpUxkcvRnzf1j2XxFuDFTAA8VwC-LOVZdJh-aeJSi5gaCX4-Gp4FZ85iWloT0mYr9o1xKJMhxf1LZAEyRp3HDRwpkv0rqy22CREigrhUMhm7l_OXV4DKaQo1Su3O67RkFyjCKHgysnr-LFnCBbXmDhBRH5VFX2o6XFIfaz3STDqFUDsywKp4r_lZ8lVbREdHWTHjs3irR8Di_enDy0fgf0tAT-jjZ2qpOL4ukcfYSkMITJQAr3v-0foeAESzMX-i2VHmRteNtR9wx1Rlpriw6SfCCHQ4PBtGunu)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Full Mag News

clean_body: Our nation is at a crossroads. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government. It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations. As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that. To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education in 2025. What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude. Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations. But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. We must do all that we possibly can. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation. You will help us to ... Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with Imprimis , our monthly digest of liberty. With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of Imprimis to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025. Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses. Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025. Restore excellence to American K-12 education. Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile. With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country! Hillsdale College conducts its educational outreach efforts --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between $25 and $100. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range. We will also need a significant number of $500 to $1,000 donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated. Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help. You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years. That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the December 31 deadline. Every dollar you give will get us closer to our $6,000,000 online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**. Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x8ymqYbZyyOnHuwSdNpiTw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSTLKP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x8ymqYbZyyOnHuwSdNpiTw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSTLKP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x8ymqYbZyyOnHuwSdNpiTw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSTLKP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x8ymqYbZyyOnHuwSdNpiTw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSTLKP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x8ymqYbZyyOnHuwSdNpiTw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSTLKP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
[ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x8ymqYbZyyOnHuwSdNpiTw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSTLKP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)
What makes [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x8ymqYbZyyOnHuwSdNpiTw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSTLKP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x8ymqYbZyyOnHuwSdNpiTw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSTLKP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x8ymqYbZyyOnHuwSdNpiTw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSTLKP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/x8ymqYbZyyOnHuwSdNpiTw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSTLKP0TraHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVhci5jb20vZC9iZXN0X2hlYXJpbmdfYWlkc19hZmYwMS8_~~)

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

"I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." **Billy H.**

clean_body: We asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. Our warehouse is overloaded with food kits... and YOU WIN! With all the worries about food shortages, power outages, and natural disasters, it's no wonder our insanely popular 4Patriots 3-Month Survival Food Kits have sold out over and over again! So, we asked our warehouse manager, Matt, to make all the 3-Month Survival Food Kits possible. And holy cow, did he deliver! However, an enormous batch has arrived at our warehouse, all at once, and now we are swamped with inventory. Our pain is your gain. Yup, we're practically bribing you to take 'em off our hands. When you , you'll be helping a family-owned American business save some severe warehousing costs. And we'll gladly pass those savings on to you along with a boatload of FREE GOODIES! 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value. This is not ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are. These Survival Food Kits now contain more delicious food than ever before. More Raving Customer Reviews! Rory H. "I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things." Billy H. "Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup." Kevin S. "The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start." Carol B. "I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings." Ken K. "I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal." Justin A. "My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great." Gary M. "I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed." John H. "We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when"." Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: 2025 is a critical year
body:
Our nation is at a crossroads.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1bb57dd4f32b4d3fae11cbd2a93793b3&_e=6RS8WaAJcZJyTzjYqfPecAl9kR5ahCR1E3nNiRq_0Iq1REoLmlA5wT_BNMEOj25dnjAxOWla6hfqtvmr5LjgaYS3D932fzCiE417hs-UpU82dAPH24VpupriO6eIFnMcbifvCBAtLX3E0TpOe8suIBop7UrJg-pn7IvhXCm5FAfxJ-Ow-OWgESNCMM8ZBm4SBI-uZc2NTtSRhmwD8xHgV5D_5q3xvndt8nEC2M1qQK3SOaHP5ZIuwj2vDos_vAeLWZO2_ZDJYM2ZzHMFdDCROMA-Z0t7CvCiZD5jLMHX2hPTe9XUJDLRX1V9SEVzEqFxt9GfOE1yfg4axja9bNxj9LMQLkIrY72X2jWQTOyBhLuFjrtN6XaashnEsYLfWWZO)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government.

It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations.

As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that.

To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education** in 2025.

[Will you partner with us in defending the cause of liberty and free government nationwide through education with your year-end support and make a generous gift to Hillsdale College today?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1bb57dd4f32b4d3fae11cbd2a93793b3&_e=6RS8WaAJcZJyTzjYqfPecAl9kR5ahCR1E3nNiRq_0Iq1REoLmlA5wT_BNMEOj25dnjAxOWla6hfqtvmr5LjgaYS3D932fzCiE417hs-UpU82dAPH24VpupriO6eIFnMcbifvCBAtLX3E0TpOe8suIBop7UrJg-pn7IvhXCm5FAfxJ-Ow-OWgESNCMM8ZBm4SBI-uZc2NTtSRhmwD8xHgV5D_5q3xvndt8nEC2M1qQK2Af6oIEHLDkyqR434uN4l39NBBrvHnG7nxhGK_iSu_MQp4IUlDT8JHHC3zCkwA9YFrALrmI7fTg77KsFhG9DYVwT4PnvpDCciNT-zppsG8WMy60BTFNzlLEHHyuRqwUR3yjA4PR5IyOjyw1M0PjqrQ)

What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude.

Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities.

Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations.

But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. [That's why we're asking for your year-end support to continue and expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1bb57dd4f32b4d3fae11cbd2a93793b3&_e=6RS8WaAJcZJyTzjYqfPecAl9kR5ahCR1E3nNiRq_0Iq1REoLmlA5wT_BNMEOj25dnjAxOWla6hfqtvmr5LjgaYS3D932fzCiE417hs-UpU82dAPH24VpupriO6eIFnMcbifvCBAtLX3E0TpOe8suIBop7UrJg-pn7IvhXCm5FAfxJ-Ow-OWgESNCMM8ZBm4SBI-uZc2NTtSRhmwD8xHgV5D_5q3xvndt8nEC2M1qQK3DQRmCQCSmUytHTCVQ9ePoX83mKFXz2ntnvDGVdMdui4CeoyQnqI1gFsIdCz2hv48o46iSxs3tvZMOskTKbvab1YHKw3LFY5xga01dsHlEo_6Yvv-P2St7QhfGVr_hAqlXqcw4NYxlR9ZDiIE0pY6S)

**We must do all that we possibly can.**

With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation.

You will help us to ...

* **Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our monthly digest of liberty.** With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of _Imprimis_ to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025.
* **Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses.** Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025.
* **Restore excellence to American K-12 education.** Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile.

**With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country!**

Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts** --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept **one penny** of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range.

We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye2024](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1bb57dd4f32b4d3fae11cbd2a93793b3&_e=6RS8WaAJcZJyTzjYqfPecAl9kR5ahCR1E3nNiRq_0Iq1REoLmlA5wT_BNMEOj25dnjAxOWla6hfqtvmr5LjgaYS3D932fzCiE417hs-UpU82dAPH24VpupriO6eIFnMcbifvCBAtLX3E0TpOe8suIBop7UrJg-pn7IvhXCm5FAfxJ-Ow-OWgESNCMM8ZBm4SBI-uZc2NTtSRhmwD8xHgV5D_5q3xvndt8nEC2M1qQK3hnB8Aycq1mrxMyMq5WbB5aKuRVzlZJs4Hq2hIRXxHoU54eT2QJUKQHh_mtYxeY8J_-oavvnZIPD4-TfrRPiHL-DMPuKrTzm4KMvawvDnfACBzej8g9a9Cid5P1Q4DImp7KGMp-gV_W54mUXAW1oJN)**

It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years.

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the **December 31** deadline.

Every dollar you give will get us closer to our **$6,000,000** online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**.

Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: Our nation is at a crossroads. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Friend, Our nation is at a crossroads. Patriotic Americans have an opportunity in 2025 to take fundamental steps in the direction of reviving and preserving liberty and free government. It is imperative to make the most of this opportunity in order to pass on the blessings of the American way of life to future generations. As you may know, Hillsdale College is the only educational institution in the country that is in a strong position to reach and teach millions of Americans about America's founding principles and its great heritage of liberty. And we are expanding our efforts to do just that. To press forward with our educational mission on behalf of liberty during a critical time for America, we have set an ambitious goal to raise $6,000,000 online by December 31 to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education in 2025. What all of us do today will have significant consequences for the survival of the American way of life. We have the opportunity to make 2025 a year that future American patriots will look back on with gratitude. Make no mistake. Powerful forces who seek to undermine our way of life--not only socialist politicians but also the legacy media, the entertainment industry, and Big Tech--will be working tirelessly to undermine liberty and free government, including in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. Indeed, successfully engaging the Left on the battleground of American education is of fundamental importance if we are to revive and preserve liberty for future generations. But success will require the faithful and generous support of patriotic Americans like you--citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty in a free republic. We must do all that we possibly can. With the help of friends like you, who support Hillsdale's educational mission, we are determined to redouble our efforts at this critical time for our nation. You will help us to ... Reach an additional 600,000 American households and businesses with Imprimis , our monthly digest of liberty. With your support, we plan to increase the circulation of Imprimis to more than 7 million households and businesses in 2025. Teach citizens nationwide, especially younger Americans, through our FREE online courses. Your donation will help us to create new online courses and add 900,000 new students in 2025. Restore excellence to American K-12 education. Your faithful generosity will help us to launch and guide increasing numbers of classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Reading and watching the news reminds us every day that our work is far from finished. America remains deeply divided. The gains we've made on behalf of liberty in recent years are fragile. With your help, we will succeed --because we must succeed for our country! Hillsdale College conducts its educational outreach efforts --as it does all its work--while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. To meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between $25 and $100. Most of our supporters' contributions are in this range. We will also need a significant number of $500 to $1,000 donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated. Since we have less than a month remaining to fund this project for 2025, we urgently need your help. You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: It is not an exaggeration to say that the future of American liberty and the American way of life depends on the efforts of patriotic Americans over the next few years. That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift to Hillsdale College before the December 31 deadline. Every dollar you give will get us closer to our $6,000,000 online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our Project to Revive and Preserve Liberty through Education**. Please partner with Hillsdale College to make 2025 a significant turning point in the revival and preservation of the American way of life. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Steve Daines
subject: Say goodbye to 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We must capitalize on our opportunity to rebuild America and bring our country into a prosperous future.

Friend,

As 2024 comes to a close, we have a lot to be grateful for this year. President Trump will be President of the United States again, and we regained the Senate majority!

_**[But now we must look to 2025.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d39a9c21ce8741cb834551f5240244dc&_e=0uApZpcWf7ZRfCmBMuzmbwnPh-TkGgwlPB5A_NBvwnzkvTtrzYVHiEW-k99OA1LOclGPBl-TDjNSMHZqfRnhhg6r-sC53sU-QkLo1JHeWoCRfNFJyc9SmQFQFcnba_tdpoXVkbf4ESczSznyccXctfnQXOpnba4XRpGF5QlADTEcWoef0q3Ph1m0vDd7wDi9h4iXWFH7yVwLHoLPQAw8ke9N-kzjP_03OB6Ltvr4DHL2tAkbaEBPzLbW7ATj37K5A4hncnQfRQWYUKyWmT3-X92W2QK186JJSG5SUqmsKbaHBIZ3JTvzUYDHiCglgFSlf3jmB64sMKBRBHmfVYMYwSf2FXZNzK3NkB5e_xYRCMeB9CCl-KNfEGKHwOXaa6AbBt2PrgBSKSJC-fmZdBvf10Dey0QuRNAFk-h0YwzCoHkV0BJlKuefU3jJqC2SrFznk-bK85pAhfCoumK0bK6-nkQXhSlZZJT_CVze3aPqLbQ%3D)** We will still be focused on supporting Senate Republicans as they fight with President Trump to Make America Great Again. _

We can't lose this majority we worked so hard to build after just two years. **[Otherwise, President Trump would be a"lame duck" president, and we would waste years of opportunities because our leaders would not have the political muscle they need.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d39a9c21ce8741cb834551f5240244dc&_e=0uApZpcWf7ZRfCmBMuzmbwnPh-TkGgwlPB5A_NBvwnzkvTtrzYVHiEW-k99OA1LOclGPBl-TDjNSMHZqfRnhhg6r-sC53sU-QkLo1JHeWoCRfNFJyc9SmQFQFcnba_tdpoXVkbf4ESczSznyccXctfnQXOpnba4XRpGF5QlADTEcWoef0q3Ph1m0vDd7wDi9h4iXWFH7yVwLHoLPQAw8ke9N-kzjP_03OB6Ltvr4DHL2tAkbaEBPzLbW7ATj37K5A4hncnQfRQWYUKyWmT3-X92W2QK186JJSG5SUqmsKbaHBIZ3JTvzUYDHiCglgFSleTM893UtkffDuTZ6FtGfAoqrKSvtZ4Jxxe5WbdCL0JNlHc3qmlhAq-Px8qIyASvWogrciqVFUjqkavEea3hBaH_mHjahGx-7E3DD0jkRZtxQL3VKSqfd4tIXvBO-vWrT6ffC2X4pE54MjuwVuHZUSc623dgBIlIR4yLhg1FMMkI%3D)**

In 2024, many of our candidates entered their races facing 2, 3, 4, or even 5 to 1 financial deficits they were never able to close. **[Unfortunately, Friend, this cost Republicans multiple winnable seats in the U.S. Senate.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d39a9c21ce8741cb834551f5240244dc&_e=0uApZpcWf7ZRfCmBMuzmbwnPh-TkGgwlPB5A_NBvwnzkvTtrzYVHiEW-k99OA1LOclGPBl-TDjNSMHZqfRnhhg6r-sC53sU-QkLo1JHeWoCRfNFJyc9SmQFQFcnba_tdpoXVkbf4ESczSznyccXctfnQXOpnba4XRpGF5QlADTEcWoef0q3Ph1m0vDd7wDi9h4iXWFH7yVwLHoLPQAw8ke9N-kzjP_03OB6Ltvr4DHL2tAkbaEBPzLbW7ATj37K5A4hncnQfRQWYUKyWmT3-X92W2QK186JJSG5SUqmsKbaHBIZ3JTvzUYDHiCglgFSlAaCrp1GV0B6Sdj19mj8awIMhbfesO1YNqh_R1QwPiJN3MwAS4FYveSzDiFWu4oAGzU-huFuAkhpV8Gt8cEqQjgUr7sHSo6SWYXyp6lcTdNsCEWDnu96oebJ08dVqlKCSwhsusnH5imXOwBltvLVHnVwzEGb916dk8OcD9Tidmws%3D)**

**[Friend, would you please consider making a generous year-end contribution to support our Incumbent Republican candidates and GOP nominees fighting to secure critical seats we need to HOLD our Senate majority?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d39a9c21ce8741cb834551f5240244dc&_e=0uApZpcWf7ZRfCmBMuzmbwnPh-TkGgwlPB5A_NBvwnzkvTtrzYVHiEW-k99OA1LOclGPBl-TDjNSMHZqfRnhhg6r-sC53sU-QkLo1JHeWoCRfNFJyc9SmQFQFcnba_tdpoXVkbf4ESczSznyccXctfnQXOpnba4XRpGF5QlADTEcWoef0q3Ph1m0vDd7wDi9h4iXWFH7yVwLHoLPQAw8ke9N-kzjP_03OB6Ltvr4DHL2tAkbaEBPzLbW7ATj37K5A4hncnQfRQWYUKyWmT3-X92W2QK186JJSG5SUqmsKbaHBIZ3JTvzUYDHiCglgFSl7NKMivCxJ03OfRXxovKE98wym-o4bRYjqd2BgEOQ80Z0g-eT56tDGWJegIwZlWJN4qcusTzoKKBsJYnm8AxnSZe89P6g1oHrDBygvMAvOwytspyAZfUbTtOvsc2NI-9CS6wzmgVOrbx2OIg8mf0TzTjUXOutd0KEyHmWEpzXSpI%3D)**

******************************************************[CHIP IN BEFORE DECEMBER 31st>>](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d39a9c21ce8741cb834551f5240244dc&_e=0uApZpcWf7ZRfCmBMuzmbwnPh-TkGgwlPB5A_NBvwnzkvTtrzYVHiEW-k99OA1LOclGPBl-TDjNSMHZqfRnhhg6r-sC53sU-QkLo1JHeWoCRfNFJyc9SmQFQFcnba_tdpoXVkbf4ESczSznyccXctfnQXOpnba4XRpGF5QlADTEcWoef0q3Ph1m0vDd7wDi9h4iXWFH7yVwLHoLPQAw8ke9N-kzjP_03OB6Ltvr4DHL2tAkbaEBPzLbW7ATj37K5A4hncnQfRQWYUKyWmT3-X92W2QK186JJSG5SUqmsKbaHBIZ3JTvzUYDHiCglgFSlAbHBPVU7okodMxkUuGlThEY5pZ4omfgp2cCbUhTx53hQv-T0H5bERZmK_N6lsJdD6YMjO2xfBjtmiVIov642Biudd__0FQMsZq9FB5KBUOZLazwyxenFY6b1TX5Su2O9uIskCw8afpvOc9e2bOsb9FDI7zexDlbQkdCZe0IfQ18%3D)******************************************************

We want our Republican incumbents and candidates to start on a solid financial footing in these can't-lose races. The Democrats have corrupt billionaires on their side and the lamestream media marketing their ideas free of charge.

We know money can be tight around the Christmas season, but we must help our candidates build war chests now so they are not stuck trying to fill a financial gap when they should be focused on winning.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5xetLk66LiRmwtJ8hLblAQ~~/AARclAA~) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5xetLk66LiRmwtJ8hLblAQ~~/AARclAA~) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5xetLk66LiRmwtJ8hLblAQ~~/AARclAA~) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5xetLk66LiRmwtJ8hLblAQ~~/AARclAA~) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Conservative Broadcast
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wLeADzd3wRHbUVU3P6JNcA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpST0QP0RwaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQuY29uc2VydmF0aXZlYnJvYWRjYXN0LmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1Db25zZXJ2YXRpdmUtQnJvYWRjYXN0LU9mZmVycyZlPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclMjU0MGdtYWlsLmNvbVcDc3BjQgpnZU2kZmezOmOWUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/6LWvnj9smYRNBB7_r7tShQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpST0QP0QuaHR0cHM6Ly9jb25zZXJ2YXRpdmVicm9hZGNhc3QubmV0L3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnZU2kZmezOmOWUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

## Roberson Misses House Hearing
Death row inmate Robert Roberson [did not testify](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j71uwyAUhZ8GNqzLDQY8MHTxlq4dLQLXCRIxEaDYefsq6dzpnOH86Ps5L2efctqu3_5Orh9rWRBQCYkC5RJ9yq9F8eguECfJyUlzUsaC0RO_uXG9jF6rCGMAFUZCqcmTnKJWxk7W8uTeYxJRSnkCZQcCq6OdwGsDKkBgCiimXurQb9Tp8G3Nr_KkOoRy59nden80dvpiODOc930f1nKojfb2DjCc35bh_KmKWi5U-5-0songG4mHP3rZxFpT9C9eXXzsKefUtGEKrnef8uer_wv_dPgbAAD__9gdXVM) at a Texas House committee hearing Friday as expected, following Attorney Gen. Ken Paxton’s motion to block Roberson’s testimony. Roberson was set to testify regarding Texas’ [“junk science” law](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb8GOqOZsYNN4eI1dHntlsjgIVhrILK9Ifn7Fdltt5ojjXTu1f24DlcXYthu_93KtjznfSAgJZAE4eBdiK9B1d6O4Dus2aKWShvQbVcv9uKkRDez0uzRcNtK1V1GwBlIgpZYB3vKkAgRJSjTMJjWmw5cq0FNMFUK2Ieyp6YsXPjp8hxf-4NTM-1rHe1Syj1X8l9FfUX9cRzNNk4bH_n8V9SfWFH_lcUvHSFGkfaRU_k5ed9E4VzC_BLvABHdsbpPTlks7FLYbiJNm0OjzIXqZP39dITc6krBbXUhvruUP8d5WPoOAAD___JVZ-U) related to the 2002 shaken-baby syndrome murder conviction of his daughter, but instead Josh Burns, a man falsely accused of shaking a child in 2015, spoke on Roberson’s behalf. Paxton claimed he acted to prevent “a procedurally deficient and [overly burdensome subpoena](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtqxDAQRb9G7mQ0kvCjUBEI7jakS2lkz2gtIltGGvbx92GTOtUtLhwO5-syX3xM8bh--J0cP0KetdJWgpYaZvQxPWfboFsUjtCQg97YflB9NzabG0PwC6IGg13olLIGCIy3lkIIYLGJ7gUDrQHAKDu0pIYOh1H5rld2VauwijByLi1vxPTwNaRnvlFp17w3yW3MZxXmTehJ6Mkv60H32l7z6xZ6-swpclyr0BOS502WfJfx2D2TLHmhwn9T8yHpcdLKhLKe5L9lZc8k9FQ5l6cwU0Rh3gG6UVlrxqY4PO8xpVi7Xlh13X1Mv078b6Sb0z8BAAD___kOajg)” from allowing Roberson to testify. Roberson’s subpoena to appear before the committee halted his originally-scheduled execution on October 17, hours before it was carried out.
## Tesla Recalls Almost 700,000 Vehicles
Austin-based automaker Tesla has recalled nearly 700,000 of its electric vehicles due to an issue with tire pressure warning lights. The recall [affects Tesla's Cybertruck](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQBp8Gd7ZgTVhcUPwNXf72SovAOkGHQwQkjt_-5Fx91U4xWo2-r_N8djHF-_W_W8m095Jn4CB7AT2IObiY9ll2wVx4mERHRuAoUXNUU3czl-BEGBccT3haxKRP3hHqAKhwUhhUF83xTAAIIUYu9UBcq6An7hRy6blnklOILZeh3ajR29Ul7flFZfB57ZK5tfaobPzHwDKw27YNz-paDm4_BAa2tlx2BnbNdzqud6UysIW8S-mgI4CBFfBhBrZRTa7_Ffo1B0r92O-93y9UWnn6bwYWUXABk-YcGdiumPDYYkqxKmSSX1cX0yew_bnYy8BPAAAA__9WlGov), Model 3, and Model Y vehicles. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) said the warning light “ _may not remain illuminated between drive cycles,[failing to warn the driver](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGO6jAQheGnsbugmYmTOIWL26TjtltGxh7ISAOOHIuFt1-x_bbnSF_xf53XcxSVx-1_vHNor2tZCch1SB3hmqPoe3U2hwvkGS0HnHo3eZjG2W6BZ7j4BDQPxNc84yV6GNPU4-BTxuyshA-GRIjYg_MnBj9mP0McJ3AJknHAWVqpp7Zx41c8rvouT66nVO5Ww9bafpj-n6HF0NI23kT18xla9qKS3p-5xsexl9pik_IwtAwwYI9D1_jQ2FVOUbV78iZJ-eiaVDa02Bry_i2qcoyTcXC7R_mlbfuzwzPQTwAAAP__kt5fnQ) of low tire pressure._” This is latest in a [series of recalls](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvgzAQhX8NbEZ3h2PD4KFLtnTtiIw5B6sORLaLk39f0b1ve9LT-6Tv6zbdbIhhu3_aB5vy8vtEQFIgCcJpsSG-J9kuZoZlxJYN6l7qAbQa29XM1lI_O_LKoVeXuUctB_KXkZXGEbkN5jxDIkTsQQ4dw6CWYQSrNEgHrpHASyh76srKhV82-_jeD06d2x9tNGspz9z0Hw1dG7rWWruNa67M3-egoWvhHK1I7GyMWWg4Iw5eg4ucRQmJxTNxzj-JRbVpC9tdeBvi2QlAIg5tMsuzhhhDVrqRcH_YEP_45V8hh6HfAAAA__82_GLh) since 2023 for Tesla, with several already aimed at its highly-anticipated Cybertruck.
## Texas, SMU in CFP First Round Today
The Texas Longhorns and SMU Mustangs play in the opening round of the inaugural 12-team College Football Playoff today, as [SMU takes on Penn State](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAURL8Gd9cCTAAXFK9xl9duaWG4TtBiQIbE8d-vknKlrWc0mnO-rvPVhhjS7b_d0LTXmmdOuQDGgbPZ2xDPWXTeLNSPrEPD1CCUpkqO3d1ohkpdhLZ6ZSPzTmil5aCWUQzy4qXognmPMc4ZYwMVukeqpdcjtVJR4agjgqIPLe99u2PDl61rPPMT997lrYvm3lqpZPhH-ET4dBxH75ZaS95bfTcIn1yOEW8Ia85tsTESPiU8KuHTh-N3DCXaM68rZO8rlB19cC3kBDEkhIIpQW22ITwr1O0BJbjvCssJ-Cq4N8gJ2AgS9kcifOp248sRYgxVKiLobbMhfq63P10-Df8JAAD__5ADeAY) on the road at 11:00 a.m. CT and [Texas hosts Clemson](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGK8zAQhJ9G7mx214okFyr-RvAXufZKI1trR7COQizi5O2PhGuvGxhmPvi-z-M5ZsnX9Stu7OtzKSMB6RapJRxTzPIadZP8BGnAhj3aXlsH1gzNxc9WO7RmcL1NJk6nIfJywtOiNU1Arm-yf58hESL2oF3H4ExyA0RjQc8wKw2cci33rl648jPui7zKg-_dXLZG_KXW2676f4qConAcR8f77fouFYW5iPDK7VJKnaKIorDGjRWF8Tf-T4qCBjTWojXvifC2l2v7QTV3n25HFsm7sUrDusUsH3D908TD008AAAD__1OkXiY) at 3:00 p.m. CT. Both teams seek to rebound from losses in their respective conference championship games two weeks ago, with a quarterfinal berth on the line. With a win, Texas would advance to the Peach Bowl to play Arizona State, and SMU would face Boise State in the Fiesta Bowl. ([See Bracket](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOrCAUgOGngU4DBwawoLiN3dx2S8PAQckeB6NkHN9-M9tv_Sdf8n_dp3soVJ7z_7Cib-9cJxCgOwkdyCmFQtekefIPkQbJ0UurtHXCmoEvXlqtYsKbG6TQOSnM6gYGUnQqBSNvvPgPJgGklEpo16NwJrlBBGOFjiIyLTCVVve-LdjwHY5MV33h3se6cvJLa9vB1D8GI4PxPM8ej-35iQzGWIlwxi7X2h6BiMG4Ubhqzt1jD_EbG9992s5CVA5jmRbzGgr90u3P15eHnwAAAP__iv1WpQ)) Star Longhorn wide receiver [Isaiah Bond is not expected](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL_O4yAQxJ_G7rBgwf8Kimvc5dorLTBrey8YIiBx8vafnP5rVqvRaH6j-Xebb4Y8he2vOVCX9xpn4KCYAAZidob8Z1a105a7UdSoRS9VP_C-G-tdK8kHJ9pVrdINC3RonbUGlZPjsPRdW5O-wgSAEEJyNTTIh84NIzddz9XCl0pxdFRiasqOBd8mr_4TX5iaJR6113spj1zJPxVMFUzneTb2mUKJyYQNgykUw-WsYLpAFUwCrjNegpLQtvJ6KRsyO7MxOPaFMB_DtscUMqPw_5k-LOEjpsLu6F8UmDXhntni8cgxsEIbplwn7R4neU-56yvFt8OQ_9Ysv-720vATAAD__yMucGc) to play today, but Texas remains a 12-point favorite over Clemson, while SMU is an 8.5-point underdog in their matchup.

Ken Paxton’s motion to block Roberson’s testimony. Roberson was set to testify regarding Texas’ related to the 2002 shaken-baby syndrome murder conviction of his daughter, but instead Josh Burns, a man falsely accused of shaking a child in 2015, spoke on Roberson’s behalf. Paxton claimed he acted to prevent “a procedurally deficient and ” from allowing Roberson to testify. Roberson’s subpoena to appear before the committee halted his originally-scheduled execution on October 17, hours before it was carried out. Tesla Recalls Almost 700,000 Vehicles Austin-based automaker Tesla has recalled nearly 700,000 of its electric vehicles due to an issue with tire pressure warning lights. The recall , Model 3, and Model Y vehicles. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) said the warning light “ may not remain illuminated between drive cycles, of low tire pressure.” This is latest in a since 2023 for Tesla, with several already aimed at its highly-anticipated Cybertruck. Texas, SMU in CFP First Round Today The Texas Longhorns and SMU Mustangs play in the opening round of the inaugural 12-team College Football Playoff today, as on the road at 11:00 a.m. CT and at 3:00 p.m. CT. Both teams seek to rebound from losses in their respective conference championship games two weeks ago, with a quarterfinal berth on the line. With a win, Texas would advance to the Peach Bowl to play Arizona State, and SMU would face Boise State in the Fiesta Bowl. () Star Longhorn wide receiver to play today, but Texas remains a 12-point favorite over Clemson, while SMU is an 8.5-point underdog in their matchup. subject: House Passes Spending Bill, College Football Playoff, and an Armored Catfish
body:
The House approved a short-term spending bill last night by [a vote of 366-34](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOgzAQBNCvsTsQuzYYChfX0OXaK9EGL-CTwQg74fL3J9KnG2mkN5qf23AjH_w2f9PKNk9xwAp1AVggDI58eA1aOjsxIyvJFozSpq2MaeViazAdO11j1RjipgZWY3enxoAZqVWj9PbSABEAFNaqBCBsWd-RmnakjoSu2Pkcj_I3-i0vPIVXfPJRjnGVwS4570moL4G9wP48z5L-fExXK7C_bIE94DsL7Jf4SFzslBKnYr6cbeUtF2l5ZBfPTR7W7acPwafGCF3NK_nwnsqfrj8t_gcAAP__-iNaDg), averting a government shutdown and sending the bill to the Senate for consideration.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1891, James Naismith organized [the first basketball game](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFugzAQxvGnMZsRPjs2DB66sKVrR3TAJb7U2BG2gnj7KlXXzj_p-6T_13W6IkdO90_cyNdbnqADIxVIUNOKHM_JNKu_EQHphrxy2ri-c65vgh_sYrW1oAZn3OCon_Ey91YrXGe1dNCwf68pAKWUhotulULoycyAtl9wQGE6WrnmvX1kTjXQLZ75RXu75K2JPtT6LEJ_CBgFjMdxtIFLzfv5dgFjDVzkiqfkJP9EwDhj-aY6Y4yS04tS5ZzkAzcqMiGXjWtodr8-D46Ri3XCdPcNOf6e1v8ivDz8BAAA__-HZWAn) in Springfield, Massachusetts. Two teams, each with nine players, tried to throw a soccer ball into a peach basket 10 feet above the floor. Naismith later became the first basketball coach at the University of Kansas. In today’s edition, we highlight a lesser-known tradition called [_Christmukkah_](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPtCAYhH8Ndhp4QcCC4mvo9muvNK-CC7coG2HX-O8vbq69aqZ4MjOZr9t4w5jidv-Pqzd1ySNQEC2DFtjoMKZzFI0zi_fgeeMNU1woTZXSTTCTkhMV88DVRB1K3c89IKW9QOeklksTzZXGABhjHHreMYagvZgApZ5xQCKod7HmvfvOcavBL-nMb793c16bZEKtz0L4PwKWgD2Oo3sVrNnheQEEbKl5PwnYzR_lEqwxbwTsVUvAMvh4AnYOeyx1xdIG3F6PB4b2l1GKDmIQQKkiYJvduOcRU4pFKiLofcWYPmvqX--8DfwEAAD__7kqYpI), a unique combination of Christmas and Hanukkah. This phenomenon occurs when Hanukkah and Christmas overlap. You can find all the details below. Today's edition is brought to you by Empower Health Labs. Homeopathic Doctor: Does this "tea" [turn OFF annoying tinnitus?](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kMtKxDAYRp8m2U1p_qS5LLJQpIIwBVeKm5Kmf6fR9EIbG-btpeLW_eF8H-ft2l5diGG-NW5Cm4alhRLEhcEFWNu7EO-toL0dEAE5RcsUF0qXSmk6Wj6AF4pLlEqaofK-q0qN0lQC0LDO0GBPGwNgjHGoeMGYA42iAye1d8YRUWIf0rIVn0uY04hDvC8HboVfJhrtmNK6E_5AoCZQ55yL9dC-r9L2dRIEanhvXj-MJFA_g3p8aU6S1_t3Jwh_SvlP5yO6LYV5Pq-AoJvt1xxiDLtURJS3yYX4O5n-S3BY-AkAAP__c6pbJw)

## House Avoids Government Shutdown
The House approved a short-term spending bill last night by [a vote of 366-34](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GOgzAQBNCvsTsQuzYYChfX0OXaK9EGL-CTwQg74fL3J9KnG2mkN5qf23AjH_w2f9PKNk9xwAp1AVggDI58eA1aOjsxIyvJFozSpq2MaeViazAdO11j1RjipgZWY3enxoAZqVWj9PbSABEAFNaqBCBsWd-RmnakjoSu2Pkcj_I3-i0vPIVXfPJRjnGVwS4570moL4G9wP48z5L-fExXK7C_bIE94DsL7Jf4SFzslBKnYr6cbeUtF2l5ZBfPTR7W7acPwafGCF3NK_nwnsqfrj8t_gcAAP__-iNaDg), averting a government shutdown and sending the bill to the Senate for consideration. The new bill is 118 pages long, significantly shorter than the original proposal, which was 1,500 pages. [It will fund](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOszAQhJ8GOiN7cYAULv6GLn97JdrYa9iTsZHtBOXtT1x_3UgjzXz6vh7LAzlwXP_jTqb6tIAELRQIUItDDp9Ft854IqC-JaPGXo-THMep3Yy-a-29tDePIMmTl8_BKe_BaQRnbcvmWlMASqkebn2nFMJE-gk4TBbv2GhJjmvK3XfiWDfy4ZPelDub9jaYrdajNP2_BuYG5vM8u_i0kc5y9Q3MRwpc2ZYGZpvimqlc8RUt5Yoc60dk4jUWYfHgmoLYOASxXg9xp1hF2V7VpTMKR-gCRxI1v_ZDZBtRTTcphzYbd5wcApdhbLRcd-Twi1f_0vU28BMAAP__vMJxAw) the government through March and provide $100 billion for disaster aid and $10 billion in agricultural assistance for farmers. It was the chamber’s third attempt at a spending bill before Friday’s deadline, and [didn’t include provisions](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j7GO6yAQRb8GOiLPgINTULzGXV67pUVgsFlhsAyxlb9fefutr-45Ol_P6Wljinn-b1cyLZQJO1QCUCBM3sb0mRT3JhAhSU4GtFR66LQe-GJ6CL1XrpcBX6iwC_AYnPY9KO21cg8ezUUDRACQ2MsbgMWB1AvtfXD2YZnqyMdW9tt3ibktFNKnHLTfXFl5MktrW2XyH8OR4Wi3TGe9JoZjigcxHF3J8061itfbz9TEfL3zSrmJurybL2cWbX-vG9-N386YUqx3zVQ3rzamX037K_sw-BMAAP__aVRbMA) to raise the debt ceiling, which President-elect Donald Trump supported. The Senate was still considering the bill after midnight.
## German Christmas Market Attacked
A car crashed into a crowded outdoor Christmas market in Magdeburg, Germany, on Friday, [killing at least two people](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu8yAURp_GbERwwQYPDP-SLf_a0brAxaYFO8I0Ud6-SveOnz7p6Oh83JYb5pL39T9Wcj0dCwjQXAIHuUTM5bVoFl0iAlKMnDRKGyuMsWxzYJMEo3QY5yl5NYaoMSW03hqUHhXL7k2TAFJKBaO6SIlgSXvAyQaccdCCYu5Hu3weee8bpfI6HtQu4aisuK33-zmofwNcB7jifafn-b7eo_UcCg1wXalV3F-84hrJf7eVh63ls1c8ecX2RZ1PHnxISozk5zSJZKMBo2Y9R-9RB8uai_dnLiWfkxm0WCvm8uvQ_2rycPATAAD__2jYY2U) and injuring at least 68 in what authorities suspect to be a targeted attack. Security cameras captured [a vehicle speeding through](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LHOozAQBOCnMd1GeHECFC6uocu1V6INLODE2Ja9B8rb_0r6vxtppE-j-Xcf7-S8C-tf2tnKEkes0YBGQD3O5Px7NNVsF2bkpmKr28a0Xd22XbXZZekNE5kJ276va6RG47WfzaNDut7apnL2o2lErXWD1-aiNWHH5oF06ybqSZmaZycxX57RBdl48e94cL5Mca-83URSUc0fhYPCIbxTLPKpFA4fWOGg8ZsVDmfMfobAZ1E4TJQh-XgWcEEiJI7JM5DAynmnANOWXZGdCuyUXyzgmQ4XVih8cCYPLjz_Z57BBaCUKHMQIBGaXgqHKts5nc57V26tMvW6k_PfyfLbhYfFnwAAAP__edh0KA) a large group of shoppers, striking several as others scrambled to safety. The driver was arrested in what authorities described as a “terror attack.” Authorities have closed [the Christmas market](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00DFvhSAUBeBfgxtGLig4MHRxe107mitclRbwBckz7983du92ki85Jzlfj_mBIYa8fWIiW9djhg4UF8BBzB5DfM-q8XYlApINWaGl0qbT2jS7JS063btRjr0ZvR-MWJxzq1zQ0KJW0wR7twkAIYSEXrZCIBhSC-BgHI7IVEc-1KO030fIdac1vo8XldYdqYl2r_V5MvnBYGIwXdfV5sVlus7bGUx3vOEo0TOYHBZeMKWQN-72Es6a8OQJyw9VvlFJmN-8uIzC9N0wNMX65xViDOegmeq2hCH-Ldf_nnhZ-A0AAP__4ZVhXg) and established a hotline for victims and relatives. Friday's attack [has been compared](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOqzAQRb_GdEbM2IlJ4eI1dHntlmiwB3DWhsh2gvL3K7bf7kpXOkc6X_fxTiGGbflPiW2d9xE71BJQIoyeQvyMuvF2ZkZWDVswSpu-M6ZvVkuG5slpAriYG0LvmTs3O8Xq2rHy2AR70gARABReVAtA2LOekK69oxsJ3bEPdc_tYw9bXXmOn_3NuXV7aqJda30Wof4JHAQOx3G0biobH-X8BQ7nFDi4NYdSExWZKH9zlQvnRNtHOsrSM3kZtscrs5eJFs_TKy8ChyZb_zxCjKFcjdDdkijEX3H9K8Tb4k8AAAD__9SxYdo) to a similar tragedy that occurred at a Christmas market in Berlin in 2016, where an Islamic extremist used a truck to kill 13 people and injure dozens more.
## College Football Playoff Continues Today
The College Football Playoff's [first round continues today](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFyszAQhJ8GumPQIYxcqPgbOv9tSuYsnUCJQBpJNuO3zzh1Uu_O7jffx225kQ_-WP_Tzrq6uGCPEgQCisWSD69FtlY7ZuShZS2mQU6qnybVbnoa1OguSpEja5QblbxKckpcpeFhNKr1-r0mEIUQA45DJwShYnlHuihDV2pkz9bXmLvP6I-6sQuv-OTcmbi3QW-1ptIM_xqcG5zP8-zMvZQUcy3vRoOziSHwyuBirHcKocH54LP8kkAK9IrOQfLmq0AxG9tHYEiZrTfVx6MAreSPUqFuDCVlJgvR2gIuZnA-lwo5Pg4LK-38_miztun0IfhymRrZrzv58MNe_3L51PgdAAD__3mkexQ) with a tripleheader featuring No. 11 seed SMU at No. 6 seed Penn State, No. 5 seed Texas hosting No. 12 seed Clemson, and No. 8 seed Ohio State taking on No. 9 seed Tennessee at Ohio Stadium this evening.
