clean_body: The House approved a short-term spending bill last night by , averting a government shutdown and sending the bill to the Senate for consideration. | | | | | | Saturday, December 21, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1891, James Naismith organized in Springfield, Massachusetts. Two teams, each with nine players, tried to throw a soccer ball into a peach basket 10 feet above the floor. Naismith later became the first basketball coach at the University of Kansas. In today’s edition, we highlight a lesser-known tradition called , a unique combination of Christmas and Hanukkah. This phenomenon occurs when Hanukkah and Christmas overlap. You can find all the details below. Today's edition is brought to you by Empower Health Labs. Homeopathic Doctor: Does this "tea" | House Avoids Government Shutdown The House approved a short-term spending bill last night by , averting a government shutdown and sending the bill to the Senate for consideration. The new bill is 118 pages long, significantly shorter than the original proposal, which was 1,500 pages. the government through March and provide $100 billion for disaster aid and $10 billion in agricultural assistance for farmers. It was the chamber’s third attempt at a spending bill before Friday’s deadline, and to raise the debt ceiling, which President-elect Donald Trump supported. The Senate was still considering the bill after midnight. German Christmas Market Attacked A car crashed into a crowded outdoor Christmas market in Magdeburg, Germany, on Friday, and injuring at least 68 in what authorities suspect to be a targeted attack. Security cameras captured a large group of shoppers, striking several as others scrambled to safety. The driver was arrested in what authorities described as a “terror attack.” Authorities have closed and established a hotline for victims and relatives. Friday's attack to a similar tragedy that occurred at a Christmas market in Berlin in 2016, where an Islamic extremist used a truck to kill 13 people and injure dozens more. College Football Playoff Continues Today The College Football Playoff's with a tripleheader featuring No. 11 seed SMU at No. 6 seed Penn State, No. 5 seed Texas hosting No. 12 seed Clemson, and No. 8 seed Ohio State taking on No. 9 seed Tennessee at Ohio Stadium this evening. name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Referendum on Religious Liberty.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/H4cu2vVjp4z6sTXovpHWAQ~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Friend, You have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a **National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/H4cu2vVjp4z6sTXovpHWAQ~~/AARclAA~~~) The referendum will only take a few moments of your time. Before you complete it, I want to remind you of some things we've seen (and lived through) in recent years--which we never thought we'd see in our country...
* Government mandates forcing Christian churches to close while casinos, strip clubs, and drug dispensaries remained open.

* Far-Left activists targeting Christian business owners, Christian teachers, and Christian coaches through litigation.

* The weaponizing of the Department of Justice and the FBI against Christian pro-life advocates who are defined as believing in “extremist ideologies” and having the potential for “domestic terrorism.”

* Christians in the workplace being forced to hide their faith while critical race theory and transgenderism are promoted.

**That 's why I'm asking you to take the Hillsdale College National Referendum on Religious Liberty.** By completing this survey, you will help us more clearly understand the views of the American people on this critical issue. Your responses will help Hillsdale strengthen its nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--including religious liberty. Friend, you can complete the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** by using the secure link below: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/H4cu2vVjp4z6sTXovpHWAQ~~/AARclAA~~~) Like the founders of our nation, the founders of Hillsdale College understood the essential connection between faith and freedom. **The College was founded in 1844 to offer "sound learning" in order to preserve "the inestimable blessings...of civil and religious liberty."** Yet today's ruling class mocks people of faith as "backward," "bigots," and even "Christo-fascists." Politicians like Barack Obama claim that people like you "get bitter" and "cling to guns or religion." These so-called elites are full of contempt for you and for Christianity and will not protect your civil and religious liberties. You and I know that religious liberty in America is under serious threat. But we can reverse course. **The first step is ...EDUCATION.** Today's government policies that threaten religious liberty were conceived and implemented by people deceived by far-Left propaganda in our K-12 schools, colleges, and universities. That's why a vital part of this fight--in which Hillsdale College is a leader--is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens the TRUTH about America's great heritage of religious liberty. We are heavily invested in our educational outreach efforts through our **Project to Save Religious Liberty in America.** These efforts include:
* **Teaching nearly 1,600 undergraduate and graduate students** --on our campuses in Hillsdale, Michigan, and Washington, D.C.--who bring their traditional faith with them as they join the fight to restore liberty and constitutional government in our country.

* **Distributing _Imprimis_** , America's leading digest of liberty, which is mailed to more than 6.6 million homes and businesses ten times per year. Previous issues include "Inside the Transgender Empire" by Christopher F. Rufo, "The Most Important Decision in Life" by Bishop Robert Barron, and "The Politicization of the Department of Justice" by Harmeet K. Dhillon.

* **Producing and promoting free online courses** for any citizen who wishes to learn on topics such as Christianity, the Constitution, American history, and free market economics. Several courses (including "The Genesis Story: Reading Biblical Narratives," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity") consider the important connection between faith and liberty.

* **Providing a classical K-12 curriculum** with a solid grounding in American history, constitutional government, and economics to schools that educate thousands of students nationwide.

After everything we've seen in recent years, the need for Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts is undeniable. So please share your views by completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few moments of your time. Your completed survey will help us to develop the most effective strategy to **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. As you might know, Hillsdale College refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. **This independence frees the College from burdensome and corrupting government regulations. Thanks to our generous donors, we remain true to our original mission, even as many other colleges and universities reject religious liberty and embrace radical and dangerous ideologies.** I hope you will partner with Hillsdale College by making a generous tax-deductible gift today. You can easily do so after completing the **National Referendum on Religious Liberty** , which you can access at this secure link: [**https://info.hillsdale.edu/religious-liberty-survey**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/H4cu2vVjp4z6sTXovpHWAQ~~/AARclAA~~~) Thank you for your support of Hillsdale's educational outreach efforts on behalf of religious liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 |

| Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/5iTkI4r9SH-jvtA3JC7VhA~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSUDaP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmdl16dmZ7BbSaZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wCd_x4uK_sJ5kwYZFcFcdQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSUDaP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgpnZdenZmewW0mmUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

| [ ](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkUtr3TAQhX-NvPNFGtlysvDico03JaWUQJdipJFtEfmBHjX598Vp2l2hs_zOYR5nfrzoF_TBb_NXXF3_ZqOOSRvSC9l62stGtSnBaODQ1AJqEFpU1NOzVagq14tONt1TA6Ktlh6gMdgStS13bcfbyShHbacAjOyen3jl-6uPABBCNErwG3LZSSkJCVVnlWINx-Bivr05d9h9m6NLKbqjmOAtbje7r1Xol5yPxOSdwchgPM_ztjiMl8hgJAajcSnri_lt1ugpaZwmLi6_HNFmJof745VfpbhQ_P54ZaBKXnXaS7SOycG80ydaHfmyMjngNPngMbtPweJ6oJ83JoeStNs0hmuo_uvT5p0uUgc_L_nKsaa9mOD0sR9oM-p_bPFxb1pc1J6YHL7tx91mZKBSMb_Rl8d3qP-EWcWejtOH4JPqWMPnFX34yCr_50d_9vArAAD__wi1p5c)

| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkUtr3TAQhX-NvPNFGtlysvDico03JaWUQJdipJFtEfmBHjX598Vp2l2hs_zOYR5nfrzoF_TBb_NXXF3_ZqOOSRvSC9l62stGtSnBaODQ1AJqEFpU1NOzVagq14tONt1TA6Ktlh6gMdgStS13bcfbyShHbacAjOyen3jl-6uPABBCNErwG3LZSSkJCVVnlWINx-Bivr05d9h9m6NLKbqjmOAtbje7r1Xol5yPxOSdwchgPM_ztjiMl8hgJAajcSnri_lt1ugpaZwmLi6_HNFmJof745VfpbhQ_P54ZaBKXnXaS7SOycG80ydaHfmyMjngNPngMbtPweJ6oJ83JoeStNs0hmuo_uvT5p0uUgc_L_nKsaa9mOD0sR9oM-p_bPFxb1pc1J6YHL7tx91mZKBSMb_Rl8d3qP-EWcWejtOH4JPqWMPnFX34yCr_50d_9vArAAD__wi1p5c)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkUtr3TAQhX-NvPNFGtlysvDico03JaWUQJdipJFtEfmBHjX598Vp2l2hs_zOYR5nfrzoF_TBb_NXXF3_ZqOOSRvSC9l62stGtSnBaODQ1AJqEFpU1NOzVagq14tONt1TA6Ktlh6gMdgStS13bcfbyShHbacAjOyen3jl-6uPABBCNErwG3LZSSkJCVVnlWINx-Bivr05d9h9m6NLKbqjmOAtbje7r1Xol5yPxOSdwchgPM_ztjiMl8hgJAajcSnri_lt1ugpaZwmLi6_HNFmJof745VfpbhQ_P54ZaBKXnXaS7SOycG80ydaHfmyMjngNPngMbtPweJ6oJ83JoeStNs0hmuo_uvT5p0uUgc_L_nKsaa9mOD0sR9oM-p_bPFxb1pc1J6YHL7tx91mZKBSMb_Rl8d3qP-EWcWejtOH4JPqWMPnFX34yCr_50d_9vArAAD__wi1p5c) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkUtr3TAQhX-NvPNFGtlysvDico03JaWUQJdipJFtEfmBHjX598Vp2l2hs_zOYR5nfrzoF_TBb_NXXF3_ZqOOSRvSC9l62stGtSnBaODQ1AJqEFpU1NOzVagq14tONt1TA6Ktlh6gMdgStS13bcfbyShHbacAjOyen3jl-6uPABBCNErwG3LZSSkJCVVnlWINx-Bivr05d9h9m6NLKbqjmOAtbje7r1Xol5yPxOSdwchgPM_ztjiMl8hgJAajcSnri_lt1ugpaZwmLi6_HNFmJof745VfpbhQ_P54ZaBKXnXaS7SOycG80ydaHfmyMjngNPngMbtPweJ6oJ83JoeStNs0hmuo_uvT5p0uUgc_L_nKsaa9mOD0sR9oM-p_bPFxb1pc1J6YHL7tx91mZKBSMb_Rl8d3qP-EWcWejtOH4JPqWMPnFX34yCr_50d_9vArAAD__wi1p5c) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[ Check if you qualify ](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkUtr3TAQhX-NvPNFGtlysvDico03JaWUQJdipJFtEfmBHjX598Vp2l2hs_zOYR5nfrzoF_TBb_NXXF3_ZqOOSRvSC9l62stGtSnBaODQ1AJqEFpU1NOzVagq14tONt1TA6Ktlh6gMdgStS13bcfbyShHbacAjOyen3jl-6uPABBCNErwG3LZSSkJCVVnlWINx-Bivr05d9h9m6NLKbqjmOAtbje7r1Xol5yPxOSdwchgPM_ztjiMl8hgJAajcSnri_lt1ugpaZwmLi6_HNFmJof745VfpbhQ_P54ZaBKXnXaS7SOycG80ydaHfmyMjngNPngMbtPweJ6oJ83JoeStNs0hmuo_uvT5p0uUgc_L_nKsaa9mOD0sR9oM-p_bPFxb1pc1J6YHL7tx91mZKBSMb_Rl8d3qP-EWcWejtOH4JPqWMPnFX34yCr_50d_9vArAAD__wi1p5c)
[ ](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkUtr3TAQhX-NvPNFGtlysvDico03JaWUQJdipJFtEfmBHjX598Vp2l2hs_zOYR5nfrzoF_TBb_NXXF3_ZqOOSRvSC9l62stGtSnBaODQ1AJqEFpU1NOzVagq14tONt1TA6Ktlh6gMdgStS13bcfbyShHbacAjOyen3jl-6uPABBCNErwG3LZSSkJCVVnlWINx-Bivr05d9h9m6NLKbqjmOAtbje7r1Xol5yPxOSdwchgPM_ztjiMl8hgJAajcSnri_lt1ugpaZwmLi6_HNFmJof745VfpbhQ_P54ZaBKXnXaS7SOycG80ydaHfmyMjngNPngMbtPweJ6oJ83JoeStNs0hmuo_uvT5p0uUgc_L_nKsaa9mOD0sR9oM-p_bPFxb1pc1J6YHL7tx91mZKBSMb_Rl8d3qP-EWcWejtOH4JPqWMPnFX34yCr_50d_9vArAAD__wi1p5c)
What makes [hear.com's](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkUtr3TAQhX-NvPNFGtlysvDico03JaWUQJdipJFtEfmBHjX598Vp2l2hs_zOYR5nfrzoF_TBb_NXXF3_ZqOOSRvSC9l62stGtSnBaODQ1AJqEFpU1NOzVagq14tONt1TA6Ktlh6gMdgStS13bcfbyShHbacAjOyen3jl-6uPABBCNErwG3LZSSkJCVVnlWINx-Bivr05d9h9m6NLKbqjmOAtbje7r1Xol5yPxOSdwchgPM_ztjiMl8hgJAajcSnri_lt1ugpaZwmLi6_HNFmJof745VfpbhQ_P54ZaBKXnXaS7SOycG80ydaHfmyMjngNPngMbtPweJ6oJ83JoeStNs0hmuo_uvT5p0uUgc_L_nKsaa9mOD0sR9oM-p_bPFxb1pc1J6YHL7tx91mZKBSMb_Rl8d3qP-EWcWejtOH4JPqWMPnFX34yCr_50d_9vArAAD__wi1p5c) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkUtr3TAQhX-NvPNFGtlysvDico03JaWUQJdipJFtEfmBHjX598Vp2l2hs_zOYR5nfrzoF_TBb_NXXF3_ZqOOSRvSC9l62stGtSnBaODQ1AJqEFpU1NOzVagq14tONt1TA6Ktlh6gMdgStS13bcfbyShHbacAjOyen3jl-6uPABBCNErwG3LZSSkJCVVnlWINx-Bivr05d9h9m6NLKbqjmOAtbje7r1Xol5yPxOSdwchgPM_ztjiMl8hgJAajcSnri_lt1ugpaZwmLi6_HNFmJof745VfpbhQ_P54ZaBKXnXaS7SOycG80ydaHfmyMjngNPngMbtPweJ6oJ83JoeStNs0hmuo_uvT5p0uUgc_L_nKsaa9mOD0sR9oM-p_bPFxb1pc1J6YHL7tx91mZKBSMb_Rl8d3qP-EWcWejtOH4JPqWMPnFX34yCr_50d_9vArAAD__wi1p5c) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkUtr3TAQhX-NvPNFGtlysvDico03JaWUQJdipJFtEfmBHjX598Vp2l2hs_zOYR5nfrzoF_TBb_NXXF3_ZqOOSRvSC9l62stGtSnBaODQ1AJqEFpU1NOzVagq14tONt1TA6Ktlh6gMdgStS13bcfbyShHbacAjOyen3jl-6uPABBCNErwG3LZSSkJCVVnlWINx-Bivr05d9h9m6NLKbqjmOAtbje7r1Xol5yPxOSdwchgPM_ztjiMl8hgJAajcSnri_lt1ugpaZwmLi6_HNFmJof745VfpbhQ_P54ZaBKXnXaS7SOycG80ydaHfmyMjngNPngMbtPweJ6oJ83JoeStNs0hmuo_uvT5p0uUgc_L_nKsaa9mOD0sR9oM-p_bPFxb1pc1J6YHL7tx91mZKBSMb_Rl8d3qP-EWcWejtOH4JPqWMPnFX34yCr_50d_9vArAAD__wi1p5c) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

clean_body: Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts | | Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result. The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does. But now, a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry, and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade. It's new IX hearing aid. And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations. It’s no wonder IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America. What makes IX hearing aid so special? It’s one of the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing. This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small. The result? An unprecedented amount of power and clarity. This means that IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for unparalleled, crystal clear sound. “It's not just about volume,” explains founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.” In other words: with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design! Limited no-risk trials now available Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. Get started today. Keep Congress Republican PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Share the Timeless Lessons of Dickens’ A Christmas Carol
body:
This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=31e7bd91511244538746f46de3d59c37&_e=lsUFxI0zw7vpuLc3XgwbRDp7N_0KnbeLdE6hqph24Hggvp0mGVO0lKyVfKHuNrjKLU5Z3Ewa48B-EmahW1xYzzP32AZMl2IrEyk3-DLspebTR-H0y-ZbS5JLjbAcv97pgBupWN_nH2AOjd0T27eglDxPaxwg9CbPoWzPxvbsAOvqUA5bihfKiDVb1rWDvYRvrM1_SeI4xW6uHJDygqgEPVt0pklkFYH9QFqfBqMrnptI7Li9ORJGQahe_ydoK7nwbWxgXbMygQHtPEetiX88B7TrdkLRwgrAKM2HBc6Po2stGdfkHtUdtoFZE51_lqGQJ_z74n7rMdhNuzjZsOwX2pOq8DkUVJNv1OD5L1-PuEMY9VY9WGZULypCSdMpgHmFQCnbgzrry2K3T0PJXBedaidAz-4ADWP77nDTF2mkjOQ%3D)

| | Dear Friend,

Charles Dickens' _A Christmas Carol_ is a story of transformation, faith, and generosity--a reminder to us all of the true meaning of Christmas. You may not know that Dickens himself describes his Christmas stories as inspired by the words of Christ, offering lessons that are as timeless as they are powerful.

This Christmas, I invite you to help share this message while supporting Hillsdale College's educational mission on behalf of liberty. [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=31e7bd91511244538746f46de3d59c37&_e=lsUFxI0zw7vpuLc3XgwbRDp7N_0KnbeLdE6hqph24Hggvp0mGVO0lKyVfKHuNrjKLU5Z3Ewa48B-EmahW1xYzzP32AZMl2IrEyk3-DLspebTR-H0y-ZbS5JLjbAcv97pgBupWN_nH2AOjd0T27eglDxPaxwg9CbPoWzPxvbsAOvqUA5bihfKiDVb1rWDvYRvrM1_SeI4xW6uHJDygqgEPVt0pklkFYH9QFqfBqMrnptI7Li9ORJGQahe_ydoK7nwDiN7QcfKZ6wIcTBKFgt96cO6X5c5mNXZBw1NbxFSFRIMM3s4QA3WS03wxzVJXbV6bvPVuvkqHOrajnOPl8y33oS7UjW4FuJaGlZIQeQZVIrNp2YmeTcqc8yKfYiJwK-nQXIo2MPDjkvPwiYtMDwY6E1ly08VSiIfolgea4QYQZ4%3D) **
For your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more, we 'll send you an exclusive hardcover Hilldale College edition of _A Christmas Carol._**

This heirloom quality book features an inspiring introduction from English professor Dwight Lindley and 26 beautiful, original illustrations, making it a meaningful keepsake for you or a loved one.

Your generosity will help us reach millions across the country through our free educational resources, publications, and problems--all without accepting any--NOT. ONE. PENNY.--of government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans.

You can request your copy of _A Christmas Carol_ here: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=31e7bd91511244538746f46de3d59c37&_e=lsUFxI0zw7vpuLc3XgwbRDp7N_0KnbeLdE6hqph24Hggvp0mGVO0lKyVfKHuNrjKLU5Z3Ewa48B-EmahW1xYzzP32AZMl2IrEyk3-DLspebTR-H0y-ZbS5JLjbAcv97pgBupWN_nH2AOjd0T27eglDxPaxwg9CbPoWzPxvbsAOvqUA5bihfKiDVb1rWDvYRvrM1_SeI4xW6uHJDygqgEPVt0pklkFYH9QFqfBqMrnptI7Li9ORJGQahe_ydoK7nwKO0HxmqeM9SVOtCTyy6n9iqZxhumzyekIReZTU2qBzM5a1X4oihtQomhTBROXDbElLrzQ4a8-918L2OiwiHGhuqSEo5J_oPqoZgiawI9P2HVt5kJGiiKC0s58lrqqce2wuUQChM63eh5gkFZ4-7g0GeyqGzcq0VRsYW0nPGGbso%3D)

Together, we will help others to embrace the true meaning of Christmas.

God Bless Us, Everyone,

Bill Gray, '01

Hillsdale College

name: History Facts
subject: Where people put their keys before pockets
body:
Long before pockets became commonplace, humans had other resourceful ways to carry everyday essentials. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68co0u2rsopq7d8b64gg796zaps39k2yz0405vlqhybg98czb1zb0es3m2uw1tmnm1djvv5au9xflvf7r3pce76r19mi1k17kpdxt1snk89ntwizgm2qmj7olq75bk73y13v341oqq9hwenjt&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souf24&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Before pockets, people wore elaborate “chatelaines” to carry their keys.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souf24&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Arts & Culture](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souf24&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souf24&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| L ong before [pockets became commonplace](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=6ys38sosa399t093l4rsr04sdnf9gnyolndyrcz7kyzod93ce7kkm2bcxeh1ketdei7jq59hwbqc4yr3o4i5awagu4zx0ifhwzh7qixzvx4sb57dak9kfiyx56h134wswslr9c0stih8mtmdc2448f1qcm3bvkybb8s4aftn2y9tyhd84gugrz8ep3ujbzo0pef0wskhfqsoij9hs24wrao9yi2mvnzdalph2yncxury99zamsbnuyd9pd0uuxzelocago10qkigsxdi8jzjb9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souf24&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), humans had other resourceful ways to carry everyday essentials. Wearable pouches such as belt bags date back more than 5,000 years, and as early as ancient Roman times, people wore brooches that had hooks for hanging personal grooming tools. Similar items were [used](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souf24&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) for carrying keys throughout the medieval period and beyond; by the 18th century, the tool had evolved into an elaborate piece that came to be known as a “[chatelaine](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souf24&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com),” a word derived from French, referring to the keeper of a castle.
---
Chatelaines from this era typically consisted of an ornately designed [metal clip](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souf24&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) or hook that was fastened over a waistband or belt. Several chains — upwards of 12 or 13 on large chatelaines — extended from the clip, and each one held a small but useful item for the day-to-day operations of a household. This included keys, of course, but also scissors, writing tools, sewing kits, or even perfume. There were specialized versions for nurses or artists to help them keep their tools at hand, as well as chatelaines that primarily served as fancy fashion accessories — these were usually made of gold, beautifully decorated with diamonds and enamels, and often held a fan, watch, or purse.
While both women and men wore versions of chatelaines throughout history, it was mostly women who wore them during this era — men’s clothing, after all, had reliably included pockets since the 17th century. By the early 20th century, however, women’s handbags had become more common and larger; people also began wearing watches on their wrists as opposed to a chain. After World War I, dropped-waist fashion silhouettes took center stage, and chatelaines were left behind as but a relic of functional fashion.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souf24&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souf24&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Lovers used to wear miniature portraits of each other’s eyes.
In the late 18th century, tiny tokens of romance emerged as a mysterious jewelry fad in Britain. They were known as “[lover’s eye](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souf24&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)” portraits — miniature paintings featuring a single, detailed eye, often framed in jewelry such as brooches, lockets, or rings. They were usually exchanged as tokens of love, but often, only the giver and the recipient knew whose eye it was. The origin of the tradition is linked to Prince George of Wales (later King George IV). According to legend, the prince, who famously shared a scandalous love affair with a woman named Maria Anne Fitzherbert, sent a tiny painting of his eye to ask for her hand in marriage in 1785. The intimate hand-painted objects came and went fairly quickly as a trend, especially as photography emerged in the 1830s. Today, approximately 1,000 “lover’s eye” artifacts exist.

name: The DC Bugle
subject: We can’t let our Guard Down
body:
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=32mjhzb4zq42zoqfwi4md2hsiyc1bh3cu4vbi4nknfobcezyf5y6fo5786txd8rdyomyit32y1j9betqkmpw2muqepo8hum5qzrw3g4krx91&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soug78&__onlt=h) [unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166j32nk1khhb17lj1mwjxgyb9bztjke46bpzj10gx1oipv97xl0dgh6dpt1dvlobuc1pz6ofdruucoqjld9r1f&__stmp=soug78&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2vytzx2r6axwuli8wr2rd96ziiqijkczod0791tzxzymaokrkn0gtl5utowsvk5bpuvaax5ext7darmim2rmcv8x70sd601wtzj61wqbn38a5kyq0t33kwo5ghywn34ustes2yp371t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soug78&__onlt=h "Headline") Jews around the world are seeking light from the horrors of the war in Israel. While we wait for the 100 hostages to come home, we are grieving over soldiers being killed almost daily. We are also waiting for the diplomats and politicians to deliver a lasting cease fire that we can trust so there won’t be a need to remain on high alert. **Quite frankly, we are hoping for a miracle this Chanukah, but like the Maccabees, we must be prepared to fight our enemies.** **[Please join us as we bless the Modern Day Maccabees of the IDF serving on the cold frontlines in the North, by Lebanon and Syria, with 8 days of supplies during Chanukah, as they are what separates us from the darkness of the terror.](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2vytzx2r6axwuli8wr2rd96ziiqijkczodntiu3xi0yy35dg2tkashyukte11dj9wry0iggcma4250klrhs0lkhlfrsom120qqqomct1s0pktr7y582s5jrj3yt5xsazgqqygqegu5r&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soug78&__onlt=h "Please join us as we bless the Modern Day Maccabees of the IDF serving on the cold frontlines in the North, by Lebanon and Syria, with 8 days of supplies during Chanukah, as they are what separates us from the darkness of the terror.")** |
* Menorah and candles-$10
* Thermal socks - $12
* Home-cooked meals - $20
* Hand warmers - $28
* Tactical warming gloves - $40
* Insulated sleeping bags - $80
* Med kits – $200
* Heavy duty winter storm suits - $720
* Advanced Body armor for special units- $1350

---
**[A gift in any amount will go a long way towards lifting the morale of our brave IDF soldiers.](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2vytzx2r6axwuli8wr2rd96ziiqijkczodyevkbw6pyjtkx86aiure3vrylxvxafdoap54vzlh0oxyz2xasd9qvqrgrjq22sn4huvivpwjv8eheg9l1epmvaopnchg8f8n0fy78xf99&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soug78&__onlt=h "A gift in any amount will go a long way towards lifting the morale of our brave IDF soldiers.")**
Chanukah is typically one of the most joyous celebrations with family gatherings, lighting the menorah each night and[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2vytzx2r6axwuli8wr2rd96ziiqijkczodk37rnuscz8idqymhgoqawvie761rspk9cbpq8xb1iz28n5dtttug6f29ruu32i7hoaf2xbbgav4oq2qc14wzzrx46o67eky7z0plap4p3&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soug78&__onlt=h "Headline") enjoying traditional comfort foods like potato latkes (potato pancakes) and sufganiyot (jelly donuts).
In addition to the 100 hostages, there are many soldiers and civilians who are unable to celebrate with their families.
**Not every household will be filled with the laughter and joy it experienced in past years.**
Fortunately, Israel’s soldiers are working overtime in the winter conditions to stop those seeking to do us harm and searching for the hostages.
**[Please give a Chanukah gift to our Modern Day Maccabees serving on the frontlines TODAY and show them your appreciation!](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2vytzx2r6axwuli8wr2rd96ziiqijkczoe9pghjsd3zwnw80r2e6px1wpjqcv97k56f1xzjvq8ejufl8jmu7e9g7aar3y43o4xfh28a1gdffrelmvt0se0d6fh0jsxp404975e44rtg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soug78&__onlt=h "Please give a Chanukah gift to our Modern Day Maccabees serving on the frontlines TODAY and show them your appreciation!")**
As a father of two soldiers, I can assure you that anything from a warm meal to the items that will keep them warm on duty, will be greatly appreciated by Israel’s sons and daughters.
Whether the blessing of hostages returning or a meaningful peace arrives in time for Chanukah is unknown, but while we still have soldiers serving on the frontlines, we need them to know that they are what stands between the light and darkness, and their sacrifices are appreciated.
**[Show your appreciation for Israel’s soldiers on the 8 days of Chanukah!](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2vytzx2r6axwuli8wr2rd96ziiqijkczoewauovr1szhcp1qv9c0otuwh2yn12luo3hpfjyt3rb7lrzo33uk1btyn3qac53e1on1nqcplal3d9wua7lelpgk2xhuckj9q0hpjwvhcx6&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soug78&__onlt=h "Show your appreciation for Israel’s soldiers on the 8 days of Chanukah!")**
I pray this is the last time I will write to you about the war.
Please join me in this prayer, and until our Lord answers it, prayerfully do your part to help show love and blessings to the brave men and women of the IDF.
Your faithful servant,
Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation
| [BLESS A SOLDIER THIS CHANUKAH!](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2vytzx2r6axwuli8wr2rd96ziiqijkczoehl5f5pnfa755gezszgnplxo7fhuid2v0jc27nqeyxus1nr8ivan550juq9g647k2e7wwec4y4q2c5cekl56ckbnoc41otqdjtwbolz1bg&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soug78&__onlt=h "BLESS A SOLDIER THIS CHANUKAH!")
---
[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=2vytzx2r6axwuli8wr2rd96ziiqijkczof79f9dny6auvka6dzxammsxfp1s0cuybk02mt0otfteiyluqbwqwwervjpgk74zgf9pfch29v9aq6ckjbktq42sw3wbnc1w5g3dt5rqofy&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soug78&__onlt=h "Banner")
_The Genesis 123 Foundation is a US-based non-profit. Our mission is to build bridges between Jews and Christians with Israel in ways that are new, unique, and meaningful. We have diverse leadership of Jews and Christians united toward this objective, and aspire to create an abundance of programs to achieve these goals. We are excited to play a role in this important mission and hope you will join us and be blessed._

[Unsubscribe](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xul=65a6x69jow166j32nk1khhb17lj1mwjxgyb9bztjke46bpzj10gx1oipv97xl0dgh6dpt1dvlobuc1pz6ofdruucoqjld9r1f&__stmp=soug78&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) / [Privacy Policy](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=1mrch7orh3w40m4tg4afgvlxgmfn3zaydpiwmhj53cmb1ivakewq864wcn750kda07px4gouhn3o0kd3dqqek39apyu3a911euafcl1d1o3cvgo2aegxv3cxuz2s5nv0evg55&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soug78&__onlt=h) / [Contact us](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=zv9l8u2g4r8olhb8ey2ii48391r0ioxn4f5q2h6ki92hdnt2dmlbirof9peowcx1kteo2wrrst8ke31t2on5owet90amo2x6s8giuourkbue7l965k7wftj3gbd3th&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=soug78&__onlt=h)

**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkUmL3DAQhX-NfHOjrWVdfGjG-DYhhIYci9JiWyAvWFLM_PugSSe3wNTxe49aXv18h3cMMWzzN1x9n88MZwLjYHG2nfayudaUaIBTLlvGW86ANa6XHXdCNb5nnZCd7jSlzdIzxZhC6Z3rtKbSeGpxYkppYScq76IJfe3DOGeMS8XoTUx3ZzVayfVdW6GJpBj9mdMtL_70RzExWNyyx_Vm97WJ_ZLzkYh4ED4SPl7XdVs8nlUkfHSEj8anDJWFbQYMLgFOE2XVL0a0mYjh8faktRRlij7enoSrkldIezmtJ2IwH-6FVu9CWYkYcJpCDJj9S7C4HhjmjYihJPAbYKxD4Z8PzIerpI1hXnLNsHV7MdHDsR9oM8J_tvi8OS3-hOCIGL7vx8NmJFylYv6g549n-zfH5uzdcYUYQ1IdkXReMcTPqPIXn_mr578DAAD__0Hopd4) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkUmL3DAQhX-NfHOjrWVdfGjG-DYhhIYci9JiWyAvWFLM_PugSSe3wNTxe49aXv18h3cMMWzzN1x9n88MZwLjYHG2nfayudaUaIBTLlvGW86ANa6XHXdCNb5nnZCd7jSlzdIzxZhC6Z3rtKbSeGpxYkppYScq76IJfe3DOGeMS8XoTUx3ZzVayfVdW6GJpBj9mdMtL_70RzExWNyyx_Vm97WJ_ZLzkYh4ED4SPl7XdVs8nlUkfHSEj8anDJWFbQYMLgFOE2XVL0a0mYjh8faktRRlij7enoSrkldIezmtJ2IwH-6FVu9CWYkYcJpCDJj9S7C4HhjmjYihJPAbYKxD4Z8PzIerpI1hXnLNsHV7MdHDsR9oM8J_tvi8OS3-hOCIGL7vx8NmJFylYv6g549n-zfH5uzdcYUYQ1IdkXReMcTPqPIXn_mr578DAAD__0Hopd4) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.

What makes [hear.com's](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkUmL3DAQhX-NfHOjrWVdfGjG-DYhhIYci9JiWyAvWFLM_PugSSe3wNTxe49aXv18h3cMMWzzN1x9n88MZwLjYHG2nfayudaUaIBTLlvGW86ANa6XHXdCNb5nnZCd7jSlzdIzxZhC6Z3rtKbSeGpxYkppYScq76IJfe3DOGeMS8XoTUx3ZzVayfVdW6GJpBj9mdMtL_70RzExWNyyx_Vm97WJ_ZLzkYh4ED4SPl7XdVs8nlUkfHSEj8anDJWFbQYMLgFOE2XVL0a0mYjh8faktRRlij7enoSrkldIezmtJ2IwH-6FVu9CWYkYcJpCDJj9S7C4HhjmjYihJPAbYKxD4Z8PzIerpI1hXnLNsHV7MdHDsR9oM8J_tvi8OS3-hOCIGL7vx8NmJFylYv6g549n-zfH5uzdcYUYQ1IdkXReMcTPqPIXn_mr578DAAD__0Hopd4) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkUmL3DAQhX-NfHOjrWVdfGjG-DYhhIYci9JiWyAvWFLM_PugSSe3wNTxe49aXv18h3cMMWzzN1x9n88MZwLjYHG2nfayudaUaIBTLlvGW86ANa6XHXdCNb5nnZCd7jSlzdIzxZhC6Z3rtKbSeGpxYkppYScq76IJfe3DOGeMS8XoTUx3ZzVayfVdW6GJpBj9mdMtL_70RzExWNyyx_Vm97WJ_ZLzkYh4ED4SPl7XdVs8nlUkfHSEj8anDJWFbQYMLgFOE2XVL0a0mYjh8faktRRlij7enoSrkldIezmtJ2IwH-6FVu9CWYkYcJpCDJj9S7C4HhjmjYihJPAbYKxD4Z8PzIerpI1hXnLNsHV7MdHDsR9oM8J_tvi8OS3-hOCIGL7vx8NmJFylYv6g549n-zfH5uzdcYUYQ1IdkXReMcTPqPIXn_mr578DAAD__0Hopd4) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkUmL3DAQhX-NfHOjrWVdfGjG-DYhhIYci9JiWyAvWFLM_PugSSe3wNTxe49aXv18h3cMMWzzN1x9n88MZwLjYHG2nfayudaUaIBTLlvGW86ANa6XHXdCNb5nnZCd7jSlzdIzxZhC6Z3rtKbSeGpxYkppYScq76IJfe3DOGeMS8XoTUx3ZzVayfVdW6GJpBj9mdMtL_70RzExWNyyx_Vm97WJ_ZLzkYh4ED4SPl7XdVs8nlUkfHSEj8anDJWFbQYMLgFOE2XVL0a0mYjh8faktRRlij7enoSrkldIezmtJ2IwH-6FVu9CWYkYcJpCDJj9S7C4HhjmjYihJPAbYKxD4Z8PzIerpI1hXnLNsHV7MdHDsR9oM8J_tvi8OS3-hOCIGL7vx8NmJFylYv6g549n-zfH5uzdcYUYQ1IdkXReMcTPqPIXn_mr578DAAD__0Hopd4) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[ Check if you qualify ](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkUmL3DAQhX-NfHOjrWVdfGjG-DYhhIYci9JiWyAvWFLM_PugSSe3wNTxe49aXv18h3cMMWzzN1x9n88MZwLjYHG2nfayudaUaIBTLlvGW86ANa6XHXdCNb5nnZCd7jSlzdIzxZhC6Z3rtKbSeGpxYkppYScq76IJfe3DOGeMS8XoTUx3ZzVayfVdW6GJpBj9mdMtL_70RzExWNyyx_Vm97WJ_ZLzkYh4ED4SPl7XdVs8nlUkfHSEj8anDJWFbQYMLgFOE2XVL0a0mYjh8faktRRlij7enoSrkldIezmtJ2IwH-6FVu9CWYkYcJpCDJj9S7C4HhjmjYihJPAbYKxD4Z8PzIerpI1hXnLNsHV7MdHDsR9oM8J_tvi8OS3-hOCIGL7vx8NmJFylYv6g549n-zfH5uzdcYUYQ1IdkXReMcTPqPIXn_mr578DAAD__0Hopd4)

name: Conservative Reboot
subject: Modern Day Maccabees
body:
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=967kk14ikglep0gwp8g1u16lezuwocfavk4lh2ikflaadhzdejsd3uukseixh8utq8t815ee23njp0cspdkzgqeozmt022ayqe1kdvti5fv28bqea9g7wkjuf9ytcr2z3yq0py&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souit7&__onlt=h) [Mark as Spam](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh79shywban93wiv44wmens89wy8eqy73irkg7jx1i4ec45e88cmu8zw94yj8he8pusaol9zjujll3b5m6nn474cvdpmd7br1x&__stmp=souit7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh) | [Unsubscribe](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xul=zkl8p045sz1uh79shywban93wiv44wmens89wy8eqy73irkg7jx1i4ec45e88cmu8zw94yj8he8pusaol9zjujll3b5m6nn474cvdpmd7br1x&__stmp=souit7&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)
---
Please read the message below from our sponsor.
* * *
| [](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=9ib6pp53450xgw2l9dffyjdsfdjfjk6p8f61ozodyzoh0868tv6jcsshgpo9zd0p0y6x87r35g632kfbxjh8x6fl6gwh9nj6gpng4bvlv6jihen4mfhnzm6z0o24nx1n8p9nbruzaw3ynla20qlfdt4&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souit7&__onlt=h "Headline") Jews around the world are seeking light from the horrors of the war in Israel. While we wait for the 100 hostages to come home, we are grieving over soldiers being killed almost daily. We are also waiting for the diplomats and politicians to deliver a lasting cease fire that we can trust so there won’t be a need to remain on high alert. **Quite frankly, we are hoping for a miracle this Chanukah, but like the Maccabees, we must be prepared to fight our enemies.** **[Please join us as we bless the Modern Day Maccabees of the IDF serving on the cold frontlines in the North, by Lebanon and Syria, with 8 days of supplies during Chanukah, as they are what separates us from the darkness of the terror.](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=9ib6pp53450xgw2l9dffyjdsfdjfjk6p8gq0sda73hprhstnundl0n8f0hvsdfxbiw0k6m6iss26fj3jaq5074msmk1h0crvl25fltq4lfzxiaomwo27rqlfgil6n06ixy7ceeosxghyo3mayvmpf96&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souit7&__onlt=h "Please join us as we bless the Modern Day Maccabees of the IDF serving on the cold frontlines in the North, by Lebanon and Syria, with 8 days of supplies during Chanukah, as they are what separates us from the darkness of the terror.")** |
* Menorah and candles-$10
* Thermal socks - $12
* Home-cooked meals - $20
* Hand warmers - $28
* Tactical warming gloves - $40
* Insulated sleeping bags - $80
* Med kits – $200
* Heavy duty winter storm suits - $720
* Advanced Body armor for special units- $1350

---
**[A gift in any amount will go a long way towards lifting the morale of our brave IDF soldiers.](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=9ib6pp53450xgw2l9dffyjdsfdjfjk6p8hxlwhlyx3q0caeqv4p0m60c7pczhi72ethn4okbd1kmwhq5cgqdf1cjr1uge4jj3clfg98msspmjwpsfg937vf0bti8mrotkh65i569v5zyo6jn8zwjh1d&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souit7&__onlt=h "A gift in any amount will go a long way towards lifting the morale of our brave IDF soldiers.")**
Chanukah is typically one of the most joyous celebrations with family gatherings, lighting the menorah each night and[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=9ib6pp53450xgw2l9dffyjdsfdjfjk6p8ifkb0n22nqxxj3tvik1w0ezphjglkerarba2rcv1zgqnfapfmavql7qv4lgvvsm8rffb12rj32lksqz3orklay7w2fm9gu3o44wlu02ssryomvjgdhtiff&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souit7&__onlt=h "Headline") enjoying traditional comfort foods like potato latkes (potato pancakes) and sufganiyot (jelly donuts).
In addition to the 100 hostages, there are many soldiers and civilians who are unable to celebrate with their families.
**Not every household will be filled with the laughter and joy it experienced in past years.**
Fortunately, Israel’s soldiers are working overtime in the winter conditions to stop those seeking to do us harm and searching for the hostages.
**[Please give a Chanukah gift to our Modern Day Maccabees serving on the frontlines TODAY and show them your appreciation!](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=9ib6pp53450xgw2l9dffyjdsfdjfjk6p8k1jf4ytvvr6t5qwwbv2fhwwwq5241pewpw10uuoo9cu2dkxhckn0izhz8sgmjkzp4zfveixpbealorfogygdfrqqzco99zabp302gfhpd7yoq6wsi61kxj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souit7&__onlt=h "Please give a Chanukah gift to our Modern Day Maccabees serving on the frontlines TODAY and show them your appreciation!")**
As a father of two soldiers, I can assure you that anything from a warm meal to the items that will keep them warm on duty, will be greatly appreciated by Israel’s sons and daughters.
Whether the blessing of hostages returning or a meaningful peace arrives in time for Chanukah is unknown, but while we still have soldiers serving on the frontlines, we need them to know that they are what stands between the light and darkness, and their sacrifices are appreciated.
**[Show your appreciation for Israel’s soldiers on the 8 days of Chanukah!](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=9ib6pp53450xgw2l9dffyjdsfdjfjk6p8l9ij8jj0drdopbzxu443cotcio983l5snqpkxm5yhyxfc8fk782yg4odnjg2ot0tftfqwccgouq08slyofcvk8x98zq8afm2y1r67zan1lyotf730sy0ph&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souit7&__onlt=h "Show your appreciation for Israel’s soldiers on the 8 days of Chanukah!")**
I pray this is the last time I will write to you about the war.
Please join me in this prayer, and until our Lord answers it, prayerfully do your part to help show love and blessings to the brave men and women of the IDF.
Your faithful servant,
Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation
| [BLESS A SOLDIER THIS CHANUKAH!](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=9ib6pp53450xgw2l9dffyjdsfdjfjk6p90ti1p9otlso7y0cymb5px4qjqvso6wuo98cia1kjtubwav20ztg8dwfhrqffclpyunf9owiml8314u5hh0yo31e3fws83khrglg9wtt8odyoxrfb4d6256&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souit7&__onlt=h "BLESS A SOLDIER THIS CHANUKAH!")
---
[](http://trk.conservativereboot.com/?xtl=9ib6pp53450xgw2l9dffyjdsfdjfjk6p91bh5twdl7sj2gnfz3m6zrio3iczs95h8733gcfe83qfnyfm33dxgb1mluhfx5tcd75f44r1dxje20vo5p7u47gkkqtu7v4sf3k9ojnm5zvyob2sn91c3j0&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souit7&__onlt=h "Banner")
_The Genesis 123 Foundation is a US-based non-profit. Our mission is to build bridges between Jews and Christians with Israel in ways that are new, unique, and meaningful. We have diverse leadership of Jews and Christians united toward this objective, and aspire to create an abundance of programs to achieve these goals. We are excited to play a role in this important mission and hope you will join us and be blessed._

We are also waiting for the diplomats and politicians to deliver a lasting cease fire that we can trust so there won’t be a need to remain on high alert. Quite frankly, we are hoping for a miracle this Chanukah, but like the Maccabees, we must be prepared to fight our enemies. "Please join us as we bless the Modern Day Maccabees of the IDF serving on the cold frontlines in the North, by Lebanon and Syria, with 8 days of supplies during Chanukah, as they are what separates us from the darkness of the terror." | Menorah and candles-$10 Thermal socks - $12 Home-cooked meals - $20 Hand warmers - $28 Tactical warming gloves - $40 Insulated sleeping bags - $80 Med kits – $200 Heavy duty winter storm suits - $720 Advanced Body armor for special units- $1350 "A gift in any amount will go a long way towards lifting the morale of our brave IDF soldiers." Chanukah is typically one of the most joyous celebrations with family gatherings, lighting the menorah each night and "Headline" enjoying traditional comfort foods like potato latkes (potato pancakes) and sufganiyot (jelly donuts). In addition to the 100 hostages, there are many soldiers and civilians who are unable to celebrate with their families. Not every household will be filled with the laughter and joy it experienced in past years. Fortunately, Israel’s soldiers are working overtime in the winter conditions to stop those seeking to do us harm and searching for the hostages. "Please give a Chanukah gift to our Modern Day Maccabees serving on the frontlines TODAY and show them your appreciation!" name: Riley Gaines
subject: With Trump, now is our chance
body:
Now the fight begins
| Peter, I’m Riley Gaines, the Director of the Riley Gaines Center at the Leadership Institute. I know what it’s like to stare radical leftism in the face. After all, I had to swim a race against a 6-foot-tall man.
**But Peter, we can work to put those days behind us now.** With Donald Trump back in the White House, you and I have a unique opportunity to turn the tide for women’s rights across America. American voters have proven with this election that they’ve had enough of the lunacy. They’ve had enough of the attacks on the very foundations of our society and our families. And they turned out in masses and voted to restore common sense. But this is only the beginning. While conservatives celebrate this victory, the left's agenda remains a significant threat to our rights and opportunities.
Because Peter , there are still leftist bureaucrats, elected and unelected, working to stop common sense Americans from setting things right.
**_You and I must be vigilant and proactive in defending the rights of female athletes and students everywhere._**
There is great opportunity in these turbulent times. The Riley Gaines Center is committed to ensuring that women’s voices are heard, and their rights are protected. It’s what my ambassadors work for -- day in and day out.
Right now, the Riley Gaines Center needs to raise $300,000 to start 2025 with a bang. This is a call to action for all who believe in fairness and biological reality.
[Your support will empower my Ambassadors and I to educate, mobilize, and advocate for policies that protect women’s rights.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=35996ab2600b49be9cc79f807c82d782&_e=G6pXKKqKi_7_7UQ7EoBru_OAavcqHk8vB0kSD0xVyzcS6YJm-9Sbt3SeMoBiNj2pPmdyBTvloE_CXqa1Nf-gnlrd75OiiuJSq0n8mZT_YNsg6YXzZmxoh05TKy9JnXqMU_pGlVzmkIwK59-RDuVGc2ZO7FXEusvSaWXVFWc8_aVGiBhexeM3y-fSsGJi8eKDAZb9_rm55ZWfn4Sq8v64aHI5ttqdW4kx3Mv1LKBhJ_t5uzYxytIcfEF-KV26KYNpsKLvASanP3qDPEkknaEe3wt4yiveoQpCRj6REoM_OgGxNZ9pGQAhGQtcQVW5CmjluGiH0lKhxmqQRIrQv8ag5Sc6mUL9iaGTfxQ9cy9q1WGpXS_z7TArpfaK2ycnI1n5) Together, you and I can make a difference. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: The Next American Century Is Now
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/speakingup-11573605?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend, **Remember when Japan was predicted to overtake America? **

Back in the 1980s, Japan was the coming country. Japan’s economy had enjoyed decades of rapid growth. Her exports where everywhere, and with inventions like the Sony Walkman, it looked as though Japan was the technological future, too.

**America looked like a power in decline.** Forty years ago, many traditional US industries were failing. Crime seemed out of control.

**By the mid 1990s, Japan’s GDP was 71 percent that of the US - and the gap looked to be closing. **One “expert”, Herman Kahn predicted that Japan would surpass America as the world’s largest economy by 2000.
---
|
---
_America has outperformed Japan since the days of the Sony Walkman_
| **Today? Japan’s economy is a quarter the size of America’s.** Japan hasn’t produced much innovation since the Tamagotchi (Don’t ask). Despite all the talk about Japanese electronic wizardry, the great digital innovations of the past few decades have happened on this side of the Pacific.

**Today, of course, we’re told that the great ascending power is not Japan, but China.**

China’s economic growth over the past 40 years has been phenomenal. In industry after industry, Chinese exports have crushed the competition. China, unlike Japan, is not just an economic competitor but a strategic rival to the United States, pursuing an aggressively expansionist policy in the Pacific, south Asia and parts of Africa.

**By 2021, China’s GDP was almost 80 percent that of the US and the experts were telling us China would overtake America within a couple of decades. **

**But look at what has happened since. China’s economy seems to have peaked as a percentage of US output.** Fast forward two decades, my bet is that the graph below will look a lot more like the one above.
---
|
---
_China output as a percentage of US output: Turning Japanese?_
| **China has even more debt-induced malinvestment than Japan had during the 80s asset bubble. **Chinese demographics (current Total Fertility Rate 1.02) are in an even worse shape than Japan’s (TFR 1.30). And China’s fiscal position is unlikely to improve with all of President Xi’s imperial ambitions to fund.

**As recently as 2008, Europe’s economy was about the same size as the United States’. Today, America’s economy is twice the size of Europe’s.**
---
|
---
_Europe is in economic, demographic, and moral decline_
| Look at the number of large companies established over the past 50 years on either side of the Atlantic. **Home Depot, a single US company, eclipses all the new businesses created in the European Union since 1974.**
---
|
---
_Europe doesn’t work: The European Union has destroyed Europe_
| **So why are Japan, China and Europe all in their different ways underperforming America? **Because each are, in their different ways, reverting back to a type of political economic tradition far less successful than America’s.

**Japan, superficially Western in so many ways since 1945, has behind that façade a strongly corporatist political economy.** A handful of well-connected conglomerates are able to dominate markets, but shielded from internal competition, they don’t innovate. (To appreciate how stifling this is, try to imagine what America might be like, for example, if IBM was the only computer company, with all the competitors kept out.)

**China, after a brief move towards market liberalization begun by Deng Xiaoping, is reverting to what you might think of as a Ming tradition.** Dissent is stamped on. A bureaucratic elite micromanages and controls. The sclerotic effects are already being felt.

**Europe, repeated rescued from an indigenous form of autocracy by the Anglosphere powers (1704, 1815, 1914, 1944, Cold War), is tragically reverting to type.** Today, a courtly elite enthroned in Brussels attempts to regulate and control ever more aspects of social and economic life across the Continent, destroying it in the process (Mercifully, Britain escaped from this in 2016 and might yet return to a more Atlantic tradition).

**To flourish, the United States needs to stay true to the political and economic model envisaged by the Founders; limited government, lower taxes and liberty.** The good news is that with the new administration in Washington, this may well be about to happen.

Elon Musk is determined not only to cut federal spending (something America urgently needs to do to avoid bankruptcy). He is looking to turbo charge productivity growth, moving people from the public to the private sector, and radically cut red tape.
---
|
---
_The key to economic growth is not rocket science_
| Reports of America’s relative decline seem to me to be wildly exaggerated. **If Musk and co deliver half of what they are promising, we might just be on the cusp of an extraordinary period of progress and innovation in America.**

**The divergence between America and the rest of the world is only going to accelerate.**

I feel an overwhelming sense of privilege to be onboard!

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=791d374803&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=9a8eb84ebe) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=9a8eb84ebe).

body:
Donald Trump’s policy plans could make Social Security insolvent in just 6 years.

House Democrats are fighting back to ensure the hard-earned benefits of seniors and everyday Americans are protected.

We’re sending a letter to let them know that we stand with them and we’d like you to add your name! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q42024_sshousedems?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100]

Add your name to stand with House Democrats and protect Social Security » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_ndaf_q42024_sshousedems?amount=7&amounts=10,25,50,100]

Dear House Democrats,
Thank you so much for fighting for ALL Americans!
Republicans have been working to drain Social Security for years, but the way that you have continued to defend it makes me proud to call myself a Democrat.
As you fight for the hard-earned benefits of seniors and millions of vulnerable people, you’re giving us real hope.
I need you to know that thousands of Americans across the country stand with you!

name: Her Bold Move
subject: Need a last-minute gift?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
We have a great idea for a gift that keeps on giving...🎁 | | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99059892/518711540/1308403186?refcode=EM_F_241221gift_N_HBM_90DO_10_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZTBjZGRiLWEzYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n3PPptEyMUY1SvCXA0RzoLXZFW--jFqX5B8mctiM1V4=)

Hi Peter,

Need a last-minute gift for the feminist in your life before the holidays? We have you covered.

As the fastest-growing support network for women running for office, we’re giving folks a chance to join our movement. If you know someone who would like to be a part of our fight, gift them a membership to Her Bold Move by making a monthly donation in their name!

[**For the person in your life who believes that women belong in the rooms where decisions are being made, dedicate a donation (you can even make it monthly!) in their name to Her Bold Move today. We’ll send them a special email with your gift message. →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-gift-membership-2024/?refcode=EM_F_241221gift_N_HBM_90DO_10_G_N_L1)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99059904/518711549/1308403186?refcode=EM_F_241221gift_N_HBM_90DO_10_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZTBjZGRiLWEzYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n3PPptEyMUY1SvCXA0RzoLXZFW--jFqX5B8mctiM1V4=)
---
Research shows that more women in positions of power creates better outcomes for women – something we’ll desperately need over the next four years.

Here’s how:

✅ **By electing qualified, pro-choice women to state and local offices, we are building necessary guardrails to defend against the potential damage of the incoming administration.** The more women in the rooms where decisions are being made – the more likely we are to see women’s rights protected.

✅ **We are not afraid to work in deep red abortion ban states.** These are the states where women are truly being left behind and most desperately need women representing them in their government. We’re chipping away at the male GOP supermajorities in those states.

✅ **We are building a bench of qualified, pro-choice women.** The more women serving in our government, the more opportunities there will be for a woman to run for president and, FINALLY, win.

✅ **It is critical that our daughters see themselves reflected in their leaders.** We must ensure that there is female representation at every level of the American government.

We have a vision for this country and a dream of FINALLY seeing ourselves, our daughters, our friends, and our fellow American women represented at the highest level of our government. It starts with electing more women to ALL levels of government.

[**If you know someone who agrees with our mission, gift them a Her Bold Move membership to help support us in this historic fight. Follow the prompts on our checkout page and we’ll email them your gift + gift message. We like to think of it as a gift that keeps on giving!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99059915/518711558/1308403186?refcode=EM_F_241221gift_N_HBM_90DO_10_G_N_L2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZTBjZGRiLWEzYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n3PPptEyMUY1SvCXA0RzoLXZFW--jFqX5B8mctiM1V4=)

Happy holidays!

Her Bold Move
---
| | Her Bold Move is the fastest-growing support network for women running for office in the United States. Since our founding in 2020, we have supported hundreds of pro-choice, pro-women women candidates across 42 states and counting. As abortion bans and other dangerous laws about women tend to get passed in states with the lowest representation numbers for women in government (4%, 11%, 12%....) we've made it our mission to break the anti-choice male supermajorities in those state legislatures.

**Support this work with a contribution today!** [DONATE!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99059918/518711564/1308403186?refcode=EM_F_241221gift_N_HBM_90DO_10_G_N_Biobox&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmZTBjZGRiLWEzYmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=n3PPptEyMUY1SvCXA0RzoLXZFW--jFqX5B8mctiM1V4=)

| Thanks to Donald Trump winning the 2024 election, MANY PEOPLE are on HIGH ALERT with Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. leading the Department of Health and Human Services. RFK Jr.'s nomination even has top Nobel laureates in chemistry, economics, medicine and physics on edge. Whether it’s vaccines or getting rid of the Food and Drug Administration, Center for Disease Control and Prevention, and the National Institutes of Health, RFK is no good to lead our public health system. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29e71878-3895-43aa-9ca9-86839abe1c9c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
|
---
| | | | | RFK Jr. has to go through confirmation hearings, and we know he’s facing some serious criticism for his outlandish views. So we need to RAMP UP the pressure and demand that RFK Jr. not be confirmed to Trump’s cabinet. [We set a goal of 100,000 Democrats to sign this petition in support of rejecting Robert F. Kennedy as our next Director of Health and Human Services. Will you add your name?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1e95cd49-3ba0-4c71-9be2-d8af000aed05/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a2e0c24-dc17-4894-b0a8-8403f97dda9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

**THEN** : Victories in Wisconsin, followed by North Carolina, Michigan, Montana, and Kentucky show that regardless of party, voters want fair-minded, pro-democracy justices sitting on the highest judicial body in their states.
**NOW** : We have to protect pro-democracy majorities on state supreme courts in two key states: Wisconsin and Pennsylvania.
**Just as we have for nearly eight years, we’ll be working hard to ensure voters understand the stakes of these elections — but we can’t do it without you, Peter. **

name: Bill Gray
subject: Do you need Three Ghosts to visit you this Christmas?
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fea7ff595f3149469b9d75081f7c0e9c&_e=8LC60nY5idMY0njAEWvSbiBBN4N1dKwFTWlDdZd70nUu0ujUnUBNJHpl78crEuJ3Ch4V0H-DLXbLBCd9EqIuRqtapkcvM3YlNsSrE_ykK8kSmfxCN9hykL5nvYX-uwlTerXWHRXhHvtwOgDP_O48bjSqGnwZqX0vzjgrvJd-PHXtptA6g5tT4xZLhjofW8a1YA37Us4AFSpveP1ZniVH8NlQM2WjGKmRGrgjaBaLJE4MPXSljE5lL65m1bXxRrt0Fz0ECy1BmGzasaMXBAxznzivDkszI5vDzKPVmT6y1FB8ieEIzwlRC7cs5Ym7a33UkbCxgaZnuMnEInhMyWkgdwpe9ZlBPDeQQiKyza5Z2AMEd7IRxbH5dUkQArpO8yMKRTGiQjcMesHaegILVrQRnLK1yslpuffjs07T6T2p77A%3D)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Even as Charles Dickens introduces the most miserable man in London, I can't help but smile.

_" Oh! But he was a tight-fisted hand at the grindstone, Scrooge! A squeezing, wrenching, grasping, scraping, clutching, covetous old sinner! Hard and sharp as flint, from which no steel had ever struck out generous fire; secret, and self-contained, and solitary as an oyster." _

Dickens is a master of developing characters, and Ebenezer Scrooge is one of my favorites.

The lyrical way he describes Scrooge helps explain why I'm always rooting for this friendless miser.

But there is a great deal more to Ebenezer Scrooge that I missed until we filmed our online course, "Charles Dickens' A Christmas Carol."

Ebenezer Scrooge is not a simple caricature of greed. Amidst the playful language of _A Christmas Carol_ , Dickens reveals that Scrooge has fallen prey to a very common temptation.

In response to the stresses and responsibilities of life, Scrooge commits himself to controlling the terms of everything. In an effort to protect himself, Scrooge withdraws from his friends, shuts himself up from the joys of life, and becomes as "self-contained, and solitary as an oyster."

It's a warning that is powerful to me as I struggle with the busyness and grind of my daily routine.

Maybe that's why Scrooge has such a hold on me. And it helps explain why I cheer for him again and again as he promises to "honour Christmas with [his] whole heart" every year.

And that's why I urge you to enter the world of Ebenezer Scrooge this Christmas. Dickens will help you see old things anew and appreciate the joys we too often overlook in our everyday lives. [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fea7ff595f3149469b9d75081f7c0e9c&_e=8LC60nY5idMY0njAEWvSbiBBN4N1dKwFTWlDdZd70nUu0ujUnUBNJHpl78crEuJ3Ch4V0H-DLXbLBCd9EqIuRqtapkcvM3YlNsSrE_ykK8kSmfxCN9hykL5nvYX-uwlTerXWHRXhHvtwOgDP_O48bjSqGnwZqX0vzjgrvJd-PHXtptA6g5tT4xZLhjofW8a1YA37Us4AFSpveP1ZniVH8NlQM2WjGKmRGrgjaBaLJE4MPXSljE5lL65m1bXxRrt0zxN6Shihk_MwfbbtAVty_pb9E1nlNYFYrVCR9aT3Rg8fh3czQ2koYl1AyEm_qR0qwkWTgValeDRCQ6EAdeSqwa0VSxaqAhEs1qrj1ZBozLILXY11XVf6cGVuTwXxM4kw4NWNF8dbyFG_Qr9uYjpj7u9_BrWFPGJmNk4iV4wazg0%3D)
**You can request a hardcover Hillsdale College edition of _A Christmas Carol_ by clicking on the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-carol-book](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fea7ff595f3149469b9d75081f7c0e9c&_e=8LC60nY5idMY0njAEWvSbiBBN4N1dKwFTWlDdZd70nUu0ujUnUBNJHpl78crEuJ3Ch4V0H-DLXbLBCd9EqIuRqtapkcvM3YlNsSrE_ykK8kSmfxCN9hykL5nvYX-uwlTerXWHRXhHvtwOgDP_O48bjSqGnwZqX0vzjgrvJd-PHXtptA6g5tT4xZLhjofW8a1YA37Us4AFSpveP1ZniVH8NlQM2WjGKmRGrgjaBaLJE4MPXSljE5lL65m1bXxRrt0qkzNZtmLY4iqJ-w7HN7vapS817vf8PeLbdnj7HKYs1u0QsbyiFUbu63v5zJ4CAf6fMhiiONvxVriWH71yIjRVx69qyiiQOh1rbFiH4JNby1mpwFpbTZThhleg3IcRHSXbeC--3h_kqtT0dFxHKatBn-QINAdgz2lM8J5DZfsB2g%3D)

And may it be truly said of us all that we know how to keep Christmas well.

Merry Christmas to you and yours,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
| | [

Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=fea7ff595f3149469b9d75081f7c0e9c&_t=-riO4q22NRvAFZ4CMKwEv-iLg11uLoGV6Pda4YARLFSSPsQEre3wGvBGRnej_tHaDYxJgkfVaoCrkleH4Bobg2QbWknkdBCN9Dl5MFIk_haaa9mPPvHTbsXHr6ubn3y8)

---

name: David Nammo, Christian Legal Society
subject: Why we need Christian attorneys
body:
Since 1961| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=86ccea33452d4e268bb4e4ef1a421712&_e=gbaFPOAgrvM9HzZgL-e7oAo98QqHFZ0VR7jLbXzGDA7La7t4zAr1MWWlsoFEUpvKmT-d9SYF255bW3rJzYhiBDKtQ_n6RLjA23aC1Mze2MeBdLMwICm6aYxCdtCn27_0kDNl5zSPsPFKxvyXsw0NSDA17b5dTvTLvESMWjKU4-QTtdV3NJ1xLBKjWu--9_aOoiNyb7TQurNsagOJfP6SVw9aW51_lJmaePOxfnL4-vfxeAWBOQw5CReLVZZOEOnZaHbRcY_UvsjgR5W76UgGFvOZIu4IzIglYqyxtrNELLzxx0SnC-YCyFMQ1mCwSxPf)
---
Peter, This is one of the most serious, and most disturbing, threats to Christians in public life . . . yet most Christians in America don't know anything about it! **The last, and strongest, line of legal defense for Christians in the United States may soon be destroyed by ideological activists, with a regulatory change being considered in ALL 50 states.** That could make critical legal victories for Americans of faith--like protection of **personal prayer** without getting fired, protection of **moral conscience** so you can't be forced to dispense abortion-inducing drugs, and even protection of students forming a **Christian student club** --IMPOSSIBLE to pursue . . . . . . and leave Christians and Americans of faith, alongside religious ministries, nonprofits, and schools, without ANY legal defense when they wrongly and unconstitutionally face threats or punishment for their biblical values! **Peter, Christian Legal Society, a fellowship, ministry, and legal defense organization since 1961, is leading the fight to protect Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, state by state.** _**[_**Against a well-organized, well-funded opposition, we're counting on the support of generous Americans of faith like you to stand with us. Would you consider a gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help support Christian Legal Society in this critical work?**_](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=86ccea33452d4e268bb4e4ef1a421712&_e=gbaFPOAgrvM9HzZgL-e7oAo98QqHFZ0VR7jLbXzGDA7La7t4zAr1MWWlsoFEUpvKmT-d9SYF255bW3rJzYhiBDKtQ_n6RLjA23aC1Mze2MeBdLMwICm6aYxCdtCn27_0kDNl5zSPsPFKxvyXsw0NSDA17b5dTvTLvESMWjKU4-RuvBBUKw1qBp8xIOY8f22nqEZlTOd3u8nv7kRs_b3OkTQqxm9pst9xm4r7m9UkUK1w4AwtJ6s-DRj3A5rc82XxxaCZErvoQmIPA5lmOZoFKaww99rhQmWXRFPVl5OPMWyxLmUwEJ5-lEwItnNMvf08)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=86ccea33452d4e268bb4e4ef1a421712&_e=gbaFPOAgrvM9HzZgL-e7oAo98QqHFZ0VR7jLbXzGDA7La7t4zAr1MWWlsoFEUpvKmT-d9SYF255bW3rJzYhiBDKtQ_n6RLjA23aC1Mze2MeBdLMwICm6aYxCdtCn27_0kDNl5zSPsPFKxvyXsw0NSDA17b5dTvTLvESMWjKU4-RKY2-Ia0PP_gsrHHmk_R_siyEEiQfX0eEPI5GQvF5xoXgN4fIqShJYFuPYDI4reSg7IPi6irbkafM8h3q_fneXoHzhU--3AJoPfYjhafMPgA1P02iCBddFoJwbltCp-tld0uWih0EZArzjzWknnO91)
---
For those who don't work in law offices, the rule change I'm discussing may sound boring or unremarkable: it's known as Model Rule 8.4(g) from the American Bar Association. **But its impact has devastating real-world consequences for Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith, as the silencing and punishment of Christian attorneys --and the faithful Americans they would otherwise defend--seems to be the sole goal of this rule change.** Without any examples of why it's needed . . . without any response to the 400+ comments and letters of concern submitted by all attorneys concerned with free speech, the American Bar Association offered no response to rightful concerns that radical activists could use this to:
* **discourage or punish attorneys** from sharing political, social, or religious viewpoints that are outside the current political orthodoxy (today, that's typically defined as "progressive" or "Woke");

* **stop attorneys from volunteering at their churches,** sitting on church boards, or serving schools they've gone to, if those schools are Christian or otherwise religious;

* **prevent attorneys from serving in Christian ministries** , no matter how much good work those ministries do in their communities; and

* **put an end to Christian attorneys doing pro bono work** **to defend religious freedom** on behalf of Christian ministries, nonprofits, or schools that proudly proclaim their commitment to biblical values!

**Peter, there is still time to stop this rule from taking root in America . . . but it requires a 50-state strategy and a major investment of time, talent, and legal work.** Christian Legal Society has led the charge on this important issue since it was first raised in 2015. But to make sure we WIN this fight--and preserve religious freedom and protection for Christian attorneys and, by extension, all Americans of faith--I'm counting on your support. _**[_**Can I count on your generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, or even $500 to help Christian Legal Society save these critical protections for Christian attorneys . . . and every ministry, nonprofit, or believer that those same attorneys would defend?**_](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=86ccea33452d4e268bb4e4ef1a421712&_e=gbaFPOAgrvM9HzZgL-e7oAo98QqHFZ0VR7jLbXzGDA7La7t4zAr1MWWlsoFEUpvKmT-d9SYF255bW3rJzYhiBDKtQ_n6RLjA23aC1Mze2MeBdLMwICm6aYxCdtCn27_0kDNl5zSPsPFKxvyXsw0NSDA17b5dTvTLvESMWjKU4-QOMfaMPfE_U4Qmrs4m5786q28sDE4nzZ8mLHPG8PNuBnC5tPu3ORiKZMe3OL4d5cYVq9hDo1Ksi4ZD4iqGB6YGX3MifXROWboVeP7CC7AT4IebUsNVdacVKVSRWllQI1Q5v9yTTh11Qtm98wBoxTLh)**_
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=86ccea33452d4e268bb4e4ef1a421712&_e=gbaFPOAgrvM9HzZgL-e7oAo98QqHFZ0VR7jLbXzGDA7La7t4zAr1MWWlsoFEUpvKmT-d9SYF255bW3rJzYhiBDKtQ_n6RLjA23aC1Mze2MeBdLMwICm6aYxCdtCn27_0kDNl5zSPsPFKxvyXsw0NSDA17b5dTvTLvESMWjKU4-S93zqEoL5kaRzKe7FfVutbBAkE1INMv-3w4ogbo-ivR1TouOeAHsLns3Koa8fHIkHkye9PzcJB_SuA5j7y09BQahhiMiNgEk3hpNyJpVwvwGn5OZVsAwPTTMFzakhd-snLb7D4brjEDq6TNDH_WGrn)
---
Since 1961, Christian Legal Society has been a fellowship of Christians dedicated to serving Jesus Christ through the practice and study of law, the defense of religious freedom and life, and the provision of legal aid to the needy. And for nearly 50 years, Christian Legal Society's Center for Law & Religious Freedom, which is spearheading the response to this proposed rule change, has defended and advanced all Americans' inalienable rights to religious freedom and life in the public square. **No other organization is leading the charge to defend Christian attorneys and all Americans of faith on this critical issue like Christian Legal Society.** _**[That's why I encourage you--and hope--that you'll make your most generous gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more right now to help Christian Legal Society WIN critical victories in the battles still to come.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=86ccea33452d4e268bb4e4ef1a421712&_e=gbaFPOAgrvM9HzZgL-e7oAo98QqHFZ0VR7jLbXzGDA7La7t4zAr1MWWlsoFEUpvKmT-d9SYF255bW3rJzYhiBDKtQ_n6RLjA23aC1Mze2MeBdLMwICm6aYxCdtCn27_0kDNl5zSPsPFKxvyXsw0NSDA17b5dTvTLvESMWjKU4-TS4CnMy5dHYttaSYe8Jpc--3myoUgdmbhlr1vhC2nhHn6HVOeWEe79zoNaqgtclx-pHj4Zhb2Dw1q4CIfR85KfSmb8ce96w0b7rDkCl_AhSPuuznnpK0lRw8cfoTH9TxHSt1PqqDDWdw32JwsSh5IN)**_ Thank you for your support and for your prayerful consideration. David Nammo
Executive Director & CEO
Christian Legal Society
---
[**Support Christian Legal Society**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=86ccea33452d4e268bb4e4ef1a421712&_e=gbaFPOAgrvM9HzZgL-e7oAo98QqHFZ0VR7jLbXzGDA7La7t4zAr1MWWlsoFEUpvKmT-d9SYF255bW3rJzYhiBDKtQ_n6RLjA23aC1Mze2MeBdLMwICm6aYxCdtCn27_0kDNl5zSPsPFKxvyXsw0NSDA17b5dTvTLvESMWjKU4-RXg_FouFJsMtxqZM-WkFmL7OnJUC4ibjwtnp1oJja6RHOCFVxxNrfKfb4awKzLYoppwKg0qanNqigogR-3OnQqHUQMOGXthpRCRmmJhKU13gznCLCWLypR9z8Od68UioCi_thdcHW5z_8Epuy27gFP)
---
Christian Legal Society
P.O. Box 7712
McLean, VA 22106-7712

[Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=86ccea33452d4e268bb4e4ef1a421712&_t=pJM_dej4Q11VYMCud73FfguogvKzShytLOJVw5-fGOdP457NCLaCKgXe3fiyXIN8pygXsmHJkbXCfMtOfGFNwaVpHxk7_wHyd9TJyjlJMT1qxeDTs0D7Z5dsSQFFMh_E)

clean_body: So now I want to hear from you! | | | | | | It’s obvious how passionate you are about saving the America we know and love. So now that we’ve overcome every obstacle and won back the White House, I’m giving you a platform to decide how we MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. Every time I hear from you, I’m touched by your thoughtful and detailed responses. It’s because of you and you alone that we're going to unlock America's glorious destiny and achieve the most incredible future for our people. Thank you and may God bless you, Donald J. Peter, thanks to you and the dedicated patriots in our movement, we avoided the end of our elections as we know it! Democracy prevailed, and the CHEATING was stopped. subject: Surprise Brad This Holiday Season 🎄
body:
| | | |

I hope you have a wonderful holiday season filled with joy and family. As we approach the end of the year, I wanted to reach out personally with something special in mind.
Brad wishes we didn't have to ask, as he knows so many of you have done so much already to secure his reelection, but he’s concerned about the fight ahead as we head into 2025.
I couldn’t just stand by, which is why I’m writing to you. I wanted to surprise Brad this holiday season by showing him that we’re all standing behind him, just like we always have. **[With the end of the year almost here, your support is critical. name: Conservative Intel
subject: Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWq9bWeWN0

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWq9bWeWN0

Dear
Friend,
In recent
years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans
who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend
raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two
systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?

To
address this, we have created a new eBook, The History of
Socialism and Capitalism, authored by two of the most prominent
voices in today"s political discourse, Hoover Institution senior
fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new
eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and
impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an
in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It"s hard to
overstate the relevance of this eBook in today"s policy debates,
where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of
socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions
about our economic and political future. The insights provided by
Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to
critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their
potential impact on society.

Don"t
miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these
pivotal economic systems. Click here to request your free copy of
The History of Socialism and Capitalism today.

Greg

Greg
Stamps | Online Development
Hoover
Institution | Stanford University

With its
eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the
Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research
organization that seeks to improve the human condition by
advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national
security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred
years, Hoover"s work has directly led to policies that have
produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the
United States and around the world.
