name: Royce White
subject: You would’ve thought I was a criminal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
With the way they went after me
| [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7f102a601b3e40e0be4d355f5381ba76&_e=wJ70b_NA_KtIvRwKtf2YOY_2PnghKyrvwItvMKKB4MRJ1TayDhGxTbiztfxdJ3etsPt2f6YEigYwsmvqMq0S-qQ0NMn_a2JF00zkHUM08OoxSlMeCgIiAGcH0sGQViH0i4EdP1wMYiCvWAdOj9-7vOfk9nct_imDjttRqkUf7HYNGTGFMdueSw0wHT-iHitsga_fhTaACoPTwpwV5ao4O3P6XmiZfLfb-w7iuH80c1OzlxVmnbZy2x7Rc6mzyd5LUjN20WmsY92QihrkVGn-1bq-xE28PlinmI452Fl6NsPhFwEjQ6c53y9n70rMidzvvs6nylNYzEHNZfAoTLRS1Q%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

_The way they went after me, you would 've thought I was a criminal. It's scary..._

The REAL criminals are praised, celebrated, and subsidized. Having kids is seen as the greatest crime against humanity. We have a lot of work to do on our minds.

The Legacy Media teamed up with the Radical Left to CONSTANTLY ATTACK ME and spread LIES about me.

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7f102a601b3e40e0be4d355f5381ba76&_e=wJ70b_NA_KtIvRwKtf2YOY_2PnghKyrvwItvMKKB4MRJ1TayDhGxTbiztfxdJ3etsPt2f6YEigYwsmvqMq0S-qQ0NMn_a2JF00zkHUM08OoxSlMeCgIiAGcH0sGQViH0i4EdP1wMYiCvWAdOj9-7vOfk9nct_imDjttRqkUf7HYNGTGFMdueSw0wHT-iHitsRgm_FTo9Y6VdXHTAbSHzxCRS8s4gjOot-xh-Oxkx3iwo0vqiWNk7DHyOLE5KXJMfBAjdYQhoSnMvPY1YoUBCNv_f6Gvexeq_uaAeeu3O3M9VRvzCfrF0GlwdIES49Tf8KKkXlRGNex-tDVtbYhyFUg%3D%3D)

But, I'm used to it. Ever since my NBA days the Media has found ways to spread false rumors and lies about me.

Now that I'm running for Senate to defeat Tina Smith in 2026, I already know these attacks will continue.

I don't care. I'll NEVER STOP FIGHTING!

**I need your help. My MOST IMPORTANT DEADLINE OF 2024 IS HERE!**

[**Can you chip in ANY AMOUNT to help me reach my 2024 End-of-Year deadline?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7f102a601b3e40e0be4d355f5381ba76&_e=wJ70b_NA_KtIvRwKtf2YOY_2PnghKyrvwItvMKKB4MRJ1TayDhGxTbiztfxdJ3etsPt2f6YEigYwsmvqMq0S-qQ0NMn_a2JF00zkHUM08OoxSlMeCgIiAGcH0sGQViH0i4EdP1wMYiCvWAdOj9-7vOfk9nct_imDjttRqkUf7HYNGTGFMdueSw0wHT-iHitsDwd1tW44YxFjFtoO74MgSwK-FVnUY07pi6XBttabAi8NVnkr82SPNXW82nA5Vykcx0c8cfT3K-KUG1WyeMojVPNyLiIvl5wq6krpNpdXMlP4acavfj2iJO_X7k7FgmwUvAtQvUaLTbU3Hms_VpIc9w%3D%3D)

**_My team told me I need to raise JUST $546 PER DAY to reach my goal. I 'm counting on you to chip in just $15 right now to help me reach my goal._**

THE PEOPLE ARE COMING!
Royce White

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7f102a601b3e40e0be4d355f5381ba76&_e=wJ70b_NA_KtIvRwKtf2YOY_2PnghKyrvwItvMKKB4MRJ1TayDhGxTbiztfxdJ3etsPt2f6YEigYwsmvqMq0S-qQ0NMn_a2JF00zkHUM08OoxSlMeCgIiAGcH0sGQViH0i4EdP1wMYiCvWAdOj9-7vOfk9nct_imDjttRqkUf7HYNGTGFMdueSw0wHT-iHitsMH3giyL0PWe2dW6X08Th-xHvFeJD7RB6NC6HUUW6Ib9fZFADKeXSmXD8UoRTnuSLv4maDX-mxeKrNzEgwIAf2idw0LbniA3dc0NaoCWGJY9tLLMWFtGFJG-IfZx55Nnrs3Dwd1qbJ5AgBzITyYiRQA%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA 's collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation - not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read "Free The Uyghurs." After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=7f102a601b3e40e0be4d355f5381ba76&_e=wJ70b_NA_KtIvRwKtf2YOY_2PnghKyrvwItvMKKB4MRJ1TayDhGxTbiztfxdJ3etsPt2f6YEigYwsmvqMq0S-qQ0NMn_a2JF00zkHUM08OoxSlMeCgIiAGcH0sGQViH0i4EdP1wMYiCvWAdOj9-7vOfk9nct_imDjttRqkUf7HYNGTGFMdueSw0wHT-iHitsit8wlWcQN-YqlVoTIlNJ1zvfhkXLpeYTWNuKtDJeJ5ViifMo_r9lUndCcxhVS-dZN2UacJ4w_NfMNXNWUHfMkzucsfvxyVBChafwE0jWRncN5Zp74fho4fHM6VG_V6fUX1KddPmdwhdxsXJf1XmjEg%3D%3D)

P.O. Box 5473 Hopkins, MN 55343

name: Grover Norquist
subject: Who is John Galt?
body:
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=728ffc4ac3574e1494e7534e1f9fb25c&_e=t_tclPX2lB8ntQ0j5sFQEiOyARR66zUcdruGcKY93FAuXmJYDzyRuUe_lkW01qFZ3cOPe2Mhxa6BcWi-dVgPedHSD9Dnex4Pwytcx0piWdg3yC9505qeUlkNFIyAMu2WL32nTrynC3-HpsHgnaOKKnVFkslruSAbX6QKT-kkSFtnvwYjFrbXhDIWQjC3uEwjg8af3Aqs7CmVUeBXbGnBWuhFBKA3pyL2BJD1wQdk7qou9J79cHqRnEaGP_MkTzdOvVQrU8KvJ1Wg7RaF5CThioLKxuxz4OMrTEkACggDSJhVTV5qqHUquZxyRxaz1cfknNznkvSN757Oe_NJ5XEtjx46WyoBe5VAuUWSvs85hs4%3D)
Friend,

Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand? It took me longer than I'd like to admit.

When I was in high school, my teacher assigned a project where you were to read everything an author had written. I read Mark Twain, but a friend of mine read all the Ayn Rand novels. Unfortunately, I ignored her presentation and missed the point, but I remembered Ayn Rand's name.

In college, I would discuss free market ideas with other students. They kept on saying I must have read _Atlas Shrugged_ or that I was an Objectivist. This happened so often that I decided to investigate.

**So, I went out and read Ayn Rand 's novels and other writings.**

After that, I understood why people thought I was promoting Rand's ideas. _Because I was!_ I just didn't know it yet.

**While it took me until college to first read about Ayn Rand 's philosophy of Objectivism, one organization is finding innovative ways to introduce her ideas to the next generation at an earlier age -- The Atlas Society.**

They are bringing the ideas of Ayn Rand to new audiences through various vehicles, including animated videos, social media, virtual and live events, and graphic novels.

I told the CEO of The Atlas Society, Jennifer Grossman, that I would help her raise $30,000 online this week to provide graphic novels for even more students. **_Every $10 raised helps them distribute 5 new graphic novels_.**

**[Can you please send an urgent donation of $10, $50, or even $100 to The Atlas Society and help them bring these crucial novels to a new generation?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=728ffc4ac3574e1494e7534e1f9fb25c&_e=t_tclPX2lB8ntQ0j5sFQEiOyARR66zUcdruGcKY93FAuXmJYDzyRuUe_lkW01qFZ3cOPe2Mhxa6BcWi-dVgPedHSD9Dnex4Pwytcx0piWdg3yC9505qeUlkNFIyAMu2WL32nTrynC3-HpsHgnaOKKnVFkslruSAbX6QKT-kkSFu5cHXgRAhgM-wqShMUw7D3ugW0cr7zupJom9upD-SkR3o0E01vNV1DkoTdnkGhiaAmbRHXyA1t4e4TmEj82kNn2CZ5gidM1M1ql3h_fgZUn2rYrJRwqJe-jCLIkj9T1rMJu_OIdvaLnPZOA0AqPECB7Bj84XoI_Tq-iSpirrmBPhU3MxCGAqOnVS9t_r4eh7s%3D)**

[Donate](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=728ffc4ac3574e1494e7534e1f9fb25c&_e=t_tclPX2lB8ntQ0j5sFQEiOyARR66zUcdruGcKY93FAuXmJYDzyRuUe_lkW01qFZ3cOPe2Mhxa6BcWi-dVgPedHSD9Dnex4Pwytcx0piWdg3yC9505qeUlkNFIyAMu2WL32nTrynC3-HpsHgnaOKKnVFkslruSAbX6QKT-kkSFt0D69VvYWvpPSgikLLFun2PvVMyItoUB4vuVImnQfL98UURP7_v_1pmC22eow9O0QjAIffc9g4fozJz0EFOJymKsiICUPOIEGbs4zBUDMzRsWhAYSPUONtmzyPbQ-2NOO7CvnAC-4yOzeJzjZqOmvZQd3feANQ2fd8ttlCzIQcGD2-b90ouCMOysu9WIVPCRkdHS8VqVeSUJH6KNC00xA7)

Ayn Rand's works reminded me of what was at stake.

What really hit me were the bad guys in Rand's novels. They weren't over-the-top villains. They were the ones who wanted to mess with the lives and businesses of the productive and place the blame for the consequences on capitalism.

I have met many John Galts, _but I have also met plenty of Ellsworth Tooheys_. Those men are real, and their envy-ridden ideology is what we need to fight.

The best way is to introduce the next generation to the moral case for Capitalism, to provide them with a guide to life that celebrates the remarkable potential and power of the individual.

The Atlas Society has plans to distribute 75,000 copies of their graphic novel versions of Ayn Rand's _ANTHEM_ and _Red Pawn_ this year -- and increase distribution to 100,000 copies next year.

[And with your support, they can reach that goal! Please rush your support today to help The Atlas Society distribute more graphic novels to young Americans.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=728ffc4ac3574e1494e7534e1f9fb25c&_e=t_tclPX2lB8ntQ0j5sFQEiOyARR66zUcdruGcKY93FAuXmJYDzyRuUe_lkW01qFZ3cOPe2Mhxa6BcWi-dVgPedHSD9Dnex4Pwytcx0piWdg3yC9505qeUlkNFIyAMu2WL32nTrynC3-HpsHgnaOKKnVFkslruSAbX6QKT-kkSFtW9hyQ-gF9FUbjg0GUg5VFHW3nrIGeKG5T-sosZSxq9wBlVPJ_zAJfqc0elqlg3nKmSoyAL1fbhjanAQpwpB8oI9xHpNssM6kqxlKwYY15xbyQnBozNYDjRuJOsgoKpoaDNRM8ZSmIrCtlx-rYTbEHO0gdBW5_GeUFiwqL44usAB4sV8LzXaqL9ayfsq_9of4%3D)

They say that politics is downstream from culture, then what is culture
downstream from? Philosophy!

Without a moral philosophy based on reason, achievement, individualism, and freedom, the next generation will continue to embrace a culture of irrationalism, entitlement, victimhood, collectivism, and resentment.

That's why it's so important to adapt Rand's works into a medium that appeals to the next generation. When I was a teen, 70% of my peers read books every day for fun -- _today, only 12% do_.

By contrast, comic sales have increased by nearly $300 million since 2011 and today represent a domestic market worth over $1 billion. Over half of those sales are graphic novels. The Atlas Society jumped on that trend, recruiting top Marvel Comics illustrating talent and bringing Rand's literature to life with vibrant art and action.

Ayn Rand's works reinforce that our fight is on principle. They teach us that everyone should be free to pursue their understanding of the virtuous life limited only by the prohibition of using force against others.

**If you have read Rand, then you are well prepared to have your freedom attacked by those who wish to control the lives of others.**

Your generous support will help The Atlas Society get Ayn Rand's moral ideas to more students by distributing copies of these graphic novels at Comic Cons, libraries, and homeschool groups. Please click below to donate today.

clean_body: Friend, Do you know how I was introduced to the ideas of Ayn Rand? It took me longer than I'd like to admit. When I was in high school, my teacher assigned a project where you were to read everything an author had written. I read Mark Twain, but a friend of mine read all the Ayn Rand novels. Unfortunately, I ignored her presentation and missed the point, but I remembered Ayn Rand's name. In college, I would discuss free market ideas with other students. They kept on saying I must have read Atlas Shrugged or that I was an Objectivist. This happened so often that I decided to investigate. So, I went out and read Ayn Rand 's novels and other writings. After that, I understood why people thought I was promoting Rand's ideas. Because I was! I just didn't know it yet. While it took me until college to first read about Ayn Rand 's philosophy of Objectivism, one organization is finding innovative ways to introduce her ideas to the next generation at an earlier age -- The Atlas Society. They are bringing the ideas of Ayn Rand to new audiences through various vehicles, including animated videos, social media, virtual and live events, and graphic novels. I told the CEO of The Atlas Society, Jennifer Grossman, that I would help her raise $30,000 online this week to provide graphic novels for even more students. Every $10 raised helps them distribute 5 new graphic novels. Ayn Rand's works reminded me of what was at stake. What really hit me were the bad guys in Rand's novels. They weren't over-the-top villains. They were the ones who wanted to mess with the lives and businesses of the productive and place the blame for the consequences on capitalism. I have met many John Galts, but I have also met plenty of Ellsworth Tooheys. Those men are real, and their envy-ridden ideology is what we need to fight. The best way is to introduce the next generation to the moral case for Capitalism, to provide them with a guide to life that celebrates the remarkable potential and power of the individual. The Atlas Society has plans to distribute 75,000 copies of their graphic novel versions of Ayn Rand's ANTHEM and Red Pawn this year -- and increase distribution to 100,000 copies next year. They say that politics is downstream from culture, then what is culture downstream from? Philosophy! Without a moral philosophy based on reason, achievement, individualism, and freedom, the next generation will continue to embrace a culture of irrationalism, entitlement, victimhood, collectivism, and resentment. That's why it's so important to adapt Rand's works into a medium that appeals to the next generation. When I was a teen, 70% of my peers read books every day for fun -- today, only 12% do. By contrast, comic sales have increased by nearly $300 million since 2011 and today represent a domestic market worth over $1 billion. Over half of those sales are graphic novels. The Atlas Society jumped on that trend, recruiting top Marvel Comics illustrating talent and bringing Rand's literature to life with vibrant art and action. Ayn Rand's works reinforce that our fight is on principle. They teach us that everyone should be free to pursue their understanding of the virtuous life limited only by the prohibition of using force against others. If you have read Rand, then you are well prepared to have your freedom attacked by those who wish to control the lives of others. Your generous support will help The Atlas Society get Ayn Rand's moral ideas to more students by distributing copies of these graphic novels at Comic Cons, libraries, and homeschool groups. Please click below to donate today. Thank you, Grover Norquist The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible.

# [President Musk](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153457165&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNDU3MTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ4MDA4MTAsImV4cCI6MTczNzM5MjgxMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fbokSCzTsD1CTt-HvlHxlSKd2dvUMrdiZbD-TMwysf8)
### Yes, we live in an oligarchy
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucaskunce)
---
| Dec 21
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucaskunce)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153457165&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNDU3MTY1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNDgwMDgxMCwiZXhwIjoxNzM3MzkyODEwLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zh8qWtuM6eSWKg28Ucp9XjB-hICqCYb3b_0p44WOE7s&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153457165&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNDU3MTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ4MDA4MTAsImV4cCI6MTczNzM5MjgxMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fbokSCzTsD1CTt-HvlHxlSKd2dvUMrdiZbD-TMwysf8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153457165&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNDU3MTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ4MDA4MTAsImV4cCI6MTczNzM5MjgxMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fbokSCzTsD1CTt-HvlHxlSKd2dvUMrdiZbD-TMwysf8)
---
| | [](https://substack..5fHcdnc0RFOvJK68RWaFS3XFwWwMHOeM9FzLEIPJS5Q?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/president-musk?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

This week the interwebs are abuzz over Elon Musk single-handedly stalling a widely supported bipartisan funding bill. He accomplished this herculean feat via a tweetstorm of [lies](https://substack.com/redirect/79087fce-5c48-4672-a1b6-598813b8577e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), anger, and [vague threats](https://substack.com/redirect/11df569e-e371-411a-9e25-d9eabb267b57?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to primary Republicans who supported the legislation.
The man whose company, Tesla, was rescued in 2009 by a [$465 million Federal loan](https://substack.com/redirect/27473f6d-d9ab-4f71-837b-0606930099a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and who makes [billions off the federal government](https://substack.com/redirect/bf81d3da-2e37-4f9e-8094-02e695770ec4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), now apparently runs it. Fox & Friends was delighted to have Musk in charge, trumpeting that Musk is now "the center of the universe on Capitol Hill in a way that nobody has ever seen."
A fact that will certainly help him navigate all the [federal investigations into](https://substack.com/redirect/680c0baf-ff3c-436a-9c9b-ec96465a6f52?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) his misdeeds.
If we didn't have enough evidence before, this makes it official: the United States is now an oligarchy. One man's rage-tweeting is now more influential than everyone else in the country. After all, [75% of Americans](https://substack.com/redirect/47e834af-81b9-402b-8eda-74685f911919?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) believe that using a government shutdown as a negotiating tactic is wrong.
Musk's take on a shutdown? The opposite of the American people. Who cares?! [Not a big deal.](https://substack.com/redirect/2dc13010-954d-4f53-98ae-875b3a606a97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Except that I've lived through one at the Pentagon, and I know better.
I was a Marine stationed at the Pentagon during the 2018-2019 shutdown. A lot of us were already working 10+ hours a day and not seeing our families enough or sometimes at all -- and then, just as the holidays were coming up, we had to cover for furloughed civilian employees...
Service members at military facilities across the country had to deal with the same thing. The Coast Guard couldn't even fund two paychecks. But this was more than just needlessly letting politics punish military families.
No matter what DC politicians and Elon Musk tell you, the Pentagon and many facilities that are critical to our safety can't function properly without civilian employees -- there just aren't enough service members to cover for them. That shutdown was a real threat to our national security, and so was this one.
But it shouldn't surprise anyone that Musk doesn't care about our national security. Shoot, the man's under investigation for [flouting security clearance rules](https://substack.com/redirect/4a7e5407-8a95-4c8f-97b9-aeb2dc94d4e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and refusing to disclose his foreign contacts (like personal calls with Vladimir Putin!).
In fact, the real reason that Musk wanted to kill this bill had nothing to do with the amount of money that was in it or any of the complaints he made publicly.
No, his hatred for the deal was actually _about_ national security, and his desire to put his business interests ahead of US security. You see, the original bill included provisions that increased scrutiny on investment in China -- investment that Musk is heavily committed to and dependent upon.
I bet you can't guess what was taken out of the final spending bill? A few red herrings like children's cancer research and doctor bonuses, so that it wouldn't be obvious, and, of course, quietly the provisions against investment in China.
And suddenly Musk is cool with it.
Going hard on China is supposedly one of the major planks of the incoming Trump administration. So the fact that it was removed from this bill tells you everything you need to know about who is in charge.
Musk, born in South Africa to non-Americans, is constitutionally prohibited from being the President, but, in an oligarchy, sometimes that power's for sale.
How much did this presidential power cost Musk? An embarrassingly meager [$250 million](https://substack.com/redirect/51702a5c-0b48-439f-872c-c56030f1d94f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in campaign contributions. Well, that and I guess showing his commitment to the venture by potentially even [committing election spending crimes](https://substack.com/redirect/cbd15418-1393-4b19-8d99-479304ff6dea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with that money.
Which takes us back to another mark of an oligarchy: no accountability. Something we have talked about in previous posts. Whether it's [Big Tech](https://substack.com/redirect/f22444bf-d214-4151-920f-289b860a8027?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) destroying [competition](https://substack.com/redirect/637a285d-4926-4f5e-b3e8-26d9376a0981?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Big Pharma](https://substack.com/redirect/ac1434f1-5600-451b-958c-c587d5d1bfdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) getting [people killed](https://substack.com/redirect/f4dbceea-0455-4b09-923b-0a545b69edb1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), or just about [every billionaire](https://substack.com/redirect/90ebf78d-12ce-4684-8596-deb3622344a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the country doing whatever they please, they all seem to get away with destroying our lives if they're willing to pay for the right.
In this case, Musk really has nothing to worry about. Because he can just get a pardon.
Really, though, it's not fair of me to say that President Musk's office cost him a paltry $250 million. That doesn't do the real price justice. There are thousands of people in our country that could and would take that power for $250 million. No, there is also the $44 billion it cost him to buy Twitter (alongside the Saudis, speaking of foreign entanglements) and his willingness to use his ownership of that platform to force feed everyone his thoughts and demands non-stop.
One sad thing here is that many, including the media, still use Twitter as their baseline for what is newsworthy. I learned that during my campaign. And it gives Musk and company a massive portal into conversations in our country and access to and presence with the media.
Many of you have mentioned concerns with the media and what is going on there in your comments, so coming up I will have a two-parter on the media. In part one, a special guest who is intimately familiar with both independent and mainstream media will give us his observations, and then in part two I'll talk a little bit about some of my experiences with the media during the campaign.
Until then, please keep the comments and emails coming and please continue to share the Substack with anyone you think might be interested!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=153457165&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTUzNDU3MTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3MzQ4MDA4MTAsImV4cCI6MTczNzM5MjgxMCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fbokSCzTsD1CTt-HvlHxlSKd2dvUMrdiZbD-TMwysf8)
And if you have the means and interest to support our work, please **[consider a paid subscription](https://substack.com/redirect/aa1525a7-dacc-4ea5-9fe4-d9351a8c79d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** so we can keep it up.
-- Lucas

name: =?utf-8?q?Don=E2=80=99t_Privatize_USPS_via_Our_Revolution?=
subject: Add your name: Save USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Trump’s latest victim in his relentless push for privatization? USPS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20729?t=1011&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ][IMG]

This week, Trump confirmed developing plans to privatize USPS as soon as
he gets into the White House. And all of us will pay the price.

Privatizing this essential service would be a direct attack on a public
good we all rely on – especially rural communities. USPS’s “universal
service obligation” requires it to deliver mail regardless of distance or
profitability concerns, which means it is often the only carrier that will
deliver to rural parts of the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20729?source=email-122124&t=1012&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]That’s why Our Revolution is fighting tooth and nail to save USPS. But
it’s going to take a massive outcry from the public to do it. Will you
join this urgent call to save USPS NOW?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20729?source=email-122124&t=1013&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]ADD YOUR NAME

Privatizing the U.S. Postal Service would send an earthquake through the
systems we all rely on to get vital medication, Social Security checks,
and so much more. It would completely alter consumer shipping and business
supply chains, all while pushing hundreds of thousands of federal workers
out of the government. Not to mention adding a profit tax on a public
good.

There’s no question it would be a disaster for our communities. But one of
Trump's top economic advisers made their plans clear, telling the press
“We didn’t finish the job in the first term, but we should finish it now.”

Already, Elon Musk’s “Department of Government Efficiency” is having
secret conversations about how to gut the Postal Service. Our Revolution
is fighting back, ready to overwhelm Congress with a MASSIVE call to save
USPS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/20729?source=email-122124&t=1014&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]We won’t let up until privatization plans are off the table, but it
could be a long fight ahead and we need your support to make this huge.
Will you add your name?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-122124.le2Fla&t=1007&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-122124.vgsq3U&t=1008&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-122124.gPLvtB&t=1009&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-122124.2Tx-UO&t=1010&akid=7424%2E5885482%2EEi0-KK ]GIVE ONCE

name: Labin Duke
subject: Make Your Christmas Brighter with Hillsdale College
body:
Celebrate Christmas with Hillsdale College and Receive a Special Ornament

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c3e60aea7a6a40499287ea85879b753a&_e=QqeftcsUGI0ry5pAC3KxDLgkuBR4fjFOguQ9W1CaTjnor5nJTD0FXeKZ1gBgg8tMHiubeXjOyN3hE1E_jZjKKMzbWkt6qR_yOh1V4rqYwYH9-aQslXpCFa-xciHpCJtaWK9zFjcWemO5lFONGgeUb86NSJs9IHEdZl0fzCYmUiGi5aHb_AMCri8dgBxrPdN6Mod65GvwLe5GVrseXHORXEWqXTTS6g9F2oUdxsY2ScUzsIsGXQpF969dLy6m-5T0nGX0XKR_R9Pe8Vv8YKjJuFehPKgsE4wRCWO3QGtRScXt6ujydcJT9cW9T0IimG5Phn5z773SEfCTow5-tlC913RDEj5HnDfQig1xlqYMmO8ahpuHKFVRIJqb95zJOyHyvENrSj2olhYG8-5-_fFIsVD69CklXXQe0rGA01d6iMI%3D)
---
| |
Peter,

Christmas is a time to reflect on the blessings we've been given, the principles we hold dear, and the opportunities we have to give back.

It's also a season to remember the meaning of Christmas--faith, hope, and generosity.

Since our founding in 1844, we have been dedicated to learning, character, faith, and freedom. And we accomplish this work entirely through the support of generous individuals like you--not one penny of government funding.

**This Christmas, we invite you to join us in this mission by making a special year-end gift. As a symbol of our gratitude, we 'll send you a limited-edition Hillsdale College Christmas ornament for your gift of $50 or more.**

Each ornament is a beautiful reminder of the Christmas season. Supplies are limited. It's a meaningful keepsake to hang on your tree or share with a loved one.

Your generosity will have a lasting impact by helping Hillsdale College:

* **Provide** free online courses to millions of Americans, such as "The Genesis Story," "Ancient Christianity," and "C.S. Lewis on Christianity."
* **Reach** over 6.6 million households and businesses with _Imprimis_ , our free "digest of liberty."
* **Restore** excellence to K-12 education through our network of classical charter schools, which teach American history and civics.

We accomplish all this while remaining independent of all government funding, thanks to your generous support. Your gift today will help us continue to provide these free resources and promote the principles of liberty and faith far and wide.

**You can reserve your ornament by making a tax-deductible gift here:** [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/christmas-ornament](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=c3e60aea7a6a40499287ea85879b753a&_e=QqeftcsUGI0ry5pAC3KxDLgkuBR4fjFOguQ9W1CaTjnor5nJTD0FXeKZ1gBgg8tMHiubeXjOyN3hE1E_jZjKKMzbWkt6qR_yOh1V4rqYwYH9-aQslXpCFa-xciHpCJtaWK9zFjcWemO5lFONGgeUb86NSJs9IHEdZl0fzCYmUiGi5aHb_AMCri8dgBxrPdN6Mod65GvwLe5GVrseXHORXEWqXTTS6g9F2oUdxsY2ScUzsIsGXQpF969dLy6m-5T0nGX0XKR_R9Pe8Vv8YKjJuGHAK2elOFcNAOS-I4TKokSib9SDIJmj74aNef64e3K_PwVNosbohBeD0i1Xf2OXMlJlwQDsrYMumYcwllVTDTxkA-neLxWVIUCzOjvKhPOnIfBO0nHbLslxevrm_PfdvMcx-sL0PIUMsUdEGeVITvk%3D)

Thank you for your kindness and support.

On behalf of everyone at Hillsdale College--our students, faculty, and staff--I wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year.

Warm regards,

Labin Duke, Th.M.
Associate Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College [

Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=c3e60aea7a6a40499287ea85879b753a&_t=oUyLKlbCnOWKJkEiUJSIaro-kPu312DxADcmGsX0xpXGpbxjiNYvb5Wn7MsPZYNqa56RSa0hHkNrfVUBXOGd4mYiBr5RUrbh9CUOX2M96cWsBxp9gEUCEJ18D6ppJVJL)

body:
I was out running errands for the holidays when my campaign manager called.

| Hey team — I was out running errands for the holidays when my campaign manager called. **What he told me was so bad that I pulled over immediately: our fundraising has fallen 27% below where we anticipated it to be.** If we can’t turn this around, I’m on the chopping block, and Democrats could lose our shot at taking back the House. I’m sure you’re busy, so I won’t waste any more of your time. Will you chip in at the secure link below to help us get back on track? clean_body: I was out running errands for the holidays when my campaign manager called. | Hey team — I was out running errands for the holidays when my campaign manager called. What he told me was so bad that I pulled over immediately: our fundraising has fallen 27% below where we anticipated it to be. If we can’t turn this around, I’m on the chopping block, and Democrats could lose our shot at taking back the House. I’m sure you’re busy, so I won’t waste any more of your time. Will you chip in at the secure link below to help us get back on track? = Thanks. Gonna try to focus on errands and hope we’re in a better place by the time I check later. Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress Jared Moskowitz for Congress PO Box 8784 Coral Springs, FL 33065 United States www.jaredforflorida.com to receive fewer emails. Click here to .

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Why Not Us?
body:
Help RMV Take Back Colorado!
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
| | |
---
| | Peter,
I hope this email finds you full of good cheer as you anticipate Christmas. This time of year, I feel so grateful to live in the great State of Colorado, with its picturesque beauty that truly captures the magic of the season.
As I count my blessings at Christmas time, I count you among them. I am so grateful to have faithful readers like you fighting to take back our state. Even though Trump won the presidency, we still have much work to do!
Across America, voters scorned the Left's woke mind virus, opting instead for sanity and security. The mandate they gave the incoming Trump administration is clear: _get America back on track_. The economy, immigration, national security, and self-governance are all areas many people are optimistic about improving come January.
This begs the question, “**Why not Colorado**?”
Over the past decade, our great state has seen an influx of people from out-of-state, many of whom decided to bring their leftist voting habits with them. Apathy has infected many conservative Coloradans, and this simply cannot continue.
Rejecting far-left, woke policies has become a trend in much of America. [Will you help us start the trend here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)?
---
[Take Back Our State!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
The Rocky Mountain Voice is dedicated to informing our readers about what’s really happening in Colorado. Under progressive leadership, prosperous cities all over America have become unlivable. **We must stop that from happening in our beloved state**!
With just days remaining in 2024, will you join our mission to turn the tide in Colorado? Consider [making a tax-deductible donation today](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and help us return Colorado to the free and thriving frontier of the West!
With your gift of [$40, $60, or even $100](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), you are funding RMV’s efforts to report the news that you won’t hear anywhere else. Legacy media has been controlling and manipulating people for far too long.
At RMV, our only agenda is the truth. By giving today, you can help us deliver it!

| | |
---
| | | **For Colorado,**
**Heidi Ganahl** **CEO, RMV**
---

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Tell Congress: Immigrants are our ‘Neighbors, Not Enemies’
body:
The Neighbors Not Enemies Act would repeal the outdated Alien Enemies Act once and for all.
#
Peter,
In his second presidency, **Donald Trump plans to deport millions of immigrants — and potentially their U.S. citizen family members — using a xenophobic law from the 1790s.**
The rarely used Alien Enemies Act (AEA) is an outdated war-time law that could let the Trump administration detain and deport people without regard for human rights or basic due process. This is the same law used to justify the internment of Japanese, German, and Italian immigrants during World War II — a horrific chapter in U.S. history that we cannot allow the far right to repeat.
But Justice Democrats incumbent Rep. Ilhan Omar is fighting back.
**Ilhan introduced a new bill alongside Senator Mazie Hirono called _The Neighbors Not Enemies Act_ , which would repeal this law once and for all, effectively stopping Trump’s mass deportation machine.**
**[Will you join Ilhan and stand with immigrant communities by urging your senators and member of Congress to support _The Neighbors Not Enemies Act_ today?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140536?t=2&akid=36254%2E1203867%2EA9R7Cd)**
**[Take Action](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140536?t=3&akid=36254%2E1203867%2EA9R7Cd)**
This law was always unjust, and it’s time to repeal it before Trump can use it to tear countless families apart in 2025.
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20241221-36254-footer&t=4&refcode2=36254_1203867_A9R7Cd&akid=36254%2E1203867%2EA9R7Cd)**
---

clean_body: The Neighbors Not Enemies Act would repeal the outdated Alien Enemies Act once and for all. Peter, In his second presidency, Donald Trump plans to deport millions of immigrants — and potentially their U.S. citizen family members — using a xenophobic law from the 1790s. The rarely used Alien Enemies Act (AEA) is an outdated war-time law that could let the Trump administration detain and deport people without regard for human rights or basic due process. This is the same law used to justify the internment of Japanese, German, and Italian immigrants during World War II — a horrific chapter in U.S. history that we cannot allow the far right to repeat. But Justice Democrats incumbent Rep. Ilhan Omar is fighting back. Ilhan introduced a new bill alongside Senator Mazie Hirono called The Neighbors Not Enemies Act , which would repeal this law once and for all, effectively stopping Trump’s mass deportation machine. This law was always unjust, and it’s time to repeal it before Trump can use it to tear countless families apart in 2025. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. JusticeDemocrats.com 1390 Columbia Ave #261 Lancaster PA 17603 Email us: mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: This critical organization is on the frontlines of addressing poverty:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Brightmoor Connection offers their clients the dignity of shopping through a grocery aisle, without the stigma of a traditional food pantry experience. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWD48JYhu71A1w9YguMTRlMJ0sL-QfxkT-wlvzyfD0DtGZ2GfagSRQlpLCehafMorHZapznEVELxN2Xu95OPFIdHcBY48n1KvXPKBF5uBOA4Bqqo3K_R0dhePlaJYuk-vIi7QMckWiqCsK_GkC513DOGjPqyWugw97lRypgEsHBHnma4Th4uctF1GeQwLXTaSi8tOOuHqmqVD8J9P1U8gCjmeJrtnIX9BCLW9Rd6eRUKUMSZ6tDVTNWflxjXxSdJxZ/4ch/3yPNSLuSSa2RfgBEYzg2HQ/h0/h001.IpH6fUr0hetXVUxouvLxaXnaFgV9nH9LMc1BeUGBEhk)
---
Friend, When we talk about combating poverty, it’s not just through critical federal programs such as SNAP food benefits and the federal housing program. **So much important work happens right in our communities.** The Brightmoor Connection is on the frontlines of combating poverty in our community, which sits well below 200% of the federal poverty level. Based in the Brightmoor neighborhood of Detroit, where many historically marginalized people live, the Brightmoor Connection serves 1,700 families each year. **They offer their clients the dignity of shopping through a grocery aisle, without the stigma of a traditional food pantry experience.** People receive about 80 – 100 pounds of food per monthly visit. They can also pick up other resources like clothing, and shop by appointment. And the Brightmoor Connection provides a water station because, outrageously, thousands of residents in our community do not have access to clean water in their homes. [**This holiday season, food pantries across the country rely on our generosity in order to serve those most in need. Will you join me in making a contribution to the Brightmoor Connection Food Pantry, an essential resource for Detroit’s community?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ0NUc10p69M2nxV_W4rFBvfToNWniLaTW63VDt7dfdaAjQxN8RCELBCZ2ZWLxu3iawDFGnMMFnqlqcEG6NVLmSqhGjMi35wlZ_Yv3wL2hpd5P8b7OncxyNVJbF91fBDucNCovUafKI1PbIW7CvNjD_up0vAX6pSUdifn3eiMXkexRh8v5o2ovsjph_bq6RfRRQRd47T7BPHUtV-5KHd06be4HYYSTOg8O758Bq0JMwfHVuNpZqISm4pAZRNyAObamFISOOUtJojB2wMkJcAuu6kgzx0oSSdCv9ttK3YmGIblQ5EGMaIgFzzmIMIMqJglF8hAyBL97Eq_4TUC7wxEYxtalOt4HKyWPZ0VcRIlZCxc8dCzoq_J1KsMA7KJO2lP4JT17l3Ql3YrHM58M_SoJuhShS4Mu1jC6ISXonvpmY_c/4ch/3yPNSLuSSa2RfgBEYzg2HQ/h1/h001.S8DnnOmn9KdndnRQSFubjphivqR-2Q1yfhqaJ-_2YlY) | [DONATE TO BRIGHTMOOR CONNECTION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJ0NUc10p69M2nxV_W4rFBvfToNWniLaTW63VDt7dfdaDanLCg0kbtBANgSiLZ7Ndh3DvXd6hh3qGaig3vHEEDR6Gt_6v-4J3kg7CRgOXGDD9tQXiD55WiJruCUuJVIoFSkLRW2jAoTZdqFyMtHtT5oWyz0ItxwRlucuW_ZCQGFkwTG4tKuYJivV2YIZFkOOneGDi3R8JFF4Z10lJDHHnFFg_wPK3CP2IxNDu8h5Id0iyz44BNJKF8bosPUhZkbqPaYFmXvd131J6mZxbzxx3i5nGEQ5V0h28FdqUSoVGpZuO9or3C3Eiu6kj9XKY6zyPzyxUvIk2sAay2AGN1K26WrD8Lo3Lm3PT0LzPeNFgf42R3XS8d3T3oErMiVHL0sPXj_CqqEo1nCBu6DFL6fkZ1Q08GjnBESC1R6bFaJxV-ImY/4ch/3yPNSLuSSa2RfgBEYzg2HQ/h2/h001.fUPEfbvoe7etPkJAqfiJHEKpJv228YxJmCnEas72M_w)

name: Sarah Elfreth
subject: Common sense prevailed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elfreth for Maryland
body:
We came far too close to a government shutdown yesterday.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99084129/518782668/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-12-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWYyZTViYy1jNGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_xXBrFyo_HSEFL08Yck5rRuTT0cpVqLIZ_KSffV4gM=)
---
| We came far too close to a government shutdown yesterday.

Here’s what happened: Republicans and Democrats had been working together for weeks on a bipartisan budget deal. But at the order of President-elect Trump and Elon Musk, House Republicans walked away at the last minute on Thursday and were on the verge of threatening our national security, economic stability, and the well-being of countless Maryland families—just as we enter the holiday season.

Thankfully, cooler heads prevailed, compromise was reached, and this morning, President Biden signed the bipartisan measure to keep the government open.

I’m grateful that 1.5 million federal employees, including the 44,000 federal employees who proudly call Maryland’s Third Congressional District home, will remain on the job and compensated. I’m grateful that, while the compromise bill was far from perfect, it does include the critical funding we need to rebuild the Key Bridge. That would not have happened without the tenacity and leadership of our current Congressional delegation and Governor Wes Moore.

I have proudly worked across the aisle during my six years serving in the Maryland Senate, and I am fully committed to doing just that when I get to Congress on January 3rd. Working across the aisle goes both ways. It means working towards common ground and putting the American people first.

There will certainly be more trials ahead, but I am more committed than ever to fighting every day to bring people together, solve problems, and deliver for the 3rd Congressional District.

Onward,

Sarah Elfreth
---

* * *
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99084130/518782669/-1719677217?refcode=BLU_EM_SEFC_2024-12-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZWYyZTViYy1jNGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3_xXBrFyo_HSEFL08Yck5rRuTT0cpVqLIZ_KSffV4gM=)

body:
We can’t stop MSNBC from becoming a far-right Trump channel like Fox News if Democrats aren’t even watching anymore...
| **Wait, first Elon Musk threatens to _BUY_ MSNBC, and now _THIS?_** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20241221_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=18293%2E878179%2EMlku_6) [We can’t stop MSNBC from becoming a far-right Trump channel like _Fox News_ if Democrats aren’t even watching anymore — so we need to know if you still watch and support MSNBC:](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20241221_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=18293%2E878179%2EMlku_6) | [I PROUDLY STAND WITH MSNBC »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20241221_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=18293%2E878179%2EMlku_6)
---
**If Democrats sit back and ignore these warnings,** Elon Musk WILL buy MSNBC and destroy one of the only media sources we can always depend on!

**But if top Democrats (like you!) step up in support of MSNBC,** we will have the people-powered fuel we need to save the day for our beloved news programs!

[We need at least 2,000 signatures from your state to protect our news from MAGA ruin: Will you add your name to our list of Democrats who still watch and support MSNBC? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20241221_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=9&akid=18293%2E878179%2EMlku_6)
[I PROUDLY STAND WITH MSNBC »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-msnbc/?source=VPP_20241221_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=10&akid=18293%2E878179%2EMlku_6)
---
Thank you for taking action!

The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=18293%2E878179%2EMlku_6). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=18293%2E878179%2EMlku_6).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=18293%2E878179%2EMlku_6) to request fewer emails. clean_body: | | | If you'd like to unsubscribe, | | Knowa De Baraso, 12 year old political influencer, knows exactly where his priorities lie. He sat down with one of our founders, Annie Andrews, and told her how passionately he feels about standing up for what is right despite potentially alienating his followers. It is our responsibility as adults to follow in Knowa’s footsteps and fight for what is right, no matter what pushback we may receive in return. Help us fight for our children’s future, and ensure bright kids like Knowa have a strong foundation to continue to push for change when it’s their turn to lead. | | Knowa told Annie: “I would rather alienate half my base than allow Republicans to alienate half the country.” Just like Knowa, we’re committed to protecting the people who are alienated by Republican policies. Instead, we help elect Kids First Candidates who are fighting for our kids’ futures with solutions like affordable healthcare, higher wages, safer schools, and opportunities for every child in America to thrive. Our country needs change so our children’s futures can thrive. body:
To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99086019/518788424/-1370342705?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-12-21_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxMDkyNWI4LWM3YmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TIYBQO3MpYx9blaAW5eaywOeRFBtc-vQcHWUM8EfdBY=)
---
Peter,

As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022.

However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia.

Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone!

Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth.

[_**That’s why I’m asking you to invest in my campaign and Fight for Progress today as we build the strongest foundation possible. Even $5 or $10 makes a big difference!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99086020/518788425/-1370342705?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-12-21_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxMDkyNWI4LWM3YmYtZWYxMS04OGNlLTAwMjI0ODJhOTNhZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=TIYBQO3MpYx9blaAW5eaywOeRFBtc-vQcHWUM8EfdBY=)

clean_body: To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. | = Peter, As I look ahead to November 2025, there’s no doubt my race will be a close one — just like my races in 2018, 2020, and 2022. However, now I am running for an even bigger seat and to represent even more Virginians (well, all of them!). To win in this competitive race, people need to know who I am, how hard I am working for them, and why I’m running to be the next Governor of Virginia. Already, I’m hearing directly from voters on the issues that are most important to them – supporting our public schools, protecting our democracy, reducing gun violence, safeguarding voting rights and reproductive rights, and so much more. From Carroll County to Chesapeake to Charlottesville and everywhere in between – I can’t wait to meet everyone! Since I’m now running to represent the entire Commonwealth, not just the Seventh District, I have many new voters, community leaders, and organizations to meet, and I need your support to make sure our campaign has the resources necessary to reach every voter across our Commonwealth. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. __First:__ Florida Governor Ron DeSantis announced a Special Election to replace Matt Gaetz.

Do not forget this:

Republicans are BARELY hanging onto the House Majority. **If Democrats flip even one or two of these Special Elections, our Republican Trifecta could come CRASHING DOWN.**

The consequences of Democrats winning back the House would be unthinkable. They'd have the power to bring President Trump's entire legislative agenda to a screeching halt - despite his historic mandate!

**_[That's why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks - before early voting begins - to help fill Matt Gaetz's seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump's agenda.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=7dac100b11104013a46a9818096fa597&_e=4lGrv_38kf_Bigf4WpttzlyjMbsut7pVcolThSCutHIeUWkvSdrFx3GdhoISBDNjJpwS5q5hGMkU3GJYtnsqpapmVIajdpEN4EuRfjd3tZRX-K_WCGEHlQtSCRXR7D9X4ng_q151MOwppCkO91hvqNSDfA3onuW_JMlLY6xfZjxVLWAGkKivEjkoAQNd6Z-JCXqfeJl-lgpNxOpAWjqZ44__8kliiAqtUbpGOtmqhLQho2PLS4odYbdlX-BtqtlK3aiNSRb0d4aOVcj5H6gpkYSGd-whlDx2tHQVhK8OPSkzOpNDM9Un64utzz1AoHBRHx-N3rSwW2KOl_hBvSSaV8dXqNKgYWFM7l-GGeGnL60zlrc_I1HVvLvg92dx69B31x0RBwpH3C1dMb_vNeKNiau_eZCGu4OpE3lRFwQNVp0%3D "That’s why Majority Leader Steve Scalise set a goal for House Republicans to raise a million bucks – before early voting begins – to help fill Matt Gaetz’s seat with another true America First Patriot, help win every Special Election, and deliver on President Trump’s agenda.")_**

_Can you please help us? _

A mob of pro-abortion students **[screamed at pro-life speaker Lydia Taylor Davis](https://substack.com/redirect/07d944dd-f0a6-4940-bc6b-abe258aed2c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during an off-the-rails speaking event at Virginia Commonwealth University.
"Get off our campus!!" one student shouted at Davis' face, before a physical confrontation nearly broke out between two emotionally charged students.
**[Watch how she handles this tense situation:](https://substack.com/redirect/07d944dd-f0a6-4940-bc6b-abe258aed2c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/07d944dd-f0a6-4940-bc6b-abe258aed2c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

---|---|---
The wine aisle? Controlled by a handful of corporations, packed with mass-produced bottles and slick marketing.
[This wine club is different.](https://substack.com/redirect/970638d7-cc8b-4f03-b236-e175cbba88f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) They deliver **rare, small-batch wines** from family-run vineyards in renowned wine regions--crafted with tradition, free from additives, and delivered to your door.
This is wine made the right way. **[Politibrawl readers get $20 off their first box.](https://substack.com/redirect/970638d7-cc8b-4f03-b236-e175cbba88f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* * *
# **Bill O'Reilly DESTROYS Chris Cuomo when he tries to defend Hunter Biden**
Bill O'Reilly EXPLODED at Chris Cuomo for claiming that Hunter Biden is being wrongfully targeted by republicans for "BS" crimes "almost no one ever gets charged for."
"He didn't pay his taxes on more than $2 million," O'Reilly snapped at Cuomo.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/739ed52d-04ac-401e-aad0-47f1a94af7e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/739ed52d-04ac-401e-aad0-47f1a94af7e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Cuomo continued to try to stand up for Hunter, framing him as a scapegoat to appease unjustified republican judicial wrath.
"First of all, do you know how few people get prosecuted for paying taxes late and hiding income the way he did?!!" Cuomo fired back.
President Joe Biden pardoned his son earlier this month, absolving him of any federal crimes he may have committed since 2014, including a conviction for an illegal gun purchase as well as evading paying $1.4 million in taxes, the Associated Press **[reported](https://substack.com/redirect/5727a00f-48c5-41f3-bcf5-dec1c79f404c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
* * *
# _**Resurfaced:**_**Trump pulls black woman from the crowd, what he does next is amazing**
Watch this breathtaking resurfaced moment when Donald Trump called a black woman from the crowd during a press conference and **[gave her a surprise job interview in from of millions watching.](https://substack.com/redirect/c56d3445-d0dc-4d12-9fa7-55e1cec92998?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"I just had a good feeling about her, Trump told reporters after the unexpected encounter.
**[Watch what happens next:](https://substack.com/redirect/c56d3445-d0dc-4d12-9fa7-55e1cec92998?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

**BAD NEWS:** _MSNBC’s_ sharp drop in recent ratings has led to Comcast deciding to sell the network. **** 500 LOCAL POLL RESPONSES NEEDED BY 11:59 PM TO MAKE THIS POLL VIABLE. ****
Donald Trump and his MAGA army have waged a war against any news channel that doesn’t bow down to him and promote his dangerous rhetoric.

body:
Today, we’re exactly 3 weeks from when the new Congress will be sworn in.

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=FczFOEna72KDXGqVHRkxcqn4JralS%2BZ%2BfG3s69YdtcKKeHSNNyZH0HD2QYPoHatrEhP23HfWJzuLf8V1Jv8fi5Gcq%2B5VSKxYIuxIxEf1UbyK%2FY0wg5T7QLEIwhBr9RLHGbH9r5e6Rxig0DC7vsGMn1653Vjshy4D0dy9yk5n70c9JnyCoKt2LU5LKqv%2FMQjrS4z7rw1a6Kgk4%2F3%2B%2Btqp7y%2B2e9mmBRqKVQzz%2BFmEs0o4B%2FPJGmXAG8jPx84eF7SMgMc9k5unvsqmwtEVgDI0kBKpf%2BL46OzU2t0UzeODFrXlMxxcpGC33tb%2B2iJZtinFCb0ybm0on1iqBIH4HQVTlLyyXITHFbepR7ewi4JZk2dr1JwFUJsdUmnVKJne0uSzqDDU7oZdRznfoczLInknUfjtAeoOCYxjs0YaIZeDg5Qep9%2Fl47dmd52siT7nnou9)

| |
---
Today — December 21st — tells us more than that we’re just 10 days from kicking off the new year. It also means there are now just **_3 short weeks until the new Congress is sworn in._** While Dr. Ruiz is proud and committed to continue bringing benefits for the families of CA-25, there’s a caveat: we need to prepare for a Republican trifecta across both houses of Congress and the White House. [Will you send your support of $10 today to help us keep up the fight for progress in this critical moment?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99086326/518789298/936119956?amount=10&source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_122124_1_1_3Weeks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZhZTkyOTEtYzliZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c6aJL_PjpufFjwVuoUu1AWqDrHJnhfIn4Z8c2AwoFU8=) | | **[DONATE TODAY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99086329/518789301/936119956?amount=10&source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_122124_1_1_3Weeks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZhZTkyOTEtYzliZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c6aJL_PjpufFjwVuoUu1AWqDrHJnhfIn4Z8c2AwoFU8=)**
---
Now more than ever, our top priority must be uniting against Donald Trump and his Project 2025 agenda — but the odds are stacked against us.
That’s why over these next 3 weeks, we need to build up our war chest like never before to ensure our team on the ground has the resources to continue connecting with voters, sharing our message, and laying the groundwork for the road ahead.
This won’t be easy, but having you on our side will make all the difference in accomplishing just that. [That’s why we’re asking: Will you stand with Dr. Ruiz today by chipping in $10 or any amount to fuel our efforts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99086332/518789304/936119956?amount=10&source=SBD_EM_FR_30DO_122124_1_1_3Weeks&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWZhZTkyOTEtYzliZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=c6aJL_PjpufFjwVuoUu1AWqDrHJnhfIn4Z8c2AwoFU8=)

In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. clean_body: Today, we’re exactly 3 weeks from when the new Congress will be sworn in. While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Today — December 21st — tells us more than that we’re just 10 days from kicking off the new year. It also means there are now just 3 short weeks until the new Congress is sworn in. While Dr. Ruiz is proud and committed to continue bringing benefits for the families of CA-25, there’s a caveat: we need to prepare for a Republican trifecta across both houses of Congress and the White House. = | | = Now more than ever, our top priority must be uniting against Donald Trump and his Project 2025 agenda — but the odds are stacked against us. That’s why over these next 3 weeks, we need to build up our war chest like never before to ensure our team on the ground has the resources to continue connecting with voters, sharing our message, and laying the groundwork for the road ahead. This won’t be easy, but having you on our side will make all the difference in accomplishing just that. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = — Team Ruiz | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99087107/518791416/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQyYjU1OS1jZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bo2qQ3G3Z_G2SUHcMFWyjaJXHbraOILKgt8c9wGvVdQ=) I wanted to give you an update on what I’ve been doing over the past month and a half. I’m doing everything I can to prepare to represent MI-08 in Congress, and I’ve been connecting with families across Mid-Michigan to hear directly from them about their needs and the changes they want to see. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99087108/518791417/1443816105?refcode=email_122124_preparing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQyYjU1OS1jZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bo2qQ3G3Z_G2SUHcMFWyjaJXHbraOILKgt8c9wGvVdQ=) I met with our retirement Representative, Dan Kildee, to gain his insights on how to successfully navigate Congress and deliver for MI-08. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99087109/518791418/1443816105?refcode=email_122124_preparing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQyYjU1OS1jZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bo2qQ3G3Z_G2SUHcMFWyjaJXHbraOILKgt8c9wGvVdQ=) During new member orientation, I participated in dozens of trainings, connected with other incoming representatives, and participated in the new member lottery to select our office space (Longworth 1408!). Additionally, I’m honored to have been elected Freshman Leadership Representative for the New Democratic Coalition, giving me an even stronger platform to advocate for working families. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99087110/518791419/1443816105?refcode=email_122124_preparing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQyYjU1OS1jZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bo2qQ3G3Z_G2SUHcMFWyjaJXHbraOILKgt8c9wGvVdQ=) [_**I’m ready to get to work for our community, and I hope I can count on your continued support along the way. Will you make a donation today? Together, we are going to ensure mid-Michigan is front and center in Congress.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99087111/518791420/1443816105?refcode=email_122124_preparing&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMmQyYjU1OS1jZGJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Bo2qQ3G3Z_G2SUHcMFWyjaJXHbraOILKgt8c9wGvVdQ=) Thanks. ## [**Kamala Harris Will Cringe When She Finds Out What Tim Walz Just Said in Public**](https://trk.mg.swampdigest.com/?xtl=21dvt2qr2o26bi7lk312mw8yao9hb3qrx7iyg3acqb8fg22vf6rpcrr89subm97pdq3akseh8ycqlv51ap5qfkl3pbsfj6ht2n3top131wnzzxparurfxnrs5nnwcgyi38jt10sh8ag2su85gt7j75br3iio39alm02hfbh7n4sqd7q5fwdcallpmkrb20gmxt6107moan15h9nstx0sa808d2iy6mhkju9afwwqb99&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=souz1m&__onlt=h)

name: John Kasich
subject: Kicking the can down the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich for America, not authorized by any
body:
Our nation faced yet another dangerous incident this past week where the federal government was hours away from shutting down because of a failure of our elected leaders to address our nation's budget.| | | [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=a69995c7f0dc482d96f5af684deefc15&_e=vAaEud-n69IHlCJnBPs5LKi3rbltQ4PzJ3jxnRAL6Icz3gRYMHRtk0QS-sBLjv9juV8fFSHv_peCd2o628ILNOJuJQZQpYpzQxz0Ju8JTI2kdjWOC_crQaHy5DfkqsFJhQQzfY1kCJdnvs88JAmBdlRl_MPmJU9-z81OmTIg2CLDGvIHzUWeX6Dz8bRFpFd3XNdv_b88MdSXDR9pkKQk-g%3D%3D)
---
Peter, This past week, our nation came uncomfortably close to a government shutdown—another example of how our leaders are struggling to address the budget responsibly and tackle key issues facing our country.

These situations arise because both parties in Congress have avoided meaningful discussions about curbing government spending and addressing our $36 TRILLION national debt. As a former chairman of the House Budget Committee, in the 1990s, I worked across the aisle to help balance the federal budget for the first time since man walked on the moon, proving that collaboration and compromise can lead to real solutions when leaders put the country first.

I shared my thoughts on this in [a new column for The Hill](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=a69995c7f0dc482d96f5af684deefc15&_e=vAaEud-n69IHlCJnBPs5LCMx-TNaqUTVkjgO_zPSU0rTpDVBWWDh8uF8gN49ZS5TKpJhguRSvE5bQWCXxEwChs_-uQuE7NOSnH-3m2-JTlVA_45tR2n8ARdFTL_xQFtL-5YMH37y8LiwTchnieXR4vxR9JbSiugaiomBkZSok4iGKh7Ob3hzMUUf2xntwafS4FaUvOpzaq6zMQuvmN7KhG-a0NwnrCbYFu4p0WBXg3GsMCXxoykEN0BUxirzIjSIX9Crlmuz_KleY6H6Tva82OgPxiDZE-IyMivGeYyNTg4%3D). I’d love for you to read it and let me know what you think:

name: Jenna Burns
subject: Help keep our family together for Christmas
body:
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.| | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family.
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe.**[Before I ask for your help, let me start at the beginning...](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=663b20ed80d24a839edab4cceaf897c0&_e=hBHMjVwhtx3qhu7pYJchvhxHNe-otRHCmBXVfkPrP3yGiEc8ck5ebbqybG7JWoYiQlxZBOZ3ICX6PJlqk7EwWB0dgzsA9UcLpy0XJZdyA0qs_m684jQ9GJDfBM4MxPnEbBNHMpYvI-2SM5BKphWWewcHmxEMvuRD-QHi8ZKOwC82aKtsywQKVkGnoce6t5qvndI-OQIq10WWyYJRJv08Oc0852Q8sJnm3xCZLlcG8jvG74DBhwzAVwSTd9cGq62anOBu33dULiec7uUGFdKMEPZLDbB8_ucrM7GwtbDv_Y4Cb32I5GYDEpPCXZuA2cygkbRu_kP6WIarSnGbn0Hddn8mKNGb8rjQjIzrMoKArVBNJ3uZgeWBiPm2FXz_tlCqZcatx2MNw68zTbuw4QsQUQ%3D%3D)** My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent.
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=663b20ed80d24a839edab4cceaf897c0&_e=hBHMjVwhtx3qhu7pYJchvhxHNe-otRHCmBXVfkPrP3yGiEc8ck5ebbqybG7JWoYiQlxZBOZ3ICX6PJlqk7EwWB0dgzsA9UcLpy0XJZdyA0qs_m684jQ9GJDfBM4MxPnEbBNHMpYvI-2SM5BKphWWewcHmxEMvuRD-QHi8ZKOwC82aKtsywQKVkGnoce6t5qvndI-OQIq10WWyYJRJv08Oc0852Q8sJnm3xCZLlcG8jvG74DBhwzAVwSTd9cGq62aMKVO3bdnkDXA1ZWErNr6Jj2TOpcFvzZIEcptNmcLOk9Ufh-as1k6zwhLNTvcYRnImXhrh3HYAckH_T2eCtWmPlsiejDKf5qQlxhQgYNhhzx8bJPLR5zLaPNT3QaB1XUtCPRXLxFa72lxpriqpz3CEQ%3D%3D)
---
Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...**life in prison** could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. **So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder!** James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why **[**I'm turning to you for help.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=663b20ed80d24a839edab4cceaf897c0&_e=hBHMjVwhtx3qhu7pYJchvhxHNe-otRHCmBXVfkPrP3yGiEc8ck5ebbqybG7JWoYiQlxZBOZ3ICX6PJlqk7EwWB0dgzsA9UcLpy0XJZdyA0qs_m684jQ9GJDfBM4MxPnEbBNHMpYvI-2SM5BKphWWewcHmxEMvuRD-QHi8ZKOwC82aKtsywQKVkGnoce6t5qvndI-OQIq10WWyYJRJv08Oc0852Q8sJnm3xCZLlcG8jvG74DBhwzAVwSTd9cGq62a7ZyLG7BMjcO5ioU4jdLYOI2xdtugMwU0FwUCUBE7h-F38lDVV2j-4uxbSO4Cth9yPvAa85iz6ZAtt_BnJ8wXPOJHlCPDzRRrNNapa7RWS3UopXnV_M5hliLvw-ewIleFRpjLUXeNHvj3-Zlp8qU0ew%3D%3D)** James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. **He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down.** When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... **And then we got a call from Jason Johnson** , **the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF.** If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars.
