clean_body: Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way... life in prison could be his reward.| | | The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. | | Dear Friend,The Christmas season used to be a time I looked forward to, spending time with my family. But ever since Fani Willis began her crusade to rip my family apart, holidays have been filled with worry.If that name sounds familiar to you, there's a reason.She's the radical District Attorney in Georgia who's been trying to put President Trump behind bars.But President Trump isn't the only person Fani Willis is abusing her office to target. She's also trying to lock my husband away for the rest of his life for doing his job as a police officer and trying to keep our city safe. My husband, James, served in the Atlanta Police Department. That's me, James, and our son in the photo I sent. Being a police officer meant the world to James. He was born and raised in Atlanta, and saw his job as a way to help his neighbors. But if Fani Willis has her way...life in prison could be his reward.Our nightmare started more than eight years ago, when an off-duty police officer radioed in about a man breaking into a parked car at an apartment complex. Then the officer stopped responding. Dispatch issued a distress call, and all available units rushed over.My husband was closest to the scene, so he arrived first. When he got there, he saw a running car parked facing the wrong way on a one-way street. With his emergency lights on, James got out to investigate.That's when it happened. The suspect saw my husband, slammed on the gas, and drove straight at him.James was certain the man was intentionally trying to run him over.With only a split second to think, James drew his weapon and fired a single shot at the vehicle bearing down on him. It struck the suspect, who died instantly. James was shaken by the incident, but thankfully he was unhurt. He went home, certain he had done everything by the book. So you can imagine our shock when James found out he was being charged with murder! James was forced to turn himself in, and spent the night locked up in jail in solitary confinement. They treated him like a common criminal. They even kept him in a straitjacket! We all thought this was a giant misunderstanding -- just a soft-on-crime District Attorney trying to make a name for themselves by targeting a police officer.We couldn't have been more wrong.You see, James is white, and the suspect he shot was black. So the woke, anti-police prosecutors in Atlanta have made it their mission to destroy my husband. For eight years now, these radical prosecutors -- and the woke mob who helped get them elected -- have dragged my husband's name through the mud.The District Attorney at the time held press conferences bragging about how tough they were for going after my husband. They even campaigned on putting my James behind bars! Every time James has to appear at the Fulton County Courthouse for a hearing, angry protesters show up carrying giant signs with James' mugshot on them, with "MURDERER" scribbled across his face in red spray paint. Now you understand why I'm so upset and why James is an honest, hardworking, good-hearted man who only wants to help people. He's the guy everyone calls when a broken faucet floods their kitchen, or when their car breaks down. When he was younger, he spent years traveling to dangerous Third-World countries to help needy people -- places like South Sudan, Madagascar, Liberia, and Haiti. And it was that same selflessness that drove James to become a police officer and graduate the police academy near the top of his class.My husband is exactly the kind of man you want keeping your city safe.But none of that matters to radical prosecutors like Fani Willis. She knows what happened that night. She knows James was in a life-or-death situation. She knows that the charge should have been dropped years ago.But Fani Willis doesn't care. She just wants to make an example out of my husband. For years, we've been trapped in limbo.James' police department just threw us away. There's supposed to be this bond of brotherhood in law enforcement. But his fellow officers were forbidden to talk to him -- and the higher-ups fired him before the investigation was even finished. We've lost nearly all our friends, and we've even been forced to move because of the terrible lies the prosecutors have been spreading about my husband.It's been nearly impossible for James to get a job with these charges hanging over him.By some miracle, we've been able to get by, but every day is difficult. And what's been truly overwhelming is the cost of James' legal defense.As you can imagine, gifts are the last thing on my family's mind during Christmas - we are just fighting to keep him home for the holidays.My friend, we aren't wealthy people. James' father had to empty his retirement account. Other relatives have sold family heirlooms. We've put nearly every penny we can scrape together into this case.And it still hasn't been enough.I know this is how Fani Willis and the radical prosecutors in her office are trying to punish my husband. They're dragging this out as long as possible to break our family.We spend our days grateful to still have James at home, at the same time terrified that these will be our last moments together as a family. Earlier this year, we ran out of money. James was about to turn to a public defender. We had all but given up hope... And then we got a call from Jason Johnson , the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund, or LELDF. If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongfully-accused police officers like James. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families – at their lowest moment.And we were at our lowest moment!Not only did the LELDF board decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best attorneys so James can finally clear his name. That's why I'm writing to you today to ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone... His legal team needs to be working day and night to get ready to defeat Fani Willis' team and get my husband declared NOT GUILTY once and for all.I know that times are tough right now. And if we had any other options, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for help from a stranger, especially during the holidays. But like I mentioned earlier, we have nowhere else to turn. And I'm so scared for what will happen to my husband.You know how police officers are treated behind bars. If James is convicted, it's basically a death sentence. LELDF is a non-profit organization. So your gift is tax-deductible.And it's that could make the difference between defeating Fani Willis and the radical anti-police prosecutors on her team -- and my husband spending the rest of his life in prison. I'm sorry this e-mail turned out so long. Thank you for taking the time to read about my husband. And thank you in advance for helping my James. Sincerely, Jenna Burns P.S. My husband did EVERYTHING he needed to survive that night. He doesn't deserve to die in prison. But that's EXACTLY what will happen if radical prosecutor Fani Willis gets her way. | _**Peter,

We are 10 days away from our last FEC deadline of the year!**_

Elections may be over, but our work is just starting:

**> >** April is preparing to get sworn into office this January. As she works to assemble her team in office and so much more, we’re working to set the groundwork for 2026.

**> >** The 2026 midterms may sound far out, but we were one of the most competitive races in the country this year. We may have won this election, but the results were close, and Republicans will be coming for this seat again in two years. Building a strong foundation early is key to building a winning campaign.

**> >** After Trump gets sworn in on January 20th, April will hit the ground running to protect our democracy and deliver common sense, common ground solutions for Marylanders.

[_**Peter, anything you can give to this campaign right now will help us close 2024 on a good note and build the groundwork for the years ahead. name: Cathy McMorris Rodgers
subject: Thank You...The Best is Yet to Come! 🇺🇸
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cathyforcongress/thank-youthe-best-is-yet-to-come?e=7c561c8a85)
---
|
---
| | Dear Peter, As this year comes to a close and my time in Congress wraps up, I wanted to thank you again for your steadfast support and friendship throughout the years. I will be forever grateful and honored to have been Washington’s 5th Congressional District’s voice in Congress for the last twenty years. It is the veterans, the farmers, the small business owners, and the hardworking families throughout Eastern Washington who have been my inspiration each and every day. During my time in leadership, as the House Republican Conference Chair, and then as Chair of the House Energy & Commerce Committee, I’ve had the distinct honor of seeing the best of Eastern Washington and the United States of America. I’m thankful to each one of you - for joining me in this fight, for supporting my efforts and for doing what you do, day in and day out, in your businesses, in your communities and in your families. Continuing this blessing of America takes all of us and I’m grateful to have gotten to know you and worked together to preserve it. Please know, our work does not stop here. We are in the midst of a battle for the future of this country. I promise you that while I will no longer be serving in Congress -- I will continue that fight. What’s at stake is too important – we must continue to strive for that more perfect union; to be that shining city on the hill and to be a beacon of hope for people all over the world. As I head home to be with my beautiful family and figure out what is next, I look forward to staying in touch along the way. In the meantime, we wanted to share our holiday card commemorating this amazing journey. Again, thank you for everything. May God bless you and your families and may he continue to bless the United States of America. Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays and Happy New Year!
Gratefully,
---
|

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Peter, As this year comes to a close and my time in Congress wraps up, I wanted to thank you again for your steadfast support and friendship throughout the years. I will be forever grateful and honored to have been Washington’s 5th Congressional District’s voice in Congress for the last twenty years. It is the veterans, the farmers, the small business owners, and the hardworking families throughout Eastern Washington who have been my inspiration each and every day. During my time in leadership, as the House Republican Conference Chair, and then as Chair of the House Energy & Commerce Committee, I’ve had the distinct honor of seeing the best of Eastern Washington and the United States of America. I’m thankful to each one of you - for joining me in this fight, for supporting my efforts and for doing what you do, day in and day out, in your businesses, in your communities and in your families. Continuing this blessing of America takes all of us and I’m grateful to have gotten to know you and worked together to preserve it. Please know, our work does not stop here. We are in the midst of a battle for the future of this country. I promise you that while I will no longer be serving in Congress -- I will continue that fight. What’s at stake is too important – we must continue to strive for that more perfect union; to be that shining city on the hill and to be a beacon of hope for people all over the world. As I head home to be with my beautiful family and figure out what is next, I look forward to staying in touch along the way. In the meantime, we wanted to share our holiday card commemorating this amazing journey. Again, thank you for everything. May God bless you and your families and may he continue to bless the United States of America. Merry Christmas, Happy Holidays and Happy New Year! Gratefully, | | | | | Copyright © 2024 Cathy for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: It’s time to end the “seven state strategy”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Last week Pramila spoke to Axios about the path forward for Democrats after the 2024 election, and she had one key takeaway:
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20241221-4609-footer&t=1&akid=4609%2E420207%2EvtlM19)
Peter, we know the holidays are here and you have a million things going on right now, so we’ll keep this quick.
Last week, Pramila spoke to Axios about the path forward for Democrats after the 2024 election, and she had a key takeaway:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241221?refcode=em20241221-4609&amount=3&refcode2=4609_420207_vtlM19&akid=4609%2E420207%2EvtlM19)
**Democrats need to compete in every state, stop running to the center, and embrace a bold, populist agenda to win back the working class.**
Pramila is fighting to make that happen by working to ban corporate PAC donations in Democratic primaries and organize around bold policies that will make a noticeable difference in working families’ lives.
**But Peter, she can’t do it without you. If you’re ready to move away from the “seven state strategy” and win working voters _everywhere_ , [will you pitch in $3 to support Pramila’s campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241221?refcode=em20241221-4609&amount=3&refcode2=4609_420207_vtlM19&akid=4609%2E420207%2EvtlM19)**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20241221?amount=3&refcode=em20241221-4609&refcode2=4609_420207_vtlM19&akid=4609%2E420207%2EvtlM19)**
In solidarity,
PramilaForCongress.com
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20241221-4609-footer&t=2&refcode2=4609_420207_vtlM19&akid=4609%2E420207%2EvtlM19)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Former Republican Minnesota Gov. Tim Pawlenty “bluntly” told a CNN

name: Pat Herrity
subject: 2025 Is Right Around The Corner
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Pat Herrity
body:
|
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter,

As we head into the holidays next week, I want to take a moment to reflect on everything we accomplished this year - and look ahead to what's coming in 2025.

In 2024, we moved the needle in Virginia in a significant way. We reelected strong members of Congress including Jen Kiggans and Rob Wittman - sending five strong conservatives to Washington to represent us. While we didn't win everywhere we had hoped, we made great inroads in Virginia with our working-class residents and our minority communities that are waking up to the fact that they are better off with conservative leadership. In Virginia, President Trump received more than 100,000 more votes in Virginia this year than he did in 2020, and narrowed his statewide margin by nearly 5 percentage points.

And we made inroads in Northern Virginia that will be crucial to our success in 2025 and beyond.
---
|
---
|
Over the last few months, I've had the opportunity to travel the Commonwealth supporting our 2024 candidates and laying the groundwork for what comes next.

In 2025, we have the opportunity to take back the Virginia House of Delegates - and we have the **duty to continue that progress and win our statewide elected offices so we can continue Governor Youngkin's legacy of commonsense, conservative governance that is working for all Virginians.**

I will be working around the clock to elect the current Lt Governor Winsome Sears as our next Governor and reelect our great Attorney General Jason Miyares as our Attorney General in 2025.

For years, I've been the lone conservative on the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors. I've worked tirelessly, and successfully, to advance commonsense, conservative solutions that put our citizens and taxpayers first. I saw firsthand the damage that was done when the Democrats had control of the Governor's mansion, the Virginia Senate and the House of Delegates - public sector collective bargaining, repeated release of violent criminals onto our streets, schools, business, and church closures and increased taxes and regulations. We can't let that happen again.

Governor Youngkin has Virginia on the right path. To stay on that path, we need to redouble our efforts and do even better in Northern Virginia.

I'll have more to say about how I will be participating in that fight and how you can help keep us on the right path early in the New Year.

Enjoy your holidays with friends and family, celebrate our success in 2024, and rest up for the fight coming in 2025!

Pat Herrity
---

body:
We won’t back down in the fight for care.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99089196/518798598/664783965?ms=122124_legislativeagenda&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmM3N2Y3MC1kY2JmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1PuUQ8tZSkRZjARUKUzW9ZfVtNPxze3E3aKX8SdRdQM=&emci=12382e65-bfbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=76c77f70-dcbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=864787)
Dear Peter,
As 2024 draws to a close, we are looking ahead to our federal legislative priorities for 2025.
President-elect Donald Trump has proposed a number of devastating cuts to critical care programs.
But we’re not backing down—[** _we’re continuing the fight for care, and we need you to stand with us._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99089197/518798599/-901705029?ms=122124_legislativeagenda&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmM3N2Y3MC1kY2JmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1PuUQ8tZSkRZjARUKUzW9ZfVtNPxze3E3aKX8SdRdQM=&emci=12382e65-bfbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=76c77f70-dcbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=864787)
[Volunteer with us >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99089198/518798600/-901705029?ms=122124_legislativeagenda&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmM3N2Y3MC1kY2JmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1PuUQ8tZSkRZjARUKUzW9ZfVtNPxze3E3aKX8SdRdQM=&emci=12382e65-bfbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=76c77f70-dcbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=864787)
## _**Care in Action 2025 Legislative Priorities**_
_**Immigration**_**:** Immigrant domestic workers and caregivers, especially those who are undocumented, face real and harmful threats from the Trump administration. We anticipate anti-immigrant attacks in the first 100 days of the new administration, and are preparing to **protect our community and immigrant communities as a whole.**
_**Care**_**:** On care, our top priorities will be **protecting health and home care through Medicaid, advocating for better wages, and protecting recent wins,** all while continuing our work to resist harmful policy changes.
**_Taxes_****:** In 2025 and beyond, we expect tax cuts to be on the table, which could significantly impact critical care programs. Care programs such as Medicaid are funded by tax revenue, and provide health care and other basic care needs to millions of families. Our priority is to continue **advocating for the protection and expansion** of these health care and benefit programs.
[**_To help us continue the fight for care and protect our community in 2025 and beyond, please sign up to volunteer with us._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99089199/518798601/-901705029?ms=122124_legislativeagenda&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmM3N2Y3MC1kY2JmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1PuUQ8tZSkRZjARUKUzW9ZfVtNPxze3E3aKX8SdRdQM=&emci=12382e65-bfbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=76c77f70-dcbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=864787)
[Volunteer with us >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/99089200/518798602/-901705029?ms=122124_legislativeagenda&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmM3N2Y3MC1kY2JmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1PuUQ8tZSkRZjARUKUzW9ZfVtNPxze3E3aKX8SdRdQM=&emci=12382e65-bfbc-ef11-88d0-000d3a9d5840&emdi=76c77f70-dcbf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=864787)
Thank you for reading and taking action with us,
Hillary Holley
Executive Director | Care in Action

clean_body: We won’t back down in the fight for care. Dear Peter, As 2024 draws to a close, we are looking ahead to our federal legislative priorities for 2025. President-elect Donald Trump has proposed a number of devastating cuts to critical care programs. But we’re not backing down— Care in Action 2025 Legislative Priorities Immigration: Immigrant domestic workers and caregivers, especially those who are undocumented, face real and harmful threats from the Trump administration. We anticipate anti-immigrant attacks in the first 100 days of the new administration, and are preparing to protect our community and immigrant communities as a whole. Care: On care, our top priorities will be protecting health and home care through Medicaid, advocating for better wages, and protecting recent wins, all while continuing our work to resist harmful policy changes. Taxes: In 2025 and beyond, we expect tax cuts to be on the table, which could significantly impact critical care programs. Care programs such as Medicaid are funded by tax revenue, and provide health care and other basic care needs to millions of families. Our priority is to continue advocating for the protection and expansion of these health care and benefit programs. Thank you for reading and taking action with us, Hillary Holley Executive Director | Care in Action

body:

Dear Friend,

In the last week, O'Keefe Media Group has exposed two high-level Biden insiders who were eager to express their contempt for President Trump as we count down the days until the inauguration.

We have MANY more subjects on the hook and investigations that are advancing, but **[it will take your support to keep going](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s2FLxqqKU8TpHr6Jn8GUUw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSb06P0SZaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPW9tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIyMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1hZnImYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmdlgSlnZ60de2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA).**

I predict that the next four years of the Trump Administration will be an ongoing game of cloak and dagger as Deep State operatives - embedded federal employees - work to undermine his policies just as they did during his first term.

**The Deep State will be working harder than ever this time around, and OMG is taking an offensive stance to root them out and expose them . . . and we've already started.**

While we work to identify and expose the bad actors who will remain in government, **DROVES of whistleblowers will come forward** with the desire to right the wrongs they witnessed during the four years of the Biden Administration.

This is a dual-track process, and **[I need you to join me by donating now so that we can move fast, strike hard, and keep that pace going until Deep State actors are driven out of our federal government.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s2FLxqqKU8TpHr6Jn8GUUw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSb06P0SZaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPW9tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIyMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1hZnImYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmdlgSlnZ60de2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

While I rarely do interviews, the other day, I appeared on Benny Johnson's show to

send this very clear message to both the "good guys" and the "bad guys" in our government:

**For those good people** who are inside the federal government, who have witnessed corruption and are brave enough to step forward as a whistleblower, I want them to know these things:

* I'll tell your full story.

* I'll legally protect you.

* The heads of these agencies WILL SEE YOUR STORY so that change can occur.

* And to those bad actors in government:

* OMG's cameras are EVERYWHERE.

* You ARE going to meet with one of my undercover journalists.

* I will expose you.

My team at OMG is already working at breakneck speed seven days a week, and to be candid, this month has been rough financially. We're already behind, and I need your help to catch up, pay the stack of bills on my desk, and meet the next payroll.

Any help you can provide will help get me caught up and get OMG off to a strong start in 2025.

**[So please, help us accomplish this critical mission.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s2FLxqqKU8TpHr6Jn8GUUw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSb06P0SZaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPW9tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIyMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1hZnImYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmdlgSlnZ60de2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Starting now, we're already entering an endless game of "whack-a-mole" as employees within our federal government conspire against Trump. As long as President Trump controls the White House, there will be bad actors within government - the people we refer to as the "Deep State" who are trying to undermine his policies, take down his people, or worse.

We have to be unrelenting in our work, which will require you and me to work together to make that happen: **[You keep OMG going with your support, and I'll work like hell to get the job done.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s2FLxqqKU8TpHr6Jn8GUUw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSb06P0SZaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPW9tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIyMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1hZnImYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmdlgSlnZ60de2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

**[Are you in?](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s2FLxqqKU8TpHr6Jn8GUUw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSb06P0SZaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPW9tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIyMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1hZnImYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmdlgSlnZ60de2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

Thank you for your time and support, and please stay tuned for more.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. December is always a tough month for organizations that rely on the public for support. **[Help us get caught up and keep building our team to take on the Deep State actors who are working to take down the Trump Presidency.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/s2FLxqqKU8TpHr6Jn8GUUw~~/AARclAA~/RgRpSb06P0SZaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9va2VlZmVtZWRpYWdyb3VwL29tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUtbWItcG9wYT91dG1fc291cmNlPW9tZy1kZWVwc3RhdGUmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1wb3BhJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MTIyMSZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1hZnImYW1vdW50PTI1VwNzcGNCCmdlgSlnZ60de2FSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99089435/518799500/-664527026?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTNmYzM4Yi1kZWJmLWVmMTEtODhjZS0wMDIyNDgyYTkzYWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ORtketKu_yBkOtmpIvfrPzLzLdTGOuMqjYQSdYsmli8=)
❌ Trump SUED ABC for $15 million
❌ He’s SUING an Iowa pollster for publishing an outlier poll
❌ And he’s “looking at” suing other news outlets for their coverage of him. **Trump hasn’t even been inaugurated yet, and his retribution tour is already beginning.** We know that the press is one of his top targets, and he’ll do whatever it takes to silence anyone who dares to hold him accountable. From suing news outlets and journalists to calling for the prosecution of his political foes, Trump’s attacks are a _direct_ threat to our democracy. body:

---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fcfa73b9b6fc4817b3241515f865566c&_e=giyOCoE_RYq_qntRriYRSiS9Z18wtrfJLfhPmsO6bATSmEpNfyB_Z6mlnoeyQb34lOKlSrUW57FzS4QL2EzJX846qA1aGik21a0R8TsmxXxuRYK0awdP-iunDwMoj85DgnlLGxJ3nVLWu7scp5GURgqWpNCUzKH849jNyKt1-Ncd9TCcJ1ym3pSqWSdAz7Tlalw9T3q6d98aSjJSB0j3EN5rIx4pDPgeorhQ7jjw3_xusjhU83hU-lfG2514xULnc2TB7ATuOEnOvR5SwmEUX2WizkJWSRwIhpNzYXkW1z59Ab4EW0WBhDOzC-jzmFynqRQt7TYV_HvHPyggP0NnVn3ZGXRXajxlPLvdi1FKZT75B79iBFVnPHATHYtlIRX27NaLU_ozU1UDE6P4R_PlFn3MQKn-cxrxAy0HnZo26nY%3D)
---
MERRY CHRISTMAS _From Kari, Jeff, Ruby, and Leo_
---
| | From the Desk of
---
# **[Kari Lake](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fcfa73b9b6fc4817b3241515f865566c&_e=giyOCoE_RYq_qntRriYRSiS9Z18wtrfJLfhPmsO6bATSmEpNfyB_Z6mlnoeyQb34lOKlSrUW57FzS4QL2EzJX846qA1aGik21a0R8TsmxXxuRYK0awdP-iunDwMoj85DgnlLGxJ3nVLWu7scp5GURgqWpNCUzKH849jNyKt1-Ncd9TCcJ1ym3pSqWSdAz7Tlalw9T3q6d98aSjJSB0j3EN5rIx4pDPgeorhQ7jjw3_xusjhU83hU-lfG2514xULnW_Sw8DEMho2mldzoEQ-6fDX2IntkVvCYkBjIlu8mjECi_JlSpe-73_6LMCKHLggd8u2b-8bXL843MuvR2bZ4SjQ_a5JdRKKc3A4PMuAyh-AVqU5Frisp_YSIZ5q7ywLM17PWqQ5pE3vTdsRJuQwcaPANptRD3d84nu_qoSSj8zI%3D)**
---
|
---
Dear Peter,I wanted to send you this _Christmas Card_ to wish you and your family a Merry and Blessed Christmas. I’m looking forward to spending time with my family and celebrating the birth of our Lord and Savior.But Peter, I’ve got to be honest with you. There’s a dark cloud hanging over my family right now.You know that the Left is trying to use “lawfare” to financially destroy my family. When an Arizona Election official went on the record promising to _“Make life hell”_ for me, I could have never imagined it would have been this bad...I incurred hundreds of thousands of dollars in expenses to defend myself. And I’m afraid this battle is only getting started.So Peter, I don’t get to take a break for Christmas this year. I have legal bills piling up that I need to pay soon.That’s why I’m hoping – praying – you’ll read this today and consider **[generously helping me this Christmas.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fcfa73b9b6fc4817b3241515f865566c&_e=giyOCoE_RYq_qntRriYRSiS9Z18wtrfJLfhPmsO6bATSmEpNfyB_Z6mlnoeyQb34lOKlSrUW57FzS4QL2EzJX846qA1aGik21a0R8TsmxXxuRYK0awdP-iunDwMoj85DgnlLGxJ3nVLWu7scp5GURgqWpNCUzKH849jNyKt1-Ncd9TCcJ1ym3pSqWSdAz7Tlalw9T3q6d98aSjJSB0j3EN5rIx4pDPgeorhQ7jjw3_xusjhU83hU-lfG2514xULnpaELTiwzKGkukXergmlLPdPADeP1__kszXM2RFkag62NpT9XF3OxWHJvN9gGxxXc1JprT4OyFx1NicXJexAEr2NBvvuJjaT01rSEnUu7meNgKebdk76fOQYNzuqPdaFENrZRfB01UntockmL4BmF0QWk0AGx8Q5ZimHylh1GFlg%3D)** Everything I’ve done has been for election integrity. Watching Arizona botch yet another election, while silencing my legitimate questions about fraud, is a slap in the face to every Arizona voter and conservative American.It’s a national embarrassment. We have to change it.But if standing up and demanding change means you’re going to be personally and financially destroyed, we are never going to fix our elections. That’s what happened to me.As Christmas approaches, I’ve been reflecting on the state of our country.I’ve been thinking a lot about what the left has done to President Donald Trump.Radical Never-Trump prosecutors and judges threatened to take everything away from him – his businesses, his buildings, his homes, and even his freedom.Yet he fights on.He’s truly unstoppable.I thank God the American people realized this too.Peter, I’m sure you’ve felt the shift over the past few weeks. America is hungry for change, and the energy is absolutely incredible. To be candid with you, it makes facing this lawfare even more frustrating.The left lost, but they refuse to understand why. And in retaliation, they’re doubling down on their worst schemes to destroy conservatives. Including their lawfare.That leaves me with hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal expenses to pay for legitimately questioning an election we all know was crooked to the bones.
---
Peter, I’m **not** giving up.I’m in this fight for my kids, Ruby and Leo, and my husband, Jeff.And I’m in this fight for you.
---
You’ve had my back from day one when no one else did. I can’t thank you enough for that. To me, facing these attacks unafraid was worth the millions of dollars it could have cost. Because nothing in this world can come between me, my family, and my country.
---
_Not_ the Left’s lawfare._Not_ power-drunk liberal prosecutors._Not_ litigious, partisan hacks who hate the truth.
---
[Will you help me defeat the left’s lawfare by rushing back a generous contribution to my “**First Amendment Fund** ”?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fcfa73b9b6fc4817b3241515f865566c&_e=giyOCoE_RYq_qntRriYRSiS9Z18wtrfJLfhPmsO6bATSmEpNfyB_Z6mlnoeyQb34lOKlSrUW57FzS4QL2EzJX846qA1aGik21a0R8TsmxXxuRYK0awdP-iunDwMoj85DgnlLGxJ3nVLWu7scp5GURgqWpNCUzKH849jNyKt1-Ncd9TCcJ1ym3pSqWSdAz7Tlalw9T3q6d98aSjJSB0j3EN5rIx4pDPgeorhQ7jjw3_xusjhU83hU-lfG2514xULniCfGCsc02m65FLMF5WoFugAtlfKmyLQFOV7plTz8wMf__Mp76Vn8TNL1zb0j3fmqUyzVcqMi_icTaAxTdQ6xo2UHEPXc7FsAYO9DELd8tPrtds6qvn168-1ZpUo0w7n7QHU2JjzndhBvG78CZ0IHgMXW81hOBL4-LypjhA8QGtc%3D)Your generous support will help me cover the outstanding court fees, lawyers, expert witnesses, counsel, and more. The Left wanted this case to destroy my name and credibility.They also wanted to force me and my family into bankruptcy.Peter, it’s scary to think about what this Christmas might look like if the Left had won... Thanks to generous supporters like you, I’m spending this holiday with my family. But these legal bills are looming over our heads. I would be so thankful if you could help out.Your donation will get me one step closer to paying off these legal bills. But if you’re in the position to send more, I want you to know personally how much it means to me and how large of an impact it will have. Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family.[All I ask is that rush your “**First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution** before midnight, if you can.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fcfa73b9b6fc4817b3241515f865566c&_e=giyOCoE_RYq_qntRriYRSiS9Z18wtrfJLfhPmsO6bATSmEpNfyB_Z6mlnoeyQb34lOKlSrUW57FzS4QL2EzJX846qA1aGik21a0R8TsmxXxuRYK0awdP-iunDwMoj85DgnlLGxJ3nVLWu7scp5GURgqWpNCUzKH849jNyKt1-Ncd9TCcJ1ym3pSqWSdAz7Tlalw9T3q6d98aSjJSB0j3EN5rIx4pDPgeorhQ7jjw3_xusjhU83hU-lfG2514xULn4vgR6iRZumLrY4g73mRJY-7v8yEOd7HcCi2WbnGTlBngF-a0k0NS5t-y4H2uUzBLZjh1A1EbaD7KHS3XBsTlUjy6sVz3LfbvR1_OaUHo4lhWpMTd65CJd21CzLTYNeOoU_HcYh1WlToiC6aSt3CE-D1QQKutdooAwZ-OEUZBNJQ%3D)
---
[ **DONATE **](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fcfa73b9b6fc4817b3241515f865566c&_e=giyOCoE_RYq_qntRriYRSiS9Z18wtrfJLfhPmsO6bATSmEpNfyB_Z6mlnoeyQb34lOKlSrUW57FzS4QL2EzJX846qA1aGik21a0R8TsmxXxuRYK0awdP-iunDwMoj85DgnlLGxJ3nVLWu7scp5GURgqWpNCUzKH849jNyKt1-Ncd9TCcJ1ym3pSqWSdAz7Tlalw9T3q6d98aSjJSB0j3EN5rIx4pDPgeorhQ7jjw3_xusjhU83hU-lfG2514xULnZH_36sabrD3ue3BStKZSvMJ4n_S3P9RfaKBD54I18ge1if9rOzqn1j0SkALurWp_R6vVD3M017UHuQ2PvrBkiAgjU8RjFYWC5gChBXuWrKYCbrAn0WlTLSQ5BBPRwhmaGXObFydYvcupDU-HA0bwl9sgTRoZEID0fz3i4ZOSV4s%3D)
---
Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want _you_ to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas,
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
|
---
| |
---
---
Kari Lake
---
| | P.S. Christmas is coming up fast, so I hope my message doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. I need your help. The left’s lawfare has put hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees on my lap. A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. Will you please help me end this lawfare by rushing your **[“](h)[First Amendment Fund” Emergency Contribution?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=fcfa73b9b6fc4817b3241515f865566c&_e=giyOCoE_RYq_qntRriYRSiS9Z18wtrfJLfhPmsO6bATSmEpNfyB_Z6mlnoeyQb34lOKlSrUW57FzS4QL2EzJX846qA1aGik21a0R8TsmxXxuRYK0awdP-iunDwMoj85DgnlLGxJ3nVLWu7scp5GURgqWpNCUzKH849jNyKt1-Ncd9TCcJ1ym3pSqWSdAz7Tlalw9T3q6d98aSjJSB0j3EN5rIx4pDPgeorhQ7jjw3_xusjhU83hU-lfG2514xULnt-j8gfa0PYCUuZyXer5hW-9kAyU_z7LR6i54XcQkBHYIMUDIj0Qn7ryJwrrJy9AZsNqL85TazAwRhclLN6cP-x6m_i5jdxFq_MleQ10o7ASMc78Hmng4_BccUohirhVCyJlHl2jU-pDIhbZ-yWE5UK9WoTHKzYo-b_OphafQtDo%3D)** Thank you for your support during this difficult time, and Merry Christmas to you and your family.

Every dollar given will help me finish this fight... without financially destroying my family. Thank you for always being there for me, especially during this holiday season. Please know that I’m still fighting because I want you to live in a free and prosperous America.Merry Christmas, | | Kari Lake | | | Kari Lake | | P.S. Christmas is coming up fast, so I hope my message doesn’t get lost in the shuffle. I need your help. The left’s lawfare has put hundreds of thousands of dollars in legal fees on my lap. A generous group has stepped up and offered to help me pay off these outstanding bills, but they can’t do it without your generous support. Will you please help me end this lawfare by rushing your h Thank you for your support during this difficult time, and Merry Christmas to you and your family. | | Paid for by American Media Council American Media Council PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602****

name: Powered By People
subject: Our 2025 budget plans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
As we prepare our budgets for 2025, with so many critical fights that lie ahead, we’re counting on your support to ensure we have the resources to keep fighting for a better Texas.
From registering voters, organizing to build power at all levels, turning folks out to the polls, and more – none of it would be possible without the help of grassroots supporters like you.
Our average contribution this month is just $16. Our work is only possible because of thousands of folks like you who believe that Texas is worth fighting for.
But, in full transparency, our fundraising has slowed down this month more than we anticipated. [**Can we count on you to make a $3 donation to help us catch up before the holidays?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20241221.mJKZK4&refcode=ema20241221-239926&t=1&akid=239926%2E444211%2Err-5G-)
Thank you so much for your support,
Team Powered by People

Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=239926%2E444211%2Err-5G-), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=239926%2E444211%2Err-5G-).

name: Team IDCCA
subject: Save the date: Our annual trivia game!

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_211124_FR_Trivia [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_211124_FR_Trivia]

Hey team – we have exciting news!

Today we’re officially encouraging you to save the date for our annual virtual trivia night. This year, join us on January 18th at 7:00pm to prove your trivia chops with your favorite County Chairs, elected officials, and Democrats throughout Illinois, win cash prizes AND support local elections all across the state.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_211124_FR_Trivia [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_211124_FR_Trivia]If you’re already prepared to join us, you can RSVP now to reserve your spot. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2025trivianight?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_211124_FR_Trivia]

See you on the 18th!

– IDCCA

Federal law requires political committees use their “best efforts” to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. State law requires that we report the occupation and name of the employer of any individual who contributes over $500.
A copy of our reports are available for free online at FEC.gov. A copy of our report filed with the State Board of Elections is (or will be) available on the board’s official website, www.elections.il.gov, or for purchase from the Illinois State Board of Elections, Springfield, IL

subject: No off years

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99090751/518803814/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20241221_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjQ3Zjc5NGEtZTdiZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8YDPfzeVOL4i09F67rcgS0QN3ht79RlKdMRIh2SxRiA=)
---
We need to build a powerful grassroots coalition for the challenges ahead. As we head into 2025, it's crucial that supporters like you stand with us. There are no off-years for state parties, especially in a battleground state like Arizona. Building our "big tent" means investing in and elevating Democrats who are at the forefront of the response to the radical agenda of Donald Trump and his MAGA allies. With your support, we can protect the hard-fought gains we've achieved and continue expanding our base to include more Arizonans, particularly those who have been overlooked for too long. We're committed to organizing, mobilizing, and protecting the vote, ensuring that every voice is heard and counted. It's about more than just holding onto power; it's about building a sustainable future where progressive values thrive in our state. **[So before the holiday break, will you add your name and stand with us to build a bluer Arizona? Together, we can continue to push for equity and justice for generations to come.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99090752/518803815/60394760?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20241221_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjQ3Zjc5NGEtZTdiZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8YDPfzeVOL4i09F67rcgS0QN3ht79RlKdMRIh2SxRiA=&emci=567f794a-e7bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=647f794a-e7bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=9307116)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99090753/518803816/60394760?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20241221_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjQ3Zjc5NGEtZTdiZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8YDPfzeVOL4i09F67rcgS0QN3ht79RlKdMRIh2SxRiA=&emci=567f794a-e7bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&emdi=647f794a-e7bf-ef11-88ce-0022482a93af&ceid=9307116)

name: Laura Friedman
subject: A brand new caucus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99090907/518804408/158001685?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTJlMTMwNjAtZWJiZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0JrAIsE1CwrW5UOskFWtDt9RiYvbVDSCj9cgHzBf3gY=) Friend, I believe that everyone deserves a safe place to live, for a price they can afford. Yes, it really is that simple, friend. **That’s why I am thrilled to be the first freshman member of Congress to join the newly formed, bipartisan YIMBY caucus, headed by my colleague Robert Garcia of Long Beach, to tackle these issues.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99090908/518804409/158001685?refcode=em-12.21.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTJlMTMwNjAtZWJiZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0JrAIsE1CwrW5UOskFWtDt9RiYvbVDSCj9cgHzBf3gY=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99090909/518804410/158001685?refcode=em-12.21.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTJlMTMwNjAtZWJiZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0JrAIsE1CwrW5UOskFWtDt9RiYvbVDSCj9cgHzBf3gY=) Housing affordability and homelessness is one of our most urgent crises. In the assembly, I:
* Worked to increase our affordable housing stock
* Cut red tape that has prevented the development of housing
* Increased tenant protections
* and fought hard to make sure those living on our streets have access to the care and services they need.

Now, it’s time to take that work national. **I’m glad to be working with like-minded, driven folks in Congress who are equally determined to tackle this issue, together. And I know that we can and will break through the crisis of housing affordability that is plaguing too many of our communities.** Onwards, Laura | ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/99090910/518804411/158001685?refcode=em-12.21.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTJlMTMwNjAtZWJiZi1lZjExLTg4Y2UtMDAyMjQ4MmE5M2FmIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0JrAIsE1CwrW5UOskFWtDt9RiYvbVDSCj9cgHzBf3gY=)****
---

clean_body: | = Friend, I believe that everyone deserves a safe place to live, for a price they can afford. Yes, it really is that simple, friend. That’s why I am thrilled to be the first freshman member of Congress to join the newly formed, bipartisan YIMBY caucus, headed by my colleague Robert Garcia of Long Beach, to tackle these issues. = = Housing affordability and homelessness is one of our most urgent crises. In the assembly, I: Worked to increase our affordable housing stock Cut red tape that has prevented the development of housing Increased tenant protections and fought hard to make sure those living on our streets have access to the care and services they need. Now, it’s time to take that work national. I’m glad to be working with like-minded, driven folks in Congress who are equally determined to tackle this issue, together. And I know that we can and will break through the crisis of housing affordability that is plaguing too many of our communities. Onwards, Laura | **=** | | Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress Laura's campaign doesn't take a dime from corporate PACs and completely relies on grassroots supporters like you! To chip in to Laura's campaign = To learn more about Laura's progressive record of supporting our working families, please visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Find Peace in Uncertain Times
body:
Have you been watching what is going on in our world? |
---
| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_s=0d88be6517144485ac332b2afa98acf5&_t=UgRr0ffPUaezfkar4To8DCznBEj_NnxHOJnMz-xhQLzCsEuAd-lsbU-CAdSAVPG-0oN00xSqkpMaF5pxLcCoqmFJDXMdUMmM3br99mArMoJd5IAGcXyrz_Zftb18Nymn)_
---
| | [](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/u/click?_t=29bc9815846f49728b1d374165de7bf2&_m=0d88be6517144485ac332b2afa98acf5&_e=LE37VAS942YZBst6h0SosTjE6yQMOHD35AEZ0UvDOcz1OnSOMUgKdHvxdTdzPu2CPuyhlyA_eJp9PTaPbSqxMA3gQ6cnDnW3EV5t2WK_xsuNpkMLL3pppBuDJsDyjwh4BQanszT_zzlUQbuzpsEfwv1W52Eng0HDK2CtjpuR8g-Jeit7McyHRW_P5D-N3E6INRA9SV3TT6cVzxG_J_5AVJKcfaDK7-OL4J76PUyH-5WaIH6Qhs2ww3iUafK8X22856XiYJJfGf8f4MGtY8h4xe0KC9ZR_H015QO2VGHoo4hcMGq-6p2iXLViHmmLLA5mX9rL-BHMPql4lzo3TGvxthmHuq1XaCUto6tTqdj_jtyYqRNd8LgXaJNcMoPgrES1)
---
Hello Friend, Have you been watching what is going on in our world? Do you need help to encourage you in your faith and fortify your hope in these dark days? When anxiety over inflation, wars, and uncertainty strikes, you need hope immediately. That's why God has given you His Word. He doesn't want you to have to wait for the peace that comes from knowing He's in control of the future. God's Word says that he knows how the end will happen.. Jesus rules victoriously over evil, and you'll spend an eternity in glory -- free from pain and suffering -- in His presence. That is such good news! While we wait for that ending, perhaps you or someone you love might have questions about what is happening now in our world and how it fits in with what God says is coming. Those are legitimate questions, and God's Word has answers! I've written a book that outlines the end of your story. That ending is powerful and perfect. You won't be disappointed, and believe me, you won't want to change a thing. The name of my book is _Perfect Ending: Why Your Eternal Future Matters Today_. This book will help you face your tomorrows, not in fear, but in absolute confidence, to prepare you for the soon and certain return of Christ. As you read, you'll:
---
* Gain valuable insight into how future biblical events affect you in the here and now.
* Find the answers to the 10 most frequently asked questions about heaven.
* Discover how some of our government's policies are paving the way for the Antichrist.
* Come to understand the crucial, but often confusing and overwhelming subject of Bible prophecy.
* Understand the precise sequence and importance of prophetic events like the rapture, tribulation, and millennium.

---
_Perfect Ending_ will be mailed to you as a way of saying thanks for whatever donation you are able to give to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. And as an added bonus, we will include our informative Bible Prophecy Chart to help you visualize end-times events.

clean_body: Have you been watching what is going on in our world? | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | Hello Friend, Have you been watching what is going on in our world? Do you need help to encourage you in your faith and fortify your hope in these dark days? When anxiety over inflation, wars, and uncertainty strikes, you need hope immediately. That's why God has given you His Word. He doesn't want you to have to wait for the peace that comes from knowing He's in control of the future. God's Word says that he knows how the end will happen.. Jesus rules victoriously over evil, and you'll spend an eternity in glory -- free from pain and suffering -- in His presence. That is such good news! While we wait for that ending, perhaps you or someone you love might have questions about what is happening now in our world and how it fits in with what God says is coming. Those are legitimate questions, and God's Word has answers! I've written a book that outlines the end of your story. That ending is powerful and perfect. You won't be disappointed, and believe me, you won't want to change a thing. The name of my book is Perfect Ending: Why Your Eternal Future Matters Today. This book will help you face your tomorrows, not in fear, but in absolute confidence, to prepare you for the soon and certain return of Christ. As you read, you'll: Gain valuable insight into how future biblical events affect you in the here and now. Find the answers to the 10 most frequently asked questions about heaven. Discover how some of our government's policies are paving the way for the Antichrist. Come to understand the crucial, but often confusing and overwhelming subject of Bible prophecy. * Understand the precise sequence and importance of prophetic events like the rapture, tribulation, and millennium. Perfect Ending will be mailed to you as a way of saying thanks for whatever donation you are able to give to the ministry of Pathway to Victory. And as an added bonus, we will include our informative Bible Prophecy Chart to help you visualize end-times events. | | Both of these resources are yours when you give here: Each day is one day closer to the day when Christ returns. Let's be watching and waiting -- and learning all we can from God's Word about our role in the days ahead. Eagerly awaiting His return, Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas .

This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Then he started tweeting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Nobody voted for him to run the federal government.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2433%2E4032634%2E69tbSS)
---
Last time I checked, nobody voted for Elon Musk to run the federal government. But this week, he seemed to think that was his job. And Donald Trump appeared to agree with him. You see, House Republicans negotiated with Democrats in Congress a plan to keep the government open. But then Musk started tweeting about how it was a bad deal. Then Trump trailed along later to say he was on the same page. And House Republicans fell in line. In their next plan, they got rid of proposed funding for research on pediatric cancer, early detection of cervical cancer and breast cancer, and children with Down Syndrome. All while the GOP gets ready to hand more tax breaks to billionaires and giant corporations in the new year. **Because of this last-minute scrambling, they brought the federal government to the brink of a shutdown in the middle of the holiday season.** **And they made it clear that Musk is wielding a tremendous amount of unearned power in Washington.** As he continues whispering in Donald Trump’s ear as the “unofficial co-president” (that’s how the _Washington Post_ put it), the American people have a right to know whether his advice would help the whole country or just line his own pockets. Because let’s remember: Musk is still CEO of several companies with significant interests before the federal government.
* Tesla has gotten nearly $42 million in government contracts to provide electric vehicles and services to the government.
* SpaceX has received nearly $20 billion in government contracts.
* And his companies have been the subject of at least 20 recent federal investigations or reviews.

So as Musk attends to his duties co-running the “Department of Government Efficiency,” is he thinking through ways to best serve the American people — or trying to make his companies richer and end investigations into his work? These are glaring conflicts of interest. [**I’ve called on the Trump transition team to make Musk follow the same ethics standards they’ve set for other officials. Add your name if you agree that the same rules ought to apply to the richest man in the world as he appears to steer government policy.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/signup/ew-em-musk/?source=EMZ24F_ENG_E_20241220_V1S1&t=8&akid=2433%2E4032634%2E69tbSS) I will keep working to hold the incoming Trump administration accountable and hold the line against a far-right agenda that would reward the rich and powerful. I know you’re in this fight too — and I’m grateful. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

---

For too long, Congress has relied on massive omnibus spending bills to fund the federal government. These bills, often spanning thousands of pages, are rushed through the legislative process with minimal debate or scrutiny. They bundle together funding for critical programs with unrelated pet projects and wasteful expenditures, leaving little room for accountability. It is time to fix this broken process by adopting a bill-by-bill approach to the federal budget. A bill-by-bill budget means that each government program or department would have its funding debated and voted on individually.
